name: Eric Hyers, Team Beshear
subject: Bumping up Andy's message
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR
body:
We're just a few hours away from our filing deadline, and we're hoping for a last-minute push from grassroots supporters like you to ensure we put up the strongest numbers possible. Hey Peter – I wanted to make sure you saw this message from Andy.

We're just a few hours away from our 30-day pre-primary reporting deadline, and we're hoping for a last-minute push from grassroots supporters like you to help us put up the strongest numbers possible. With 12 Republican opponents in the race and outside groups spending big to defeat Andy, we need to send a message that Kentuckians are fired up to re-elect Andy and protect our progress.

[**There's not much time left. Please, Peter, consider chipping in before our pre-primary reporting deadline at midnight tonight to help us build a winning campaign and re-elect Andy →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61895742/401553309/523659758?refcode=em23_230416_filng5_fnd_gq_act___EHTB_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230416_filng5_fnd_gq_act___EHTB_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=d176efcb-b2dc-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTc2ZWZjYi1iMmRjLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3S_IgqD4dHlmPBQcVFSp5i7wD7FxuPhFdiJnF2oIt5Q=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [$5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61895744/401553311/523659758?refcode=em23_230416_filng5_fnd_gq_act___EHTB_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230416_filng5_fnd_gq_act___EHTB_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=d176efcb-b2dc-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTc2ZWZjYi1iMmRjLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3S_IgqD4dHlmPBQcVFSp5i7wD7FxuPhFdiJnF2oIt5Q=)

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Andy Beshear <info@andybeshear.com>
Date: Sun, Apr 16, 2023
Subject: This is our moment.

Hey there,

You only get one chance to make a first impression. And we have an opportunity tonight to put our best foot forward.

Tonight at midnight is the 30-day pre-primary reporting deadline for candidates in the governor's race. Soon after, election year fundraising numbers will go public for the first time. This is our chance to show my opponents, Kentuckians, and the country the strength of our grassroots movement.

My opponents are looking for any opportunity or sign of weakness from our team. They've been attacking me from the start, and I don't expect them to slow down any time soon.

As we get closer to November, millions more will likely be poured into this race by my opponents and the outside groups supporting them. I can't afford to lose any time or momentum. And tonight's deadline is our first big test.

**I need to know that you're on board. Will you chip in to my re-election campaign before midnight tonight and help me build a strong campaign to win this November? Any dollar amount helps >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-april23-filing?refcode=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61895750/401553601/523659758?refcode=em23_230416_filng5_fnd_gq_act___EHTB_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230416_filng5_fnd_gq_act___EHTB_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=d176efcb-b2dc-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTc2ZWZjYi1iMmRjLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3S_IgqD4dHlmPBQcVFSp5i7wD7FxuPhFdiJnF2oIt5Q=)**

Sincerely,

Andy

PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR

Andy Beshear for Governor
PO Box 4278
Louisville, KY 40204

name: FLIP THE HOUSE FUND (via VPP)
subject: Defeat Kevin McCarthy deadline: MISSED?!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Our window of opportunity to defeat Republicans while they’re still vulnerable is closing...
| **There are three things you need to know about Kevin McCarthy’s slim House majority:**
1. The GOP has been PLAGUED by infighting from the second they seized the House majority – making Republicans more vulnerable than ever!

2. **We just need to flip 5 SEATS to retake the majority!

**
3. Despite our incredible opportunity to secure toss-up seats while the GOP isn’t paying attention, support for Democrats is PLUMMETING! _No!!_

**$18,000 FLIP THE HOUSE FUND DEADLINE:_MISSED_** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/43602?t=6&akid=7138%2E878179%2EVHTb-7) [Our accountants said we can extend our deadline for ONE MORE DAY, but if we miss this goal, we’ll lose our chance to act now! Rush $7 to our urgent $18,000 Flip the House Fund by MIDNIGHT to defeat the GOP while they’re still vulnerable! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/43602?t=7&akid=7138%2E878179%2EVHTb-7) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $7 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/43603?t=8&akid=7138%2E878179%2EVHTb-7)

_Voter Protection Project_
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=7138%2E878179%2EVHTb-7). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=7138%2E878179%2EVHTb-7).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=7138%2E878179%2EVHTb-7) to request fewer emails. Patriot!!!

Friend,
It’s sad to see what’s happening to America.
We have truly become a nation in decline.
Every day, I read a new headline about how much further America has fallen.
Our currency standard is in danger. Our allies are forging alliances with our enemies. Our southern border no longer even exists. Our country is getting ripped off, exploited, and abused by the entire world.
But today, I’m writing to you with a message of hope. I promise you: **THE BEST IS YET TO COME.**
When I’m back in the White House, we will rebuild the greatest economy in American history, STOP inflation, and protect the U.S. Dollar as the world’s currency standard.
We will END illegal immigration, finish the wall, direct the largest deportation operation in history, and secure our border once and for all.
We will reassert America’s strong leadership and revive the Trump Foreign Policy of PEACE through STRENGTH.
We will stop pink-haired lunatics from teaching critical race theory and sex education to kindergarteners.
We will make America energy DOMINANT and end the Left’s radical Green New Deal.
We will stop George Soros from weaponizing our legal system and restore TRUE justice in America.
...And when I say _“WE”_ , I mean it, Friend.
**Patriots like YOU are the backbone of our movement. And on November 5, 2024, WE will win the White House and we will Make America Great Again!**

Every day, I read a new headline about how much further America has fallen. Our currency standard is in danger. Our allies are forging alliances with our enemies. Our southern border no longer even exists. Our country is getting ripped off, exploited, and abused by the entire world. But today, I’m writing to you with a message of hope. I promise you: THE BEST IS YET TO COME. When I’m back in the White House, we will rebuild the greatest economy in American history, STOP inflation, and protect the U.S. Dollar as the world’s currency standard. We will END illegal immigration, finish the wall, direct the largest deportation operation in history, and secure our border once and for all. We will reassert America’s strong leadership and revive the Trump Foreign Policy of PEACE through STRENGTH. We will stop pink-haired lunatics from teaching critical race theory and sex education to kindergarteners. We will make America energy DOMINANT and end the Left’s radical Green New Deal. We will stop George Soros from weaponizing our legal system and restore TRUE justice in America. ...And when I say “WE” , I mean it, Friend. Patriots like YOU are the backbone of our movement. And on November 5, 2024, WE will win the White House and we will Make America Great Again! | Thank you, | Donald J. Trump 45th President of the United States Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. Welcome to _Laura Reacts to the News_! This is where you will get my take on various national news stories each week.
## [Obama's Brother Malik Pledges to Campaign Against Rumored Michelle Obama Run in 2024 ](https://substack.com/redirect/577487fc-faa1-4c5d-9593-d9404790e8a2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
**SUMMARY:** The Brother and best-man to former President Barack Obama pledged to campaign against a rumored run by Michelle Obama, in a Tweet. A Michelle Obama 2024 run has been [been speculated](https://substack.com/redirect/544c28cd-b5e4-4e52-ad0f-0a3a59ff997d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) by Trump loyalists Roger Stone and Laura Loomer. In a reply, he also wrote "*He/She," fueling long held speculation that Michelle Obama was born a biological male.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/f013089e-6205-4e32-b312-212d491c5907?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/4b255875-6cfa-46f2-8093-ed4f3c753ecd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**MY TAKE:**
The feud between former President Obama and his brother, Malik, is ongoing. In 2016, Malik rose to online fame when he endorsed President Donald Trump for President, and continued to support his re-election efforts in 2020. And now, as the 2024 Presidential election season heats up, Malik has pledged to work against Michelle Obama, who could possibly be a 2024 contender on the Democrat ticket. But, what is most telling about Malik's tweet is his insinuation that Michelle Obama is transgender. According to Malik Obama, Michelle's pronouns are He/She.
It is worth noting that this is not the first time someone has accused Michelle Obama of being transgender.
In 2014, comedian Joan Rivers was asked if she thought the United States would ever see the first gay or female president. Her response was: "We already have it with Obama, so let's just calm down. You know Michelle (Obama) is a trans."
And now, 9 years later, even Barrack Obama's own brother is echoing those claims.
You know what they say. Where there's smoke, there is fire.
## [Kari Lake Is 'Seriously Considering' Running For Senate](https://substack.com/redirect/88c19b64-0efd-47a8-8c5f-cba5ddc50787?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
##### By Ewan Palmer at Newsweek
**SUMMARY:** Former GOP gubernatorial hopeful [Kari Lake](https://substack.com/redirect/df835a7f-7a1b-4f6b-8a03-ab733e14edd5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) is looking into running for the U.S. Senate seat for Arizona in 2024.
**MY TAKE:**
Kari Lake is a rockstar. I don't usually throw my support behind many candidates, but I love Kari Lake's commitment to fighting for election integrity, and her fighting spirit. I was sad to see her Gubernatorial election in Arizona was stolen, but there are rumors that she is on President Trump's list as a possible Vice President pick, and now, she has confirmed that she is seriously considering running for US Senate in Arizona. Kari would be a fabulous Vice President, but she would also make a killer US Senator! I am looking forward to see what is next for Kari Lake, who has ben fighting the good fight in the Arizona court system since November 2022 exposing voter fraud in Arizona.
## [Bills blocking public access to Gov. DeSantis travel records pass two legislative committees](https://substack.com/redirect/842e1d36-2dd1-45de-a190-05669787d957?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
##### By ClickOrlando.com
**SUMMARY:** The Florida Senate Rules Committee unanimously approved **[SB 1616](https://substack.com/redirect/f518f27a-890f-4b64-86dd-b84c24227eed?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** , and the Florida House Judiciary Committee approved **[HB 1495](https://substack.com/redirect/1943bb1a-ab47-433f-801c-b87169014cef?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** with a vote of 15-7.
The identical bills would prevent state agencies from releasing any records detailing DeSantis' travel, including how much he is spending on travel, which plane he traveled on and with whom he was traveling.
**MY TAKE:**
Lobbying Florida legislators to change Florida's Resign-to-Run law, which blocks elected State officials from running for higher office while currently serving in office, wasn't enough for Ron DeSantis. Now, in an effort to cover up his violation of federal and state election laws while running his illegal, Shadow Presidential campaign in 2024, DeSantis is now urging the Florida Legislature to pass a bill that would prevent his travel-records and the expenses associated with traveling on the job as Governor, from being available to the public. The sealed information would also include details regarding who accompanied DeSantis on trips within Florida, and around the country, which is important since he has traveled often on a national tour for the sake of promoting his [new book](https://substack.com/redirect/44f0a549-c631-4b8b-a050-1ff6976cea66?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and visiting key primary states as he moves to file for a White House bid.
What is DeSantis trying to hide?
It's obvious he's doing this for nefarious reasons, because for the last 6 months, he has been running a shadow presidential campaign, and spending much of his time (on taxpayer dime) in states like Iowa, New Hampshire, and Ohio trying to score support for his betrayal of President Trump ahead of officially announcing his plans to run for President in 2024. He doesn't want the public to see his travel records, because it will corroborate what people like myself have been saying for the last 6 months. And that is the fact that Governor DeSantis has been campaigning for President on taxpayer dime.
## [FBI Claims Internet Lingo Like "Based", "Chad" and "Red Pill" Is Connected to "Extremism"](https://substack.com/redirect/5c920ca7-5d60-4214-939c-e831968b0840?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
##### By Jose Nino at Big League Politics
**SUMMARY:** On April 10, 2023, new documents were released exposing the FBI's latest attempt to flag common Internet slang as "Violent Extremism."
The Heritage Foundation's Oversight Project [claimed](https://substack.com/redirect/f02658ab-7243-4288-b272-31a51d2bd457?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that it filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) request to expose FBI documents that feature glossaries showing that common internet slang has been flagged as a sign of "Involuntary Celibate Violent Extremism" or "Racially or Ethnically Motivated Violent Extremism."
**MY TAKE:**
If you need more proof that the jack-booted thugs in the FBI aren't your friends, here it is. The FBI is now claiming that common Internet lingo, including words like "based" and "Chad", which are commonplace on the Right, are now signs of "violent extremism". In fact, just recently I used an edited picture of President Trump, which depicts him as a "Chad". This image was the thumbnail for a [recent edition of ](https://substack.com/redirect/13cc994b-10e5-46e0-80d2-9852a6eda4ce?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_[LOOMER UNLEASHED](https://substack.com/redirect/13cc994b-10e5-46e0-80d2-9852a6eda4ce?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/13cc994b-10e5-46e0-80d2-9852a6eda4ce?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Does this look like a call for arms to you? Am I inciting violence by calling something based? No. This is absurd, and it's nothing more than another attempt by the Biden regime to falsely accuse all Trump supporters of being extremists, and to crack down on our speech. The reality is, Joe Biden and his far-left pals controlling the Justice Department have decided that Trump supporters are the enemy, and in their "Jihad" against us, they will use anything and everything to justify throwing you and your family behind bars if you are on the Right. Just last week, we saw the DOJ sentence a pro-Trump meme creator to 10 years in prison over a meme he posted about Hillary Clinton in 2016.
_**" SHUT UP AND OBEY or Dictator Biden will throw you in the Gulag"**_ is the message they are sending.
## [Mike Pence Gets Booed At NRA Convention in Indiana](https://substack.com/redirect/68395b1c-a8db-49f8-bfbc-23cd30e00375?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
##### By Anthony Scott at The Gateway Pundit
**SUMMARY:** Former vice president Mike Pence did not receive a warm welcome when he took the stage at the NRA's annual convention hosted this year in Indianapolis, Indiana.
As soon as Pence walked up to the podium to give his speech, the crowd almost immediately started to boo.
In response to the boos, Mike told the crowd "I love you too."
**MY TAKE:**
When is Mike Pence going to take a hint? After he refused to stand by President Trump and made the choice to not support a thorough investigation into the overwhelming evidence of voter fraud in the 2020 Presidential Election, he proved he is a traitor to the America First agenda.
And now, he naively expects to receive a warm welcome every time he speaks at Conservative events. It's just never going to happen.
Making the incident even more humiliating, the NRA Convention where Pence was booed took place in Indiana, his home state where he was once Governor.
Talk about embarrassing! Maybe next time he will get a clue...

name: Pro Life Update
subject: These Babies Could Be Pumped Full Of Chemicals - What This Means For You
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zl2bofkbs7btc4a1jcs3u6ai612o029grp9uhmj0_rp22sh2s8i66o74cth6aor2cdh2bs)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It’s an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zb3dm1hgulk3hpmul9bsfnbvbukdqlnro2clrmv0_rp22sh2s8i66o74cth6aor2cdh2bs)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z8ogpks0inoo6lip64c2uafpfbv6qrt4aapgqkio_rp22sh2s8i66o74cth6aor2cdh2bs)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _“deadly insurrection.”_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It’s time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

**Support the January 6th Families**

**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com

**I launched the _Kash Foundation_ to offer legal help to America First families like the ones from the Jan 6th witch hunts. **

I know what it’s like. I’ve been the target of the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself.

I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump.

The FBI used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they are doing everything they can to hide any evidence that they tried to provoke the protesters. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, _I will do everything in my power to help out_.

The government will know how much money you have, where you have it and how you are spending it. ---|--- | future of this country is under assault like nothing we've seen before. The Feds new secret "Project Hamilton" will obliterate freedom in America. | The IRS is trying to close the tax loophole that can safeguard your IRA or 401k from market crashes and recessions. A Catastrophic Recession is Imminent? On the heels of the 2nd largest bank failure in US history and the 9th interest rate hike in the last 12 months, a staggering 186 more banks are on the brink of collapse. “Could your bank be next?” The Fed's reckless recent printing of $300,000,000 to bail out more struggling banks has further devalued the dollar (and your savings) and pushed inflation trending toward all-time highs. If your bank goes under, do you really think the government is going to bail you out like it did SVB and Signature Bank? The FDIC can’t even cover SVB and Signature Bank combined deposits, so how can you expect them to cover your deposits if your bank fails? And if that's not enough to terrify you, consider this - experts predict that the latest interest rate hikes will inevitably trigger a recession, causing your investments and retirement accounts to plummet even more in value. Renowned investors Robert Kiyosaki and David Morgan have repeatedly said that the “dollar is now trash” and urge Americans to, ironically the same precious metal that the banks themselves are now hoarding to protect their own assets. Gold truly is a symbol of financial stability and security, increases in value over time, and outperforms the market, especially in turbulent economic times like these. Don’t wait for another interest rate hike in 2023. It could be too late by then. Protect your financial wellbeing now. body:
Facing Tough Senate Race, Montana GOP Looks to Change the Rules — New York Times
Republican politicians in Montana are trying to thwart Jon Tester’s chances of winning Montana’s U.S. Senate race. They’re using dirty tricks to try and change Montana’s election laws in the hopes of defeating him in 2024.
It’s no secret Montana will decide Senate control, and Republicans are desperate to hand the gavel back to Mitch McConnell. Jon Tester needs our help ASAP to combat these outrageous attacks before it’s too late.
Please, rush a split donation RIGHT NOW between Seth Moulton and Jon’s campaign so we can fight back and show Republicans just how strong this team is. We need 7,500 supporters to step up today. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester]
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester]
It’s clear Republicans are absolutely terrified of the strong coalition of supporters Jon has built. They’re resorting to shady backgroom deals to try to change the rules, silence voters, and hold onto power.
With our fragile Senate majority at stake, we cannot afford to lose Montana’s Senate race. That’s why we need you to step up today and show your support.
Chip in a split donation now to help us meet this emergency goal >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester]
Thanks,
Team Tester

# We just Received a BIG Endorsement!
---
|
---
| |

| | Support our Law & Order Agenda
---
Ensuring that our communities are safe and that our law enforcement is given all of the resources needed will be a top priority of mine.
We deserve safe streets, and good quality of life. That includes making sure we lock up the drug dealers who peddle the deadly Fentanyl that is killing our Suffolk residents at a higher rate than neighboring counties.
[ I ask you to consider supporting my campaign with a donation of $50, $75, $100, or more if you can. ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dUSW32kmE7AtY7AJcvKwy1vBiR6g3UbtvjMaefXx6IwBvGK0R_h_PL8yx1AeJWaI2Zr7wxqc4bcnXttw0wCPCA1pFpvue3DgL6SbRB55Qwn9jKfWjciznbqGF8Y9nlDyXlAtNusvPdSrhl1NkUm9NGZoT267f077Y-VbIKw3D9U7ksbNkvTz_vaQxSyEHO1x&c=FKbVzGxXqyh3pM2ncn89cwUH8z0U35kwqD_Ds9eal7GyTfRK4k7w5A==&ch=N4OOVIRNE4tdImqeJLMKQD7Txm2PlPpgkP9VSwzFjeOHLiH2Ju8VQQ==)
Every dollar will help us to pay for staff, rent and support a big field operation we are currently developing.

Thank you for your support!

subject: Your Supreme Court survey
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWsTBRDDaN

Hillsdale College

Your participation in Hillsdale College's National Survey
on the United States Supreme Court is requested.

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWsTBRDDaN

Please see a special message from our
sponsor:

Dear Friend,

Your participation in Hillsdale
College's National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is
requested.

Your response will only take a few
minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and
the separation of powers in America.

In an interview published in Imprimis,
Hillsdale's digest of liberty, Associate Justice of the Supreme
Court Clarence Thomas explained what he sees as his role on the
nation's highest court: "My job is to apply the Constitution."

But progressives see the Court
differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the
bench.

Do you agree that the role of the
Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and
NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?

YES

NO

Even worse, progressives dismayed by
recent Supreme Court decisions want to "pack" the bench with
additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put
it in a Boston Globe op-ed: "To restore balance and integrity to
a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by
four or more seats."

That is why I'm reaching out to you
today...

What is your opinion about the Supreme
Court's role in our constitutional republic?

Please share your thoughts with me
using the College's National Survey on the United States Supreme
Court right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form
effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the
importance of the Constitution to liberty-including the proper
role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution
instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your National
Survey on the United States Supreme Court using this secure link:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61710808:WsTBRDDaN:m:3:2532013465:7E7E90D9A33D3551719F943E125F8781:r

Thank you for your time and
attention-and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty
since 1844

Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI
49242 USA

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system January 18, 2022.

name: Team Nina for Philly
subject: Exciting News: Sierra Club Endorses Dr. Nina Ahmad for Philadelphia City Council At-Large! 🌿��
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nina for Philly
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/xR-AjT5gpAu2Om-_w66g44FE648kAYjsuk2u837p_OA=/M8zfEVoNHKb4F_KzSbcxEzAOEyaG2Pug1Lbrg8M9kvM=)

Friend

We have some amazing news to share with you today! The Sierra Club, one of the nation's most respected environmental organizations, has just endorsed Dr. Nina Ahmad in her campaign for Philadelphia City Council At-Large. This endorsement demonstrates that Dr. Ahmad is the candidate who will prioritize our environment, champion responsible resource use, and advocate for the protection and restoration of our natural and human environments.

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/xR-AjT5gpAu2Om-_w66g44FE648kAYjsuk2u837p_OA=/M8zfEVoNHKb4F_KzSbcxEzAOEyaG2Pug1Lbrg8M9kvM=)

As a groundbreaking candidate, Dr. Ahmad has a proven track record of fighting for change and taking on powerful interests. If elected, she will be the only scientist on City Council, bringing a fresh perspective and evidence-based decision-making to public service in Philadelphia.

Now, with the Sierra Club's endorsement, Dr. Ahmad is poised to continue her work in environmental stewardship and sustainability as a member of the Philadelphia City Council At-Large.

But we need your help to make it happen! Will you join the Sierra Club in supporting Dr. Nina Ahmad's campaign for City Council At-Large by making a contribution today? Your donation, no matter the size, will help us reach more voters and ensure that Dr. Ahmad's dedication, education, and insight can make a difference for all Philadelphians.

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/xR-AjT5gpAu2Om-_w66g44FE648kAYjsuk2u837p_OA=/V7-c4o3RUe6iR7NODwdfY-TQ54jW3WantMutbm4_MH0=)

Together, we can make history and create a greener, more equitable, and more just future for Philadelphia. Thank you for your support!

In solidarity,
Team Nina for Philly

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/xR-AjT5gpAu2Om-_w66g44FE648kAYjsuk2u837p_OA=/V7-c4o3RUe6iR7NODwdfY-TQ54jW3WantMutbm4_MH0=)

Paid for by Nina for Philly

A week before the primary, she was polling at 15 percent. But, Nikki won. - When Nikki ran for governor of South Carolina, people asked, "Nikki who?" She was polling in fourth place with just a few months until Election Day, and was the least funded, and least known GOP candidate in the race. But, Nikki won.On top of her winning record, she has a track-record of getting things done and delivering REAL results that make a difference in the lives of the people she serves. body:
New York City District Attorney Alvin Bragg has declared war on President Trump and the American people. | | | | | [ ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62567682:JmwixUGeN:m:1:3361486117:1C656306B33AAB0018D15C84AEA86189:r)

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62567682:JmwixUGeN:m:1:3361486117:1C656306B33AAB0018D15C84AEA86189:r)Dear Peter,

New York City District Attorney Alvin Bragg has declared war on President Trump and the American people.

**Like I told you yesterday, this shocking indictment threatens the rule of law, honest elections, and the future of our country.**

What's more, what District Attorney Bragg has done is **ILLEGAL.**

So once again, Freedom Watch turns to its Citizens' Grand Jury. We're going to seek a criminal indictment against Alvin Bragg for his crime...and we're going to seek justice, peacefully and legally.

[ **Patriot, please help Freedom Watch fully fund this critically important effort with your best gift IMMEDIATELY.** ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62567682:JmwixUGeN:m:1:3361486117:1C656306B33AAB0018D15C84AEA86189:r)

**I 'm Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch. **

I'm a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who's fought for the American people for 45 years. You've seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

I'm proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I 'm the only lawyer in American history to have a court rule that a sitting President had committed a crime. And the only lawyer to enjoin the National Security Agency from conducting mass surveillance on hundreds of millions of American citizens. **

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents, and WIN.**

[ **The time to act is now. Please help us fully fund our fight against the injustice of Biden 's corrupt regime. ** ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62567682:JmwixUGeN:m:1:3361486117:1C656306B33AAB0018D15C84AEA86189:r)

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder, Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Chairman and General Counsel, Freedom Watch, Inc.

**P.S. You and I can 't let George Soros-backed District Attorney Alvin Bragg get away with his illegal indictment of President Trump. **

[ **Please help Freedom Watch fight back peacefully and legally with your crucial gift right away.** ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62567682:JmwixUGeN:m:1:3361486117:1C656306B33AAB0018D15C84AEA86189:r)

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: AG Letitia James is fighting for the rule of law and democracy, deposing Trump in a lawsuit to expose his lies, while he stirs up his hateful followers against her. Let’s have her back.
body:
Trump has avoided accountability for years
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc0114f04-1427-4916-9e78-deba051079c2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **_Donald Trump had a bad April. His lawyers had to drag the befuddled non-billionaire in front of New York Attorney General Letitia James, _**_who from the very beginning courageously pursued the orangina-colored toddler's fraud._ **_James is deposing Trump for a $250MM lawsuit for lying about the value of company properties--hugely inflating them for better loan terms, massively deflating them to rip off NY and dump his tax burden on New York residents._** _So, Trump's mad:_ [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf57222e7-b353-47d4-b8b7-b5ed00c7e197/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _**Attorney General James refused to back down, even with his attacks and veiled threats against her leading to scores of death threats.**_ [**_Let's get her back, not let Trump end the political career of a talented, young, female, Black AG by making it so hard to campaign in public due to safety risks. Let's give $5, $10, $25 or whatever we can to Attorney General James for her courage in fighting for what's right, even at great personal risk._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2090866c-8afc-46de-98ce-38fe10957ddb/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thank you for getting the backs' of those who risk it all for democracy._ Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. subject: Your Signature is Needed: Plastics vs. Planet
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1724794?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **URGENT ACTION NEEDED: Tell JP Morgan Chase to commit to FIGHT Formosa Plastics and its mega-polluting factory before it’s too late! [Act now!](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1724795?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** Chase Bank might support a racist, toxic petrochemical plant that would be the size of **14 FOOTBALL FIELDS** along the Mississippi River, threatening communities, ecosystems, and wildlife. The region is known as _**CANCER ALLEY**_ because of the nauseatingly-high amount of chemical and toxic pollution in the region. These predominately Black communities already have more than 200 industrial plants and extremely high cancer rates -- yet Chase could pave the way for them to get another. [**Please, Friend, take immediate action to FIGHT toxic pollution in Cancer Alley.**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1724796?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) | [Sign the petition](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1724797?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Formosa Plastics, the company that wants to build this plant, has a track record of violating environmental laws. Formosa **ILLEGALLY released BILLIONS of plastic pellets into local waterways** for years in Texas and has been fined millions of dollars. It can’t be trusted to build another plant.
**Please, Friend, we need your help to push JP Morgan Chase to OPPOSE this catastrophic petrochemical factory before it’s too late**. The _**PLASTIC APOCALYPSE**_ is getting worse every day. More plastic waste fills our waterways, killing wildlife, and contaminating our food and water. And the communities where these plastics are produced face the most acute consequences. [**Stand up to corporate greed and fight the Formosa Plastics plant in Cancer Alley by 11:59pm TONIGHT! >>**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1724798?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
[Sign the petition](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1724797?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Standing with you,
Marcie Keever
Oceans and vessels program director,
Friends of the Earth**
|

name: Chloe Cole
subject: I'm suing them for what they did to me
body:
I guess I’m what you’d call a “cautionary tale.”

| |
---
| |
# FROM THE DESK OF CHLOE COLE
---
|
---
Dear Friend,My name is Chloe.
---
| | You don’t know me but I’m hoping you saw me on Fox News talking to Tucker Carlson.There are lots of powerful people who don’t want my story to get out, so I’m so grateful that Mr. Carlson had me on as a guest.
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zb9ga5lmfebetl50ia83pb41ll3qmupj39pua818_rp22sh2s8i66o74ctgm6pj6cth2bs)
---
| | I guess I’m what you’d call a “cautionary tale.”You see, I’m one of those girls who was deceived by the transgender movement. I’m 18 years old now but here is a picture of what I looked like before the transgender movement got me. And one from after -- when they had turned me into a “boy.”
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9i6ui7lobltfm4btu1jns4j5lqbo6sb13005qlg_rp22sh2s8i66o74ctgm6pj6cth2bs)
---
** _Before transitioning_**
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0t3d6pdfgtd18jq6jee4ssrito8q9ondui22io0_rp22sh2s8i66o74ctgm6pj6cth2bs)
---
**_After transitioning_**
---
| | [**Even though we don’t know each other, I’m writing you today hoping you’ll help me stop the** **horror of what happened to me, from happening to other children and their parents.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6bc89q0k6ojfrt6l37s9cmhabs26m4scqsb66rg_rp22sh2s8i66o74ctgm6pj6cth2bs) It all started when I was 11 years old and growing up in Northern California. I was growing embarrassed and confused once my body started changing.I was also shy and didn’t socialize easily – and I didn’t feel comfortable talking about any of this with my parents.But I found ‘friends’ on the internet who told me if I was uncomfortable with my body, I was probably a boy trapped in the wrong body.And the more I agreed with them, the more they celebrated me.I was getting the message loud and clear: if I was a girl who became a boy, I’d be valued and loved even more.Before long I was telling my parents I was transgender.They had no idea what to do. My poor parents were scared and desperate and took me to “experts” who convinced them that if they failed to act quickly, I would surely commit suicide.**The gender clinic gave my parents an ultimatum: “Would you rather have a dead daughter or a living son?”** Given those choices, my parents would have signed anything the doctors put in front of them if it meant “saving” me. When they signed those forms, it wasn’t informed parental consent. It was a desperate decision made under extreme duress.And so, at age 13, I was fast-tracked for medical transition from a girl into a boy. [**Will you help me fight so these radical doctors and hospitals can’t prey on another scared, confused, lonely child like they did me?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqffkjvcg9d01te039kedf0tt8phjs9vfr1s2nv8_rp22sh2s8i66o74ctgm6pj6cth2bs) The doctors started giving me weekly testosterone injections...they injected me with an experimental drug used to chemically castrate sex offenders......and finally, they removed my breasts in a radical double mastectomy.I was fifteen years old.And of course, none of this made me any happier or less confused.If you’re like most people I tell my story to... right about now you’re probably thinking, “HOW did it ever get this far?” And the answer is simple.The “experts” lied to my parents -- and to me -- every step of the way.They claimed I would never get “better” unless I medically transitioned – when the truth is that the vast majority of children who think they’re transgender grow out of it with absolutely no chemical or surgical intervention. They claimed their consent forms covered all the risks of pumping testosterone and puberty blockers into my 13-year-old body......while their forms left out dozens and dozens of known risks.They never told us that there isn’t one single scientific study on the effects these treatments have on young children. And they never, ever, were straight with me about what it would mean to let them remove my breasts.When I woke up from that surgery, I was shocked at how mangled my body was. And now years after the surgery, I still wear bandages every day to cover the oozing, unhealed scars.At age 18, I’m just beginning to understand what it will mean to never nurse my child -- if I’ll ever be able to have children at all. For the rest of my life, my voice will sound like a man’s, my body will look like a boy’s, and who knows what cancers, cardiac problems, bone problems, and more are lurking around the corner.And my parents feel like they’ve failed me on every level imaginable.I can’t go back. I can’t change what happened. But I can change what happens to the THOUSANDS of kids just like me who are falling prey to the predatory transgender movement and unscrupulous abusive medical “experts.” [**And YOU can help me.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrc0dgqdgl7v67ggg7j4l3kc6u7lk6ikg7nai468_rp22sh2s8i66o74ctgm6pj6cth2bs) More and more children are mutilated and abused every day.**There’s even a doctor who advertises her mutilation surgeries on TikTok to draw young kids in.** And it won’t stop until someone fights back.When I turned 18, I decided that someone would be me. I had no idea how I would do it, but I’d seen enough T.V. to know I needed a lawyer. I also didn’t know how hard it would be to find someone willing to take my case in liberal California. didn’t even know what a liberal was until they started slamming doors in my face!Finally, someone told me to call Harmeet Dhillon at the Center for American Liberty.
---
| | And the first time we spoke, I felt something I hadn’t felt in a long time -- hope.Because Harmeet is a fighter like me. She didn’t tell me we’d never win against the giant medical industry.She didn’t tell me the transgender issue was too sensitive to touch.She told me my fight mattered.
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zoc4u4isi2jm52iesb8mhq7ultuk8nrrbbnm6kd8_rp22sh2s8i66o74ctgm6pj6cth2bs)
---
| | Not only because of what had happened to me -- but also because we could STOP it from happening to other children. And so together with Harmeet Dhillon’s non-profit -- the Center for American Liberty -- I’ve launched a case against the radical doctors and hospital who preyed on me......and who continue to prey on children -- maybe even in your family.As I’ve mentioned several times -- I’m 18-years-old.On my own, I’d never have the money to pay for a giant court case like this. That’s one of the ways these radicals are taking over everything. They know regular people like me don’t have the money to fight them in court.But that’s exactly why Harmeet started the Center for American Liberty. The Center for American Liberty brings together attorneys who want to fight for what’s right and matches them with people like me who would have had nowhere else to turn.Right now, the Center for American Liberty has landmark cases going like:
---
* _Brach v. Newsom_ \-- to stop California from shutting down private and religious schools...
* _Ngo v. Roce City Antifa_ \-- to get justice for Andy Ngo after he was beaten by Antifa thugs and liberal politicians did NOTHING...
* _O’Handley v. Padilla_ \-- to stop Big Government from using Big Tech to silence people they disagree with...
* And now my case... _Chloe Cole v. Kaiser Permanente_.

---
The Center for American Liberty is a nonprofit. They have big cases but that doesn’t mean they have the big money that their opponents have.[**That’s why I hope you’ll consider helping us by rushing back a small tax-deductible donation of $25 or more.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbhitc9u53kldg19qc34jvcog6ihfkleik507q3g_rp22sh2s8i66o74ctgm6pj6cth2bs) There are big forces at work who want to get rich no matter who they hurt.Alone we’re no match for them. [**But if everyone I’m writing to can contribute just $25, or if you’re able, maybe more -- $35, $50, $75, $100, $200, or even $500**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrk7dqmdt13hlbaq1732gf9kcjn1u70lpkog1mbg_rp22sh2s8i66o74ctgm6pj6cth2bs), we can beat these monsters who are using scared, confused and lonely children to make a buck. For exposing them, I’ve been called a “liar.” I’ve even been told de-transitioners like me don’t exist. But when we beat them in court and stop them from hurting any more children with their lies and mutilations,I will be proud to face them and say:**_“You may have taken away my childhood, and forever changed my future -- but I exist. I exist.”_** Thank you for reading this letter from a complete stranger. I hope I can call you a friend now. And thank you for whatever help you can send to the Center for American Liberty. **[Whether it’s $25, $35, $50, $75, $100, $200, or even $500 or more...](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zgjshaooiladvr2837hchi1mgvjhgufq112ko3j0_rp22sh2s8i66o74ctgm6pj6cth2bs)** every bit moves us closer to stopping these monsters.
---
| | Thank you,Chloe Cole
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z544tg6klnokpip99pdl6asjrksvrhbn3afumqh0_rp22sh2s8i66o74ctgm6pj6cth2bs)
---
| P.S. This is a photo of me now. It’s been a long, painful road but I’m finding happiness and purpose as I fight to make sure what happened to me NEVER happens to another child. **[Please help me with your tax-deductible gift of $25 or more.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztir1e0tk2ms2tccfq90thskt90gk359qnsaqbhg_rp22sh2s8i66o74ctgm6pj6cth2bs) **Thank you so much for your help. --Chloe
---
| | [**DONATE**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7b5rcfprk75qa1dbobs69s06k21u06pagh63dng_rp22sh2s8i66o74ctgm6pj6cth2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zeue3v19pijribilot315i2hiigqfph7doqu1l5o_rp22sh2s8i66o74ctgm6pj6cth2bs)
---
The Center for American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free speech and anti-civil liberties trends.
---

---
PO Box 2510, Leesburg, VA 20177
---

I’m 18 years old now but here is a picture of what I looked like before the transgender movement got me. And one from after -- when they had turned me into a “boy.” | | Before transitioning | After transitioning | | It all started when I was 11 years old and growing up in Northern California. I was growing embarrassed and confused once my body started changing.I was also shy and didn’t socialize easily – and I didn’t feel comfortable talking about any of this with my parents.But I found ‘friends’ on the internet who told me if I was uncomfortable with my body, I was probably a boy trapped in the wrong body.And the more I agreed with them, the more they celebrated me.I was getting the message loud and clear: if I was a girl who became a boy, I’d be valued and loved even more.Before long I was telling my parents I was transgender.They had no idea what to do. My poor parents were scared and desperate and took me to “experts” who convinced them that if they failed to act quickly, I would surely commit suicide.The gender clinic gave my parents an ultimatum: “Would you rather have a dead daughter or a living son?” Given those choices, my parents would have signed anything the doctors put in front of them if it meant “saving” me. When they signed those forms, it wasn’t informed parental consent. It was a desperate decision made under extreme duress.And so, at age 13, I was fast-tracked for medical transition from a girl into a boy. The doctors started giving me weekly testosterone injections...they injected me with an experimental drug used to chemically castrate sex offenders......and finally, they removed my breasts in a radical double mastectomy.I was fifteen years old.And of course, none of this made me any happier or less confused.If you’re like most people I tell my story to... right about now you’re probably thinking, “HOW did it ever get this far?” And the answer is simple.The “experts” lied to my parents -- and to me -- every step of the way.They claimed I would never get “better” unless I medically transitioned – when the truth is that the vast majority of children who think they’re transgender grow out of it with absolutely no chemical or surgical intervention. They claimed their consent forms covered all the risks of pumping testosterone and puberty blockers into my 13-year-old body......while their forms left out dozens and dozens of known risks.They never told us that there isn’t one single scientific study on the effects these treatments have on young children. And they never, ever, were straight with me about what it would mean to let them remove my breasts.When I woke up from that surgery, I was shocked at how mangled my body was. And now years after the surgery, I still wear bandages every day to cover the oozing, unhealed scars.At age 18, I’m just beginning to understand what it will mean to never nurse my child -- if I’ll ever be able to have children at all. For the rest of my life, my voice will sound like a man’s, my body will look like a boy’s, and who knows what cancers, cardiac problems, bone problems, and more are lurking around the corner.And my parents feel like they’ve failed me on every level imaginable.I can’t go back. I can’t change what happened. But I can change what happens to the THOUSANDS of kids just like me who are falling prey to the predatory transgender movement and unscrupulous abusive medical “experts.” More and more children are mutilated and abused every day.There’s even a doctor who advertises her mutilation surgeries on TikTok to draw young kids in. And it won’t stop until someone fights back.When I turned 18, I decided that someone would be me. I had no idea how I would do it, but I’d seen enough T.V. to know I needed a lawyer. I also didn’t know how hard it would be to find someone willing to take my case in liberal California. didn’t even know what a liberal was until they started slamming doors in my face!Finally, someone told me to call Harmeet Dhillon at the Center for American Liberty. | | And the first time we spoke, I felt something I hadn’t felt in a long time -- hope.Because Harmeet is a fighter like me. She didn’t tell me we’d never win against the giant medical industry.She didn’t tell me the transgender issue was too sensitive to touch.She told me my fight mattered. | | | Not only because of what had happened to me -- but also because we could STOP it from happening to other children. And so together with Harmeet Dhillon’s non-profit -- the Center for American Liberty -- I’ve launched a case against the radical doctors and hospital who preyed on me......and who continue to prey on children -- maybe even in your family.As I’ve mentioned several times -- I’m 18-years-old.On my own, I’d never have the money to pay for a giant court case like this. That’s one of the ways these radicals are taking over everything. They know regular people like me don’t have the money to fight them in court.But that’s exactly why Harmeet started the Center for American Liberty. The Center for American Liberty brings together attorneys who want to fight for what’s right and matches them with people like me who would have had nowhere else to turn.Right now, the Center for American Liberty has landmark cases going like: Brach v. Newsom \-- to stop California from shutting down private and religious schools... Ngo v. Roce City Antifa \-- to get justice for Andy Ngo after he was beaten by Antifa thugs and liberal politicians did NOTHING... O’Handley v. Padilla \-- to stop Big Government from using Big Tech to silence people they disagree with... And now my case... Chloe Cole v. Kaiser Permanente. The Center for American Liberty is a nonprofit. They have big cases but that doesn’t mean they have the big money that their opponents have. There are big forces at work who want to get rich no matter who they hurt.Alone we’re no match for them. , we can beat these monsters who are using scared, confused and lonely children to make a buck. For exposing them, I’ve been called a “liar.” I’ve even been told de-transitioners like me don’t exist. But when we beat them in court and stop them from hurting any more children with their lies and mutilations,I will be proud to face them and say:“You may have taken away my childhood, and forever changed my future -- but I exist. I exist.” Thank you for reading this letter from a complete stranger. I hope I can call you a friend now. And thank you for whatever help you can send to the Center for American Liberty. every bit moves us closer to stopping these monsters. | | Thank you,Chloe Cole | | | P.S. This is a photo of me now. It’s been a long, painful road but I’m finding happiness and purpose as I fight to make sure what happened to me NEVER happens to another child. Thank you so much for your help. --Chloe | | | | The Center for American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free speech and anti-civil liberties trends. © The Center for American Liberty | PO Box 2510, Leesburg, VA 20177 | American Action News 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Chloe Cole
subject: I'm a cautionary tale...
body:
There are lots of powerful people who don’t want my story to get out

| |
---
| |
# FROM THE DESK OF CHLOE COLE
---
|
---
Dear Friend,My name is Chloe.
---
| | You don’t know me but I’m hoping you saw me on Fox News talking to Tucker Carlson.There are lots of powerful people who don’t want my story to get out, so I’m so grateful that Mr. Carlson had me on as a guest.
---
| [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z6mjoicmliidli9723ensj4ndocpa263n2200908_rp22sh2s8i66o74ctgm1p31cdh2bs)
---
| | I guess I’m what you’d call a “cautionary tale.”You see, I’m one of those girls who was deceived by the transgender movement. I’m 18 years old now but here is a picture of what I looked like before the transgender movement got me. And one from after -- when they had turned me into a “boy.”
---
| | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z69ioge4ng8i9gdsjgai2km40sv3dle4vvkcr64o_rp22sh2s8i66o74ctgm1p31cdh2bs)
---
** _Before transitioning_**
---
| [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zqtkgs84dqonm05unqls0tjaq0su4tbt091mcq8o_rp22sh2s8i66o74ctgm1p31cdh2bs)
---
**_After transitioning_**
---
| | [**Even though we don’t know each other, I’m writing you today hoping you’ll help me stop the** **horror of what happened to me, from happening to other children and their parents.**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zbtn3micsspei08pprsbp9mm0jfntu3h1kc96sko_rp22sh2s8i66o74ctgm1p31cdh2bs) It all started when I was 11 years old and growing up in Northern California. I was growing embarrassed and confused once my body started changing.I was also shy and didn’t socialize easily – and I didn’t feel comfortable talking about any of this with my parents.But I found ‘friends’ on the internet who told me if I was uncomfortable with my body, I was probably a boy trapped in the wrong body.And the more I agreed with them, the more they celebrated me.I was getting the message loud and clear: if I was a girl who became a boy, I’d be valued and loved even more.Before long I was telling my parents I was transgender.They had no idea what to do. My poor parents were scared and desperate and took me to “experts” who convinced them that if they failed to act quickly, I would surely commit suicide.**The gender clinic gave my parents an ultimatum: “Would you rather have a dead daughter or a living son?”** Given those choices, my parents would have signed anything the doctors put in front of them if it meant “saving” me. When they signed those forms, it wasn’t informed parental consent. It was a desperate decision made under extreme duress.And so, at age 13, I was fast-tracked for medical transition from a girl into a boy. [**Will you help me fight so these radical doctors and hospitals can’t prey on another scared, confused, lonely child like they did me?**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z8ccjm40vge6pr314nn55pjm1u6s0rk3rr6bdsig_rp22sh2s8i66o74ctgm1p31cdh2bs) The doctors started giving me weekly testosterone injections...they injected me with an experimental drug used to chemically castrate sex offenders......and finally, they removed my breasts in a radical double mastectomy.I was fifteen years old.And of course, none of this made me any happier or less confused.If you’re like most people I tell my story to... right about now you’re probably thinking, “HOW did it ever get this far?” And the answer is simple.The “experts” lied to my parents -- and to me -- every step of the way.They claimed I would never get “better” unless I medically transitioned – when the truth is that the vast majority of children who think they’re transgender grow out of it with absolutely no chemical or surgical intervention. They claimed their consent forms covered all the risks of pumping testosterone and puberty blockers into my 13-year-old body......while their forms left out dozens and dozens of known risks.They never told us that there isn’t one single scientific study on the effects these treatments have on young children. And they never, ever, were straight with me about what it would mean to let them remove my breasts.When I woke up from that surgery, I was shocked at how mangled my body was. And now years after the surgery, I still wear bandages every day to cover the oozing, unhealed scars.At age 18, I’m just beginning to understand what it will mean to never nurse my child -- if I’ll ever be able to have children at all. For the rest of my life, my voice will sound like a man’s, my body will look like a boy’s, and who knows what cancers, cardiac problems, bone problems, and more are lurking around the corner.And my parents feel like they’ve failed me on every level imaginable.I can’t go back. I can’t change what happened. But I can change what happens to the THOUSANDS of kids just like me who are falling prey to the predatory transgender movement and unscrupulous abusive medical “experts.” [**And YOU can help me.**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2znlqhcaqvuj2nn55s3ollonhr1qhst1b0j0k1tsg_rp22sh2s8i66o74ctgm1p31cdh2bs) More and more children are mutilated and abused every day.**There’s even a doctor who advertises her mutilation surgeries on TikTok to draw young kids in.** And it won’t stop until someone fights back.When I turned 18, I decided that someone would be me. I had no idea how I would do it, but I’d seen enough T.V. to know I needed a lawyer. I also didn’t know how hard it would be to find someone willing to take my case in liberal California. didn’t even know what a liberal was until they started slamming doors in my face!Finally, someone told me to call Harmeet Dhillon at the Center for American Liberty.
---
| | And the first time we spoke, I felt something I hadn’t felt in a long time -- hope.Because Harmeet is a fighter like me. She didn’t tell me we’d never win against the giant medical industry.She didn’t tell me the transgender issue was too sensitive to touch.She told me my fight mattered.
---
| [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zs96cr1janv003us0cptl1h919b5s5ttne1mprtg_rp22sh2s8i66o74ctgm1p31cdh2bs)
---
| | Not only because of what had happened to me -- but also because we could STOP it from happening to other children. And so together with Harmeet Dhillon’s non-profit -- the Center for American Liberty -- I’ve launched a case against the radical doctors and hospital who preyed on me......and who continue to prey on children -- maybe even in your family.As I’ve mentioned several times -- I’m 18-years-old.On my own, I’d never have the money to pay for a giant court case like this. That’s one of the ways these radicals are taking over everything. They know regular people like me don’t have the money to fight them in court.But that’s exactly why Harmeet started the Center for American Liberty. The Center for American Liberty brings together attorneys who want to fight for what’s right and matches them with people like me who would have had nowhere else to turn.Right now, the Center for American Liberty has landmark cases going like:
---
* _Brach v. Newsom_ \-- to stop California from shutting down private and religious schools...
* _Ngo v. Roce City Antifa_ \-- to get justice for Andy Ngo after he was beaten by Antifa thugs and liberal politicians did NOTHING...
* _O’Handley v. Padilla_ \-- to stop Big Government from using Big Tech to silence people they disagree with...
* And now my case... _Chloe Cole v. Kaiser Permanente_.

---
The Center for American Liberty is a nonprofit. They have big cases but that doesn’t mean they have the big money that their opponents have.[**That’s why I hope you’ll consider helping us by rushing back a small tax-deductible donation of $25 or more.**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zjs2g51egh2vl95lmcds49nq7p8actkp9ajfn6tg_rp22sh2s8i66o74ctgm1p31cdh2bs) There are big forces at work who want to get rich no matter who they hurt.Alone we’re no match for them. [**But if everyone I’m writing to can contribute just $25, or if you’re able, maybe more -- $35, $50, $75, $100, $200, or even $500**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zu3i9lp2vlnkqc33p55p8a65c9o5vh329829uvr0_rp22sh2s8i66o74ctgm1p31cdh2bs), we can beat these monsters who are using scared, confused and lonely children to make a buck. For exposing them, I’ve been called a “liar.” I’ve even been told de-transitioners like me don’t exist. But when we beat them in court and stop them from hurting any more children with their lies and mutilations,I will be proud to face them and say:**_“You may have taken away my childhood, and forever changed my future -- but I exist. I exist.”_** Thank you for reading this letter from a complete stranger. I hope I can call you a friend now. And thank you for whatever help you can send to the Center for American Liberty. **[Whether it’s $25, $35, $50, $75, $100, $200, or even $500 or more...](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z2ov49jck1bahp9s0lt3v40il563abg56ahhos40_rp22sh2s8i66o74ctgm1p31cdh2bs)** every bit moves us closer to stopping these monsters.
---
| | Thank you,Chloe Cole
---
| | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zml1vr6rghtl6000obp7c30pibsecbonb5t5hpio_rp22sh2s8i66o74ctgm1p31cdh2bs)
---
| P.S. This is a photo of me now. It’s been a long, painful road but I’m finding happiness and purpose as I fight to make sure what happened to me NEVER happens to another child. **[Please help me with your tax-deductible gift of $25 or more.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zj5vh8fvh9hjrluupp2p43cd4i5i4bvsqbuc8020_rp22sh2s8i66o74ctgm1p31cdh2bs) **Thank you so much for your help. --Chloe
---
| | [**DONATE**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zhuna2aub7m16vpl0gihmulqsgercd9klkasrbm0_rp22sh2s8i66o74ctgm1p31cdh2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z69nov75vlri57nejbfad91l7r83r8lbe6b2pho0_rp22sh2s8i66o74ctgm1p31cdh2bs)
---
The Center for American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free speech and anti-civil liberties trends.
---

---
PO Box 2510, Leesburg, VA 20177
---
[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/prefs/9z2zqrfv9ugimgi7377limg8gdo9t2ung042fp0gjlo)
---
|
---

Padilla \-- to stop Big Government from using Big Tech to silence people they disagree with... And now my case... Chloe Cole v. Kaiser Permanente. The Center for American Liberty is a nonprofit. They have big cases but that doesn’t mean they have the big money that their opponents have. There are big forces at work who want to get rich no matter who they hurt.Alone we’re no match for them. , we can beat these monsters who are using scared, confused and lonely children to make a buck. For exposing them, I’ve been called a “liar.” I’ve even been told de-transitioners like me don’t exist. But when we beat them in court and stop them from hurting any more children with their lies and mutilations,I will be proud to face them and say:“You may have taken away my childhood, and forever changed my future -- but I exist. I exist.” Thank you for reading this letter from a complete stranger. I hope I can call you a friend now. And thank you for whatever help you can send to the Center for American Liberty. every bit moves us closer to stopping these monsters. | | Thank you,Chloe Cole | | | P.S. This is a photo of me now. It’s been a long, painful road but I’m finding happiness and purpose as I fight to make sure what happened to me NEVER happens to another child. Thank you so much for your help. --Chloe | | | | The Center for American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free speech and anti-civil liberties trends. © The Center for American Liberty | PO Box 2510, Leesburg, VA 20177 | American Briefing 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: Here’s how I’d fix things in Washington
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
It’s time to stop complaining and actually fix the problem without apology.

| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zpejm65lr1ie3vfu1lfrg1s95gknga5vntge5mfo_rp22sh2s8i66o74ctgm9o32c3h2bs)
Fellow American -

Over the course of this election, I am laying my vision for an American national revival.

Here’s one promise for you: I will end the weaponization of police power in America.

Time to stop complaining and actually *fix* the problem without apology.
1. Shut down + replace the FBI
2. Shut down + replace the IRS
3. Pardon all federal defendants prosecuted based on political motives. This includes Douglass Mackey & nonviolent January 6 defendants denied due process
4. Hold Congress accountable for taxpayer $$ used as hush money for sexual harassment claims
5. Publish the Jeffrey Epstein client list: the police state can’t be weaponized to protect a select few.

Fellow American, if you agree, and want these policies debated on the main stage of the Republican Presidential Primary, then I need your help. **[Chip in $1 to build this movement toward our American revival.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zddvago46opvm2aj7ik4jkq7in1navpf5qitrnkg_rp22sh2s8i66o74ctgm9o32c3h2bs)**

Thanks,

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zppe0r2722h07ujeqsetp17ht847g621k7kjfs0o_rp22sh2s8i66o74ctgm9o32c3h2bs)
Vivek Ramaswamy

| [** DONATE TODAY -> **](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z9rd5a2revt66mnau2qctsffini9ha84qpnj2dh8_rp22sh2s8i66o74ctgm9o32c3h2bs)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1bii68fs4rql4ak3b2aqhs2fl65nduph60s3lk8_rp22sh2s8i66o74ctgm9o32c3h2bs)

---

| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zcj2g2d0p1r9nnoc07gvpagkni15siuoqnlncb18_rp22sh2s8i66o74ctgm9o32c3h2bs)| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z117cqe2q597eqpsfodrb46m0i6uqt6lhke3tmro_rp22sh2s8i66o74ctgm9o32c3h2bs)| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zpj6rb0icrqnls21anq7cicjqhhcrjofbcae90mg_rp22sh2s8i66o74ctgm9o32c3h2bs)
---|---|---

| Paid for by Vivek 2024

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: These two Black lawmakers risked everything. They're getting death threats. They'll be targets of nutball right wingers for the rest of their lives. Let's send a powerful message to the Tennessee 3 and all Democrats that we're with you in the fight!
body:
The Justins are back in the statehouse!
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T36d0d81b-fac7-44ab-b7fa-da5111c31b22/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **UPDATE:_ Justin Pearson, the other Justin/member of the Tennessee 3 besides Justin Jones expelled by racist, authoritarian, corrupt Republicans in the Tennessee state legislature has also now been reinstated!_** [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tae602d41-d907-49cd-bc15-223f84221f3f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _The Republicans hoped to shut up a majority of us sick of their ridiculous, cruel and failed policies, but instead they inspired millions and made the incredibly talented Justins famous, something they'll come to regret. All for nothing._ **_These young Black lawmakers risked everything. They're getting death threats. They'll be targets of nutball right wingers for the rest of their lives. __Let's _****_send a powerful message to the Tennessee 3 and all Democrats that we're with you in the fight!_** [**_Will you join us in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to these fighters to continue to stand up to authoritarianism?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7ae8e64f-481e-41be-a1cf-94bc8504fe4c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thank you for fighting for democracy and equality for us all._ Cliff
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8face647-3ec0-4276-9dea-70c26cf43fe8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | |
---

---|---
| | |
---
| | Follow Us | [](https://twitter.com/intent/follow?screen_name=cliffschecter)| [](https://linkedin.com/in/cliffschecter-0873a448/)
---|---
| **Blue Amp Strategies**
1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/tennesseereinstatement-update3-n?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T64c5f1fa-b299-4cd9-948c-dfc26966de91/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| | [Unsubscribe](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/manage-your-subscription?eId=79222045-72cd-4830-aaf6-18774295ef98&eType=EmailBlastContent&sId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) or [Manage Your Preferences](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/manage-your-subscription?eId=79222045-72cd-4830-aaf6-18774295ef98&eType=EmailBlastContent&sId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Hakeem Jeffries
subject: stunning rebuke
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeffries for Congress
body:
