name: =?utf-8?Q?Catherine=20Engelbrecht=20|=20True=20the=20Vote?=
subject: A Change in the Spring Breeze, the Beginning of the End
body:
Konnech v. True the Vote Discovery Starts Now | | | | | |
---
| | **”We hope to take advantage of the spring breeze of political reform and provide you with election consulting services and election management in line with China's national conditions based on our democratic election activities with Chinese characteristics.”**
_[Translation from Yulian Network (Konnech, Ltd.) website,](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=89196e82bc&e=ad8cba7e98)__founded by Yu Jianwei (于建伟), American name Eugene Yu_
---
The Konnech v. True the Vote lawsuit is heading toward discovery. Konnech has accused us of defaming them, hacking their servers, and pursuing them out of racist and xenophobic intent. None of this is true.
Today we bring you a complete and accurate account of how we discovered Konnech, a company that provides elections systems software to many of the largest counties in our country; its incontrovertible creation of open-door systems that send massive amounts of confidential election data and information to China; and its leadership’s work with, and loyalty to, the Chinese Communist Party.
At the bottom of this email is an [**Open.Ink**](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=0454bb9f55&e=ad8cba7e98) graphic. Click the graphic to review the following source materials:
* original, unpublished video from The Pit, the infamous event where Gregg Phillips and I, for the first time, publicly discussed Konnech in a presentation called _“The Tiger Project: A Betrayal in Three Acts”_

* the complete set of data and documents given to Pit attendees

* a list of top stories published as a direct result of information shared at The Pit

* highlights of legal filings in Konnech’s many cases

* and finally, a video glimpse of how much information we have and how powerful it is

We owe, America owes, a massive debt of gratitude to all the researchers who continued to dig, develop, and piece together this chilling story. Thank you to every one.
There is much more to be revealed. We look forward to our day in court.
Lastly,[**if you can help with financial support, please do**](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=6312278aae&e=ad8cba7e98). Everyone from Marc Elias and Stacey Abrams to Konnech is using lawfare to break us. You are giving oxygen to our efforts. We will not quit. [**Please help if you can.**](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=a3c0ffb733&e=ad8cba7e98)
God bless America.
Ever onward -
**A NOTE ABOUT OPEN.INK :**
Almost a year ago, we started talking about **“Pulling the Ripcord,”** posting research and video from all True the Vote has collected, including material used in the movie ‘2000 Mules’.
The challenge was where to host it all without fear of being hacked, canceled, censored, or shadow-banned. We needed a user-friendly platform for everyone from novices to expert researchers; that was secure; could scale quickly; was not cluttered by ads; and was unwaveringly reliable.
Such a site didn’t exist. So, in early 2022, a talented team started building one.
Soon enough, the name “Open.Ink” leaked out and led to relentless attacks from global operators. “Pulling the Ripcord” turned into “The Quest to One Day Pull the Ripcord”. Well, that day is finally here. Open.Ink is ready. We will post our other research and video soon, but decided to start with releasing Konnech information because time is of the essence.
Clicking the graphic below will take you to Open.Ink and give you a chance to look around. To fully experience the site, you’ll want to sign up, or better yet, become a member. Moving forward, Open.Ink will be the repository for all True the Vote research findings - no more disjointed Dropbox folders and links that get buried and lost along the way. We and many other researchers and organizations are centralizing our public-facing data with Open.Ink - starting now.
Thank you for being so patient while we worked behind the scenes. We’re all in this together. And now, **The Konnech Special Collection** at Open.Ink.
[](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=d39845bc58&e=ad8cba7e98)
[](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=4928486932&e=ad8cba7e98)
| | | | |
---
_Copyright © 2023 True the Vote, All rights reserved._
You are receiving this email because you opted in for updates via the True the Vote website.

**Our mailing address is:**
True the VotePO Box 3109# 19128Houston, TX 77253-3109
[Add us to your address book](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/vcard?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=10c8087c36)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/profile?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=10c8087c36&e=ad8cba7e98&c=c22187394d) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=10c8087c36&e=ad8cba7e98&c=c22187394d).
|
---

Friend, Justice Sotomayor was just as devastated as we were when the Supreme Court's far-right majority overturned Roe v. Wade.

But she's not giving up on the fight for reproductive rights, and neither are we. **That's why we've created this critical petition to show we're standing with Justice Sotomayor in the fight for our reproductive rights. **
Attacks on reproductive rights are happening all across the country and have only increased since the radical conservatives on the Supreme Court struck down Roe v. Wade. **Let's be clear: Overturning Roe wasn't the end. MAGA radicals won't stop until reproductive freedom in America is entirely erased.**
We can't allow our country to continue down this dangerous path. **Now more than ever, we need to speak out in support of reproductive freedom. It's our fundamental right.**

body:
| | |
---

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: Here’s how I’d fix things in Washington
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
It’s time to stop complaining and actually fix the problem without apology.

| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3aodk90bc70tr5c8lp4rvjajkn226lvhcj7ac1o_rp22sh2s8i66o74ctim0o72c3h2bs)
Fellow American -

Over the course of this election, I am laying my vision for an American national revival.

Here’s one promise for you: I will end the weaponization of police power in America.

Time to stop complaining and actually *fix* the problem without apology.
1. Shut down + replace the FBI
2. Shut down + replace the IRS
3. Pardon all federal defendants prosecuted based on political motives. This includes Douglass Mackey & nonviolent January 6 defendants denied due process
4. Hold Congress accountable for taxpayer $$ used as hush money for sexual harassment claims
5. Publish the Jeffrey Epstein client list: the police state can’t be weaponized to protect a select few.

Fellow American, if you agree, and want these policies debated on the main stage of the Republican Presidential Primary, then I need your help. **[Chip in $1 to build this movement toward our American revival.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmtfluq0qok8ah2adp5gmqbo9kneaa4eli00afqo_rp22sh2s8i66o74ctim0o72c3h2bs)**

Thanks,

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z95nj31dsfig3ikvn7m80uv30lhk8dv3dd94cdv8_rp22sh2s8i66o74ctim0o72c3h2bs)
Vivek Ramaswamy

| [** DONATE TODAY -> **](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0f9dq6a4rcgmrkebu8vt76ftr2e47p44ki3mkog_rp22sh2s8i66o74ctim0o72c3h2bs)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9jdlgaofck1krgmqn0c2h5l91mlt1lmbs7gqk9g_rp22sh2s8i66o74ctim0o72c3h2bs)

---

| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqm31chls8rk6off7hu79s6p6oh8kvd7flhvcja8_rp22sh2s8i66o74ctim0o72c3h2bs)| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z06lgm997cmdf7lhre052pokq4g09mii43tiu09o_rp22sh2s8i66o74ctim0o72c3h2bs)| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8v0469v715ink3qivt5c5lptshf0v8sbqnf2f0g_rp22sh2s8i66o74ctim0o72c3h2bs)
---|---|---

| Paid for by Vivek 2024
---

Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle.

name: Charles Booker
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
2022 was an incredible year for Democrats, Peter.

We held the Senate, minimized losses in the House, and made inroads in
places we didn’t expect. In Kentucky, we over performed 2020 margins in
over half of all counties.

And through the highs and lows, we built a movement together. We engaged
young people and shared hope for progress with millions. We built lasting
infrastructure for the progressive movement and created new voters engaged
in the Democratic process.

Despite our loss on Election Day, we can be proud of what we accomplished
together. And I am excited to see what’s next for this team.

But right now, I have to ask again for your help. In order to close out
the campaign and move on to the next chapter of our work together, we have
some campaign debt to take care of. [ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18931?t=1001&akid=3155%2E346206%2E7rOtzC ]If you’re able, could you make a
contribution today to help us?

Our campaign was uncompromising. When we were making spending decisions in
the final days, that meant we prioritized communicating with as many
Kentucky voters as possible. We ran a bold campaign and we made bold
decisions. And unfortunately for us, that means we have a bit of a hole in
our budget and hope you can help us.

Thank you for anything you can do. I’m looking forward to what’s next.

Charles

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20230417-3155-footer&t=1002&refcode2=3155_346206_7rOtzC&akid=3155%2E346206%2E7rOtzC

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=3155%2E346206%2E7rOtzC

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

name: Sean Spicer
subject: I’m parting ways with Newsmax. Here’s what I’m up to now:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
I’m teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise for the FIRST TIME THIS YEAR.

| |

---
| | | Hey - this is Sean Spicer:

With a heavy heart, I just announced I'm parting ways with Newsmax. My show reached millions and helped viewers see what's _really_ happening in our country. Something the Mainstream Media fails to do time and time again.

_**[But with that in the rearview mirror, I'm thrilled at what's coming next...](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zl0qbisfaji0hvdpovcs4vgf6oarit63589cjjmo_rp22sh2s8i66o74ctim4or2clh2bs "But with that in the rearview mirror, I’m thrilled at what’s coming next...")**_

---
| | | [READ MY FULL STATEMENT >>](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z49vd41027pv494fh0vpv9tg35tkclm6uti45s10_rp22sh2s8i66o74ctim4or2clh2bs "READ MY FULL STATEMENT")
---

The 2024 election will be the single most important one in the history of our country. Joe Biden and Democrats in Congress have set our country into a tailspin. It's an emergency situation and we're running dangerously short on time to change course.

We have our work cut out for us ahead of 2024:

- Fire Joe Biden and retake the presidency
- Expand our razor-thin Majority in the House
- Win back the Senate and send Chuck Schumer into retirement

**The Democrats aren 't going to give us an inch... so we have no choice but to 1) outwork, 2) outsmart, and - most importantly - 3) outraise them. **

Unfortunately, that last point is the most important. Why? Because no one works harder than strong Conservatives like you. And Republicans are WINNING on the issues - they can't outsmart us when we're the ones fighting for freedom, defending our country and flag, and resisting their radical woke agenda.

But Democrats have a MAJOR advantage in fundraising thanks to their armies of Hollywood megadonors and woke Liberals whipping out their credit cards whenever they flip on MSNBC.

_**[Look- if we want to win in 2024, it's going to take all of us standing up RIGHT NOW.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zoeq6sldgv3me293qpbu893bi49rdamted32afs0_rp22sh2s8i66o74ctim4or2clh2bs "Look – if we want to win in 2024, it’s going to take all of us standing up RIGHT NOW.")**_

That's why I'm teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise for the FIRST TIME THIS YEAR. We ran the numbers on what it'll take to outraise the Democrats and pull off an overwhelming victory.

We came to the conclusion that if every last one of you gave between $27 and $54, we would have the resources to MAX OUT all our voter contact budgets, GOTV operations, and volunteer recruitment efforts.

_In other words ... if everyone here steps up RIGHT NOW, the Democrats would suffer a defeat like nothing we've ever seen before._

**But that 's a big "if" - it requires 100% participation. **

This plan falls apart if too many folks sit out. We need everyone on board to pull this off.

So I'll cut to the chase.

_**[>From the bottom of my heart, would you be willing to make a meaningful contribution between $27 and $54? If we can pull this off, we'll make history.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zba4jvjsso8hn5ie8lfbfg1hev3spckf5gakt3ho_rp22sh2s8i66o74ctim4or2clh2bs "From the bottom of my heart, would you be willing to make a meaningful contribution between $27 and $54? If we can pull this off, we’ll make history.")**_

Are you in?

---
**[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zcegtsr233ccgkb9mivso4lop0jor9gfvo7ogbe8_rp22sh2s8i66o74ctim4or2clh2bs)[**YES >>**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ze49figg8jphc3ovrrufvmkgp4f3cvt47uo0i8q0_rp22sh2s8i66o74ctim4or2clh2bs)_[**NO >>**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zeul1kgp7q84kjcd17cjhjlibbdrb9f3472kpk58_rp22sh2s8i66o74ctim4or2clh2bs)**
---

More from me soon,
Sean Spicer

name: Sheriff Mark Lamb
subject: Washington needs a new Sheriff...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Lamb for Senate
body:

Our sliver of Arizona is home to more than 420,000 Americans spread out over 5,000+ square miles; the place we call home is a vast and arid sundrenched landscape that also happens to be on the frontlines of several conflicts. **Not only are we fighting a war on illegal narcotics, but we’re also simultaneously fighting an immigration battle.**

As the top law-enforcement officer in the area I’m responsible for the safety and wellbeing of every man, woman, and child who calls this place home. Unlike most of the career politicians in Washington, D.C., and in Phoenix, I know that in Pinal County, the buck stops with me - _**that’s why I take my job so seriously.**_

Like so many Americans, our family has experienced deep loss over the last couple of years. We lost our son and our one-year-old granddaughter eight days before Christmas. **There is simply no pain that compares to losing a child, let alone a grandbaby.** During my son’s life, he struggled with drug addiction; he even spent time in my jail for using fentanyl.

As a result of my personal loss and the tragedy I see play out every day as Sheriff, I am hyper-aware that families across Arizona and America have been adversely affected by rising crime and drug use in our communities.

**[That is why on Tuesday, April 11th, I announced my candidacy for the United States Senate to level up my fight for Arizona families and yours in our nation’s Capitol.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=9902d0b23453492586ce091232330e6d&_e=aPIf9ucLm8ITH1ay3Z1FxhxRUb7ZWA8JisEagtGJPq8X_4qCpiq2pgZIZHDvTDy_vvXBuGWishYR1BDOsPRpWVwMYYdP-FZ0ppdhBAJBi8Fawi2qGRBx4T_qp4J4C9ZolHG5CWvr_1bokJX8IYt28S-fZmk0KzokFAuGtkEFTtB_d6tx5YmugGKvCDBh0jk3MrCreecT3wUFe_EUn-LB1CWNPV2CGPn2AAAAMrgvEIEFs12qC6wDxhaloK6DK341yINW6WHCH0nalGRkcFMZD3tjMFkuDV3Zk57MwuYldcr1vAm5KZ2X2Ni0sDCZ9F9VqSLvHbRO2ldeWj0bjiaVBNm71gSIQrkv8na4nZAerJ9i1g-NM_jM0dZkvaN3ITnmzey7F5_NOvVdPjtESglzjQ%3D%3D)**

I can talk about personal responsibility all day long, but what’s the point if I’m not willing to **step up and speak out** against the failure of career politicians in Washington who are too politically correct to protect us?

Not only did I have to witness my son’s incarceration in one of my jails, but I have personally **carried dead bodies from our communities’ ditches, rescued children from sex trafficking rings, and arrested gang members and drug dealers.**

Each day that I get up and put my Sheriff’s badge on, I remind myself that I’m no better than any man or woman who works for me; I have been - _and continue to be_ - on the front lines of the opioid epidemic and the border fight.

To find out more about my candidacy, **[sign up for our campaign emails here.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=9902d0b23453492586ce091232330e6d&_e=aPIf9ucLm8ITH1ay3Z1FxhxRUb7ZWA8JisEagtGJPq8X_4qCpiq2pgZIZHDvTDy_vvXBuGWishYR1BDOsPRpWVwMYYdP-FZ0ppdhBAJBi8Fawi2qGRBx4T_qp4J4C9ZolHG5CWvr_1bokJX8IYt28S-fZmk0KzokFAuGtkEFTtB_d6tx5YmugGKvCDBh0jk3MrCreecT3wUFe_EUn-LB1CWNPV2CGPn2AAAAMrgvEIEFs12qC6wDxhaloK6DK341cilEidvYwm4uO8_h524zPnxW8P_gkN4jOTyLIRBHU3rzQXZ98vkIgh-ni6kIWCXV-a3qY4xCP-sfkl4itU0FORCE0K0LTiIwkhMaf7K3vdBB_wD7U1i8_NsYoH9VQCmx5rhPOMf94ksXY8Me2w3rUw%3D%3D)**

In my capacity as the Sheriff of Arizona’s third most populous county, I demand excellence from myself and everyone under my command. It’s our DUTY to provide protection to the people we serve, along with an unwavering commitment to the communities under our jurisdiction.

I may currently have a big job title, **but I have even more responsibility.**

**When cartel violence spills over the border into our communities, my team is responsible for holding the thugs perpetrating the crimes in our communities accountable.**

**And when domestic violence allegations are made, my team is responsible for bringing justice to the victims.**

I was raised with a deep sense of personal responsibility that has remained with me throughout my life. Today in the United States of America, it seems to me that personal responsibility has come to be seen by many as a liability rather than an asset.

**[I’ll stand up to the woke left and the weak political establishment in Washington.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=9902d0b23453492586ce091232330e6d&_e=aPIf9ucLm8ITH1ay3Z1FxhxRUb7ZWA8JisEagtGJPq8X_4qCpiq2pgZIZHDvTDy_vvXBuGWishYR1BDOsPRpWVwMYYdP-FZ0ppdhBAJBi8Fawi2qGRBx4T_qp4J4C9ZolHG5CWvr_1bokJX8IYt28S-fZmk0KzokFAuGtkEFTtB_d6tx5YmugGKvCDBh0jk3MrCreecT3wUFe_EUn-LB1CWNPV2CGPn2AAAAMrgvEIEFs12qC6wDxhaloK6DK341QF8fOZ4hmGYrS-eZI3Tc40z6cGymuaxc4zuVByPhkXgqjhDP4vaqpbCT3e74vngxIn5eBZQbQxK0P2bQnq-yi5ZaEonhtqDjLAnHJObzP4qq2uVaqiNM4nIVzVQ6dvn_08T62J6C6LTcappMdbpm2w%3D%3D) **I’ll work 24/7 to do everything in my purview to secure the southern border and provide our law enforcement officers with the resources they need to succeed as our first responders.

As sheriff, I understand that the freedoms granted to us by the Constitution to make choices also mean the freedom to make bad choices. **That’s where personal responsibility is important.** There are times when I will have to intervene and voice objections to others in law enforcement who, despite their good intentions to control a situation or public behavior, are attempting to violate the Constitution and an individual’s rights.

Benjamin Franklin famously said, _**“Those who would give up essential liberty to purchase a little temporary safety deserve neither liberty nor safety.”**_

Pinal County, Arizona voters elected me to be their top enforcement official because they know that **[I’m tougher than a $2 dollar steak.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=9902d0b23453492586ce091232330e6d&_e=aPIf9ucLm8ITH1ay3Z1FxhxRUb7ZWA8JisEagtGJPq8X_4qCpiq2pgZIZHDvTDy_vvXBuGWishYR1BDOsPRpWVwMYYdP-FZ0ppdhBAJBi8Fawi2qGRBx4T_qp4J4C9ZolHG5CWvr_1bokJX8IYt28S-fZmk0KzokFAuGtkEFTtB_d6tx5YmugGKvCDBh0jk3MrCreecT3wUFe_EUn-LB1CWNPV2CGPn2AAAAMrgvEIEFs12qC6wDxhaloK6DK341qi_KCUWo751Apf44zjocAcVJtUwPCSLLn9NU877I47AY6DKak43YoMOw899oPLpSpDhjfTqPUo0k8VdaCJpa2kY0xgs2D2PkmveFg8elLQZYF1jCvOY26iINAOnbi5Cw0tvB0iidYQV38rBTlDJKwg%3D%3D)** Right now, Washington desperately needs someone who isn’t afraid to tell it how it is or to get their hands dirty. I feel strongly that the Constitution must be protected**,a fight I will proudly continue as your next Senator in Washington.**

The voters who gave me the use of the sheriff’s badge that I wear on my lapel know that the only interest I have in elected office is their safety. _**For me, my community and family are everything.**_

Thank you,

**Meet Sheriff Lamb:** | GOD. FAMILY. FREEDOM.

Sheriff Mark Lamb is a husband, father, grandfather, and God-fearing patriot. From Hawaii to Manila, Arizona, Mark Lamb's rich experirences inspired his life of service. As the 24th Sheriff of Pinal County, Arizona, he drives a powerful agenda to ensure community safety and prosperity.

Sheriff Lamb trained with the Maricopa County Sheriff's Office Deputy Academy and was named Valedictorian of his class. He was hired by the Salt River Pima-Maricopa Indian Community, where he excelled as a police officer and was named Rookie of the Year. The following year, he received the Officer of the Year award. He was later promoted as a Detective to the Gang Enforcement Unit and in his first year was named Detective of the Year.

It’s our DUTY to provide protection to the people we serve, along with an unwavering commitment to the communities under our jurisdiction. I may currently have a big job title, but I have even more responsibility. When cartel violence spills over the border into our communities, my team is responsible for holding the thugs perpetrating the crimes in our communities accountable. And when domestic violence allegations are made, my team is responsible for bringing justice to the victims. I was raised with a deep sense of personal responsibility that has remained with me throughout my life. Today in the United States of America, it seems to me that personal responsibility has come to be seen by many as a liability rather than an asset. I’ll work 24/7 to do everything in my purview to secure the southern border and provide our law enforcement officers with the resources they need to succeed as our first responders. As sheriff, I understand that the freedoms granted to us by the Constitution to make choices also mean the freedom to make bad choices. That’s where personal responsibility is important. There are times when I will have to intervene and voice objections to others in law enforcement who, despite their good intentions to control a situation or public behavior, are attempting to violate the Constitution and an individual’s rights. Benjamin Franklin famously said, “Those who would give up essential liberty to purchase a little temporary safety deserve neither liberty nor safety.” Pinal County, Arizona voters elected me to be their top enforcement official because they know that Right now, Washington desperately needs someone who isn’t afraid to tell it how it is or to get their hands dirty. I feel strongly that the Constitution must be protected,a fight I will proudly continue as your next Senator in Washington. The voters who gave me the use of the sheriff’s badge that I wear on my lapel know that the only interest I have in elected office is their safety. For me, my community and family are everything. Thank you, Sheriff Mark Lamb Republican for U.S. Senate Follow Sheriff Lamb On Social Media Meet Sheriff Lamb: | GOD. FAMILY. FREEDOM. Sheriff Mark Lamb is a husband, father, grandfather, and God-fearing patriot. From Hawaii to Manila, Arizona, Mark Lamb's rich experirences inspired his life of service. As the 24th Sheriff of Pinal County, Arizona, he drives a powerful agenda to ensure community safety and prosperity. Sheriff Lamb trained with the Maricopa County Sheriff's Office Deputy Academy and was named Valedictorian of his class. He was hired by the Salt River Pima-Maricopa Indian Community, where he excelled as a police officer and was named Rookie of the Year. The following year, he received the Officer of the Year award. He was later promoted as a Detective to the Gang Enforcement Unit and in his first year was named Detective of the Year. | Paid for by Mark Lamb for Senate

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: Without Apology
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
It’s time to stop complaining and actually fix the problem without apology.

| [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2ze64qf8snfrnfpuvdmgu8jml5h3cjho1sgir7qao_rp22sh2s8i66o74ctim4or2clh2bs)
Fellow American -

Over the course of this election, I am laying my vision for an American national revival.

Here’s one promise for you: I will end the weaponization of police power in America.

Time to stop complaining and actually *fix* the problem without apology.
1. Shut down + replace the FBI
2. Shut down + replace the IRS
3. Pardon all federal defendants prosecuted based on political motives. This includes Douglass Mackey & nonviolent January 6 defendants denied due process
4. Hold Congress accountable for taxpayer $$ used as hush money for sexual harassment claims
5. Publish the Jeffrey Epstein client list: the police state can’t be weaponized to protect a select few.

Fellow American, if you agree, and want these policies debated on the main stage of the Republican Presidential Primary, then I need your help. **[Chip in $1 to build this movement toward our American revival.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z2r1mrbio2nk9ml5p4vttrp2rktpgfs8bn3b69ig_rp22sh2s8i66o74ctim4or2clh2bs)**

Thanks,

[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zaaciv7hcgjq52uhu2bd15totgrmd8mbuetnb5i8_rp22sh2s8i66o74ctim4or2clh2bs)
Vivek Ramaswamy

| [** DONATE TODAY -> **](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zip4fi5hh9cd485nivr3be9r74l9iq0mjaosclio_rp22sh2s8i66o74ctim4or2clh2bs)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zre8nc8p41j99t6qvd4j0cind2ksmatfnn757550_rp22sh2s8i66o74ctim4or2clh2bs)

---

| [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zdd0iic1u6ees3dri58eaf2d0dcs7f57ucj6fmk8_rp22sh2s8i66o74ctim4or2clh2bs)| [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zjhr728o5jt4i6be2gkurof7iba24u3tckaffg0o_rp22sh2s8i66o74ctim4or2clh2bs)| [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z0h1mbpe87teo6hhnk9n9ksqcs50fvj4jpf8r6v8_rp22sh2s8i66o74ctim4or2clh2bs)
---|---|---

name: Your America
subject: Don’t let this classic disappear forever
body:
Even if you haven’t read the book, you know the name.

| This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c16409%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=cIyMbHgzNXve1dgPWz1cxg&sysid=1)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, You may be shocked to learn that thousands of public schools have recently banned a classic American story. Even if you haven’t read the book, you know the name. It’s _The Adventures of Huckleberry Finn_ by Mark Twain. **Unfortunately, political correctness has taken this literary classic out of the hands of far too many young Americans.** But here at Hillsdale College, we’re working to safeguard the legacy of this treasured classic, along with the legacy of the man regarded by many as **America’s greatest author.**
---
| | [**That is why I want to offer you a special DVD box set of our fascinating and important online course, “****Mark Twain: **_**Tom Sawyer**_**, **_**Huckleberry Finn**_**, and Selected Short Stories****.** ”](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c16400%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=MPwQA%2fElYHL0Yt5pSWnsWA&sysid=1) Twain’s realist fiction reveals timeless truths about human nature. And while American life has certainly changed since the 1800s, human nature has not. So these literary works are as relevant and as important as ever. Now, we have created a special DVD version of our course that includes all nine lectures. And today, [**I’d like to send you this DVD box set as our way of thanking you for supporting our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty with a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c16401%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=yRejVQUJ%2bVdVLXBrZg3rkg&sysid=1).
---
| [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c16402%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=pkchjSHlGpEgI%2bVe7DgyJA&sysid=1)
---
| | Only a limited number of these DVD sets are available, so I hope you’ll take this opportunity to add it to your personal library or give it as a gift--before they’re gone (or removed from your local library!). You can use this secure link to get your copy of **“Mark Twain: **_**Tom Sawyer, Huckleberry Finn**_**, and Selected Short Stories”** on DVD: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/support-hillsdales-online-courses-mark-twain**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c16403%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=5EXaU5RaKaX1Tr7waVigBA&sysid=1) Warm regards, Bill Gray, ’01 Vice President National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College P.S. Another great author, Ernest Hemingway, once said, “All modern American literature comes from one book by Mark Twain called _Huckleberry Finn._ ” Don’t let this classic disappear forever. Get your DVD box set of **“Mark Twain: **_**Tom Sawyer**_**, **_**Huckleberry Finn**_**, and Selected Short Stories” **right now when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more at this secure link: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/support-hillsdales-online-courses-mark-twain****.**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c16404%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=KMCsX8V26uKjRDDqPOgOcw&sysid=1)
---

Your America News

name: Karen Greenhalgh
subject: Barricaded, Berated, and Biased: Shame on them!
body:
| | |
---
Friend, Last week Riley Gaines, the rightful NCAA All American Champion female swimmer, was invited to speak at San Francisco State University. Instead of her presentation, she was relentlessly pursued by ‘open minded’ protestors who forced her into a room and assaulted her.
---
[| | |
---|---|---](http://sendpatriot.campstrategic.com/go/1/23a9f17af7861f4f16f79d307c796b93/37923/be356e2a5224dd01/cda1b7a2ee65c759c3d6b838967d376c/37923 "Swimmer Riley Gaines 'ambushed,' 'physically hit'")
| | It’s shameful! Assaulted and Barricaded because you have a political disagreement? The left will stop at nothing to silence conservatives. I was proud to stand with Riley this year to help protect women’s sports. Riley spoke on behalf of my bill to protect our girls and young women from being forced to compete against biological males. Riley shared her traumatic experience as I introduced **[HB1387, Fairness in Women’s Sports.](http://sendpatriot.campstrategic.com/go/1/23a9f17af7861f4f16f79d307c796b93/37923/be356e2a5224dd01/09b2a78ccafa4d0dc3d6b838967d376c/37923) **
---
[| | |
---|---|---](http://sendpatriot.campstrategic.com/go/1/23a9f17af7861f4f16f79d307c796b93/37923/be356e2a5224dd01/11f37c605493d8e4c3d6b838967d376c/37923 "Delegate Karen Greenhalgh with Riley Gaines")
Our girls deserve better than to be shamed by the woke mob. This is common sense, women and men are different and girls deserve to train and achieve on their own merits. It’s science: women and men are not the same! I was proud to support Riley, proud to stand up for our girls and young women by keeping girls and boys sports in Virginia separate. I will be bringing the bill back in 2024; I will continue to speak up for our women and girls. We know the left will stop at nothing to prevent my re-election! Can you help ensure I get re-elected so I can stand up for common sense in the General Assembly?
---

name: Andy Roth from State Freedom Caucus Network
subject: Red States Have The Most Liberal Republicans
body:
Freedom Caucuses will fight to change that.
| |
---|---|---
| | | [Open in app](https://open.substack.com/pub/sfcn/p/red-states-have-the-most-liberal?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store) or [online](https://substack..gXaoC1yY15ExXsvYgPjQ309dDfBl5ZQPdsxF5ybgXMo?)
---
[](https://substack..gXaoC1yY15ExXsvYgPjQ309dDfBl5ZQPdsxF5ybgXMo?)
---
# [Red States Have The Most Liberal Republicans](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1424602&post_id=115389036&utm_source=post-email-title&isFreemail=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTE1Mzg5MDM2LCJpYXQiOjE2ODE3NDA4NDEsImV4cCI6MTY4NDMzMjg0MSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE0MjQ2MDIiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.uFPhm9clkRxrxo7k8JTuew2Z6b1EG5CRNQ1usi89g-M)
### Freedom Caucuses will fight to change that.
| | [Andy Roth](https://substack.com/redirect/fa409edc-ee7e-4926-8a95-7f3510824515?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
| Apr 17
---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/fa409edc-ee7e-4926-8a95-7f3510824515?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack..76Rtb_pCjeWRDX2ltm3rxHDZNvFgZZ0yws97l_usPUM?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---

Friends,
Last week, The Daily Wire published a series of stories about our work.
You can read them [here](https://substack.com/redirect/3038154f-9dd4-4150-99f1-ed6f894fc8ea?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), [here](https://substack.com/redirect/a32be737-c84d-4b09-8381-82af66c9b5b4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and [here](https://substack.com/redirect/84aa2ade-bcbd-4ef6-b975-b96d48eed8af?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
"What the State Freedom Caucus Network does is take these part-time lawmakers and give them staff and a full year-round operation," SFCN President Andy Roth told Daily Wire in the first story. "All of the big issues occurring right now are at the state level. School choice, ESG, CRT, porn in our schools, election integrity, abortion - all of those are state issues."
The second story focuses on the problem of red state RINO legislatures. When you think of places that have Republican lawmakers with the most liberal voting records, you'd probably think they come from states dominated by Democrats like Washington, New Jersey, Massachusetts, or Colorado.
But it's actually legislatures in the reddest states in the nation that have the biggest RINOS. The chart below lists the overall voting records of Republicans in state legislatures from most liberal to most conservative.
The two most liberal in the nation? Hawaii and South Carolina. Now you know why the SC House GOP leadership kicked the SC Freedom Caucus out of the Republican caucus.
Mississippi, Alabama, Georgia, Utah, and Louisiana Republicans all have less conservative voting records than Colorado, Maine, Minnesota, Washington, Maryland, and New Jersey.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/81d8662a-7927-43e7-8ff3-30da5c4e0a85?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
In Wyoming, the state Donald Trump won in 2020 by a greater percentage than any other, there are only five Democrats in the state House of Representatives. If you look at the voting records of all the members, however, the Democrats might as well have a majority. This is a big reason why WY's Speaker of the House Albert Sommers blocked common sense bills in the last session for school choice, parental rights in schools, and to bar children from going through dangerous sex change surgeries.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/ca25ea42-db9d-49a7-9eba-657369ea763a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
When Democrats gain control of state governments, they ram far-left policies down the throats of the GOP minority. When Republicans gain control, they can't even pass universal school choice.
"You might look at the list and see a lot of Republicans, but it doesn't necessarily mean that they're conservative," Louisiana Freedom Caucus Secretary-Treasurer Rep. Beryl Amedee said to The Daily Wire. "We have a minority of conservative Republicans in office, with a majority of the leadership-no matter which party they are listed with-pushing policies that are still fairly liberal."
Daily Wire's [second story](https://substack.com/redirect/84aa2ade-bcbd-4ef6-b975-b96d48eed8af?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) about our work focuses on why some of the reddest states have Republican legislators governing like liberals. A big culprit? The primary system. Ten Republican states have open primaries where voters of any party can vote, leading to Democrats meddling in the system to stop conservatives from winning. Louisiana also has a "jungle primary" system where the top two vote getters go to a runoff regardless of party, leading to more moderate Republicans getting elected over conservatives.
This leads the biggest issue of all: Liberals running with an R next to their name. This is a systemic problem that is happening in your own backyard and conservatives simply are not paying attention to it. When you vote for your state representative, do not assume they will adequately represent you just because they register as a Republican.
That's also the reason we started the State Freedom Caucus Network and are working to disrupt the status quo in these lawmaking bodies that are simply not representing their conservative voters.
It's a long road ahead and your help is critical in building out a network of patriots and freedom fighters throughout our nation's state capitols. Support the [State Freedom Caucus Network](https://substack.com/redirect/6daa2559-2d04-41bb-a704-e7f6971b5c3d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) today.
[DONATE](https://substack.com/redirect/6daa2559-2d04-41bb-a704-e7f6971b5c3d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
**Keep fighting,**

**Andy Roth**
_President
State Freedom Caucus Network_
State Freedom Caucus Network is free today. But if you enjoyed this post, you can tell State Freedom Caucus Network that their writing is valuable by pledging a future subscription. You won't be charged unless they enable payments.
[Pledge your support](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZmNuLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wb3N0IiwicCI6MTE1Mzg5MDM2LCJzIjoxNDI0NjAyLCJmIjp0cnVlLCJ1Ijo5MDUwMTE5MiwiaWF0IjoxNjgxNzQwODQxLCJleHAiOjE2ODQzMzI4NDEsImlzcyI6InB1Yi0wIiwic3ViIjoibGluay1yZWRpcmVjdCJ9.qidUEdUAiQ8v_0ITh8XTACRbEJK_u_TQp4LKoHnlbPw?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=postcta)

---
| | | [Restack](https://substack..76Rtb_pCjeWRDX2ltm3rxHDZNvFgZZ0yws97l_usPUM?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---

Listen to posts, join subscriber chats, and never miss an update from Andy Roth.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/0fd2011d-99d4-41ac-aa91-676997430ecb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)[](https://substack.com/redirect/cb088c7d-5079-4cb8-b24e-3f5385c241be?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

name: Wisconsin Republicans, me (2)
subject: Your input is critical
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican Party of Wisconsin
body:
As the top battleground state, our country’s future is in our hands.
| Friend,
---
We sent out this survey last week and so far have received thousands of responses from patriots across the state.
---
_But we are still missing a response from you, Friend._
---
Your input is critical as we audit this election to ensure we are fully prepared to deliver Wisconsin for Republicans in 2024.
---
_As the top battleground state, America will be looking at us._
---
We will be the ones to decide the fate of the White House and the future of this country and our state.
---
**That’s why we have to be ready to FIGHT BACK against the radical Left to secure Republican wins in these all-important elections.**
---
But we can’t do that without your help.
---
[**So please, take our Post-Election Survey to give our team valuable feedback so we can be prepared to help Republicans win up and down the ballot in 2024.**](https://links.wisconsin-republicans.com/u/click?_t=d8e9586dc433414d81114a9282924d1e&_m=82633487a8934780acf1b384098fa27a&_e=X8X0eRlGoASuFAtJnyB-_vg0s9xF3kpbGLWTw7roP8Gp-YEfLKCz7aAe6OdQ3yq3k2kWeJfcj37hF5M6pkkDpC6woqjEgg88i_EQuJFA6gqqMCKVdx4CMxGjB5TP4IbVP4HIpsFGzEp_o1NTfxCg9G5rUVEf3dFp5gnhoifIZwtn_vR3b3oZCEc-wNqIXTu15JChKi-LUDZMIs1TuDnEX9yp6f4GpiWI_e_Reh1A9Z8UHW1ktApjvEQFTeU-0snhMa8v_duGOH3aLUexlkr-01j1Yt8STmA6Son6SEtlgMScy0-flzeGP-nCZwP8IMCF0r5-SfbDVMl868PVxpaHnGLVO8VPrflx_Zb3VgeQuHc%3D)

name: ICYMI News
subject: Don’t let this classic disappear forever
body:
Even if you haven’t read the book, you know the name.

| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2ze843jhhbdkuhvfbpiv2ft60t80r971qff5ft5lg_rp22sh2s8i66o74ctim2ob6clh2bs)
---
This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| |
Dear Fellow American, You may be shocked to learn that thousands of public schools have recently banned a classic American story. Even if you haven’t read the book, you know the name. It’s _The Adventures of Huckleberry Finn_ by Mark Twain. **Unfortunately, political correctness has taken this literary classic out of the hands of far too many young Americans.** But here at Hillsdale College, we’re working to safeguard the legacy of this treasured classic, along with the legacy of the man regarded by many as **America’s greatest author.**
---
| | [**That is why I want to offer you a special DVD box set of our fascinating and important online course, “****Mark Twain:**_**Tom Sawyer**_**,**_**Huckleberry Finn**_**, and Selected Short Stories****.** ”](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zbt4nngcff38123u625e2difntq2q5608sbvokuo_rp22sh2s8i66o74ctim2ob6clh2bs) Twain’s realist fiction reveals timeless truths about human nature. And while American life has certainly changed since the 1800s, human nature has not. So these literary works are as relevant and as important as ever. Now, we have created a special DVD version of our course that includes all nine lectures. And today, [**I’d like to send you this DVD box set as our way of thanking you for supporting our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty with a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zlof1h6vbmirur5on8oopeeogg90b5k6a3b1jm20_rp22sh2s8i66o74ctim2ob6clh2bs).
---
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zrdq644ifit1li8mp36rqhgbusa9d6e43js5dlqg_rp22sh2s8i66o74ctim2ob6clh2bs)
---
| | Only a limited number of these DVD sets are available, so I hope you’ll take this opportunity to add it to your personal library or give it as a gift—before they’re gone (or removed from your local library!). You can use this secure link to get your copy of **“Mark Twain:**_**Tom Sawyer, Huckleberry Finn**_**, and Selected Short Stories”** on DVD: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/support-hillsdales-online-courses-mark-twain**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2ze2q00a8jpo2kcsg4pu1bglkp81amcubklan1c4g_rp22sh2s8i66o74ctim2ob6clh2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray, ’01 Vice President National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College P.S. Another great author, Ernest Hemingway, once said, “All modern American literature comes from one book by Mark Twain called _Huckleberry Finn._ ” Don’t let this classic disappear forever. Get your DVD box set of **“Mark Twain:**_**Tom Sawyer**_**,**_**Huckleberry Finn**_**, and Selected Short Stories”** right now when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more at this secure link: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/support-hillsdales-online-courses-mark-twain****.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zo2egea7qsno7kkhsgpfr8jpm8a1g7b5m2lgs1m8_rp22sh2s8i66o74ctim2ob6clh2bs)

name: Seth Dillon, Babylon Bee
subject: We're suing California
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.secureandprosper.-Eytg)
---
|
---
Fellow Free Speech Lover,
---
| | This is Seth Dillon, CEO of the Babylon Bee. Whether you've seen me on Tucker Carlson's show, or if you've come across our biting satire online, you probably know that, despite jokes being our bread and butter, The Babylon Bee takes free speech and fighting censorship seriously.
---
| [](http://trk.secureandprosper.-n58CoOS3tvjW7TtYD8w)
---
| | **That is why we've filed a lawsuit against California's Attorney General to stop the enforcement of its new censorship law.** If you care about protecting free speech and your right to push back against radical ideology online, then the Bee needs your support in this fight. [**I hope you'll consider standing with us today by becoming a Babylon Bee subscriber.**](http://trk.secureandprosper.)
---
[Stand with the Bee](http://trk.secureandprosper.)
---
The state of California passed a law in 2022 that imposes new regulations on social media companies. This law, AB 587, requires companies to give the California Attorney General's Office regular reports regarding disinformation, misinformation, extremism, radicalization, and hate speech. The law allows the state to impose fines if companies do not comply with these reporting regulations. You may be asking, "Isn't controlling misinformation and hate speech online a good thing?" The truth of the matter is that the government and Big Tech companies working together to control what everyone is allowed to say is a bad thing. A good thing is when everyone is allowed to speak freely. Not everyone's definitions of "misinformation" or "hate speech" are the same. In the case of our work at The Babylon Bee, jokes and satire are often incorrectly cited as examples of misinformation or hateful conduct by organizations and government agencies who think our views don't fit their prescribed narrative. When people in power don't like what you have to say, they can use that power to categorize your speech as "hateful," even if what you're saying is factually accurate.
---
[Stand with the Bee](http://trk.secureandprosper.)
---
** _This law is not about keeping social media companies transparent - it's about censorship._** The state of California, along with other government entities and Big Tech firms, is seeking to use censorship to protect their preferred narrative. We believe this is a violation of the First Amendment and we - along with our co-plaintiffs Tim Pool and Minds - are taking California to court to fight it. [**In times like these, your support is crucial**.](http://trk.secureandprosper.-iItKvA) If you have not taken the step to become a paid supporter of The Babylon Bee, now is the time. Each paid member helps us keep fighting these attempts to control what we can and can't say. Free speech - even when it comes to satire and jokes - is a vital pillar of our nation. Standing up for this fundamental right is something we will never back away from -- and thousands of free speech-loving Americans have shown us that they're ready to do the same. [**Are you one of them? If so, I hope you'll click here to view our subscription plans and sign up to offer your support.**](http://trk.secureandprosper.-dZ3ig) With your help, we will continue fighting these battles in and out of the courtroom, in any way we can.
---
[Stand with the Bee](http://trk.secureandprosper.-WvxhQ)
---
Thank you in advance for joining us in the battle for free speech.
---
Seth Dillon
CEO | The Babylon Bee
---
|
---
_Copyright © 2023 Babylon Bee, All rights reserved._
**Our mailing address is:**
The Babylon Bee, LLC
PO Box 546
Jupiter, FL 33468
---
Secure & Prosper PO Box 455 Leesburg, VA 20178If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.secureandprosper.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6NTE5ODk2OTgsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM4ODM3MTYzNCIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMTA3LTJkZGU4YmMzMTNmNTQwZjJhYjBjZDFiN2ZhZGFkNTU5IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlfQ/MMRMrvaUDFfm4qZhdEcYWQ) to unsubscribe.
---

Tucker asked if there’sANYTHING the Democrats could throw at me that would make me drop out of the presidential race. Without hesitation, I said, “NO. I’D NEVER DROP OUT.” Because the fate of America hangs in the balance - and I will NEVER SURRENDER our country to the radical Left. If an unjust, and possibly illegal, ARREST didn’t even make me flinch - then I promise you, NOTHING WILL. Now, I’m asking YOU to stand with me as the Left tries to throw everything they can at us to force me out of the presidential election. | Thank you, | Donald J. name: Bob, me (2)
subject: Quick call?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR
body:
, can we exchange contacts? I want your perspective on this. Are you available to chat privately this week or next?
I have a serious favor to ask. If you haven't heard yet, I am now in a contested Democratic primary for US Congress. Today, as a _true_ blue Democrat, I am personally asking for your loyalty, support, and your immediate help.
I'm looking to hire a top-notch finance team to build our vault so we can save money for TV ads in the general election, so right now I desperately need new funds to make critical hires. I want to rely less on the incredible generosity of contributors like you and equip my team to seek donations from other sources.
Catch 22: to attract that investment, I have to prove my grassroots abilities now, and we need more in the bank than this.
So I can stop asking so frequently, [could you chip in today](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61913180/401632470/-1190522591?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YWIxYzQ5Ni0yZmRkLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3ohNdC4nwLi3ht1PHWLzj0S1Wd_YYgaWtKWg0rFkdpc=&emci=ff266965-2ddd-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=4ab1c496-2fdd-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=15167427) and help me build this critical fundraising infrastructure? Anything you can afford will be greatly appreciated.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61913181/401632471/-1190522591?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YWIxYzQ5Ni0yZmRkLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3ohNdC4nwLi3ht1PHWLzj0S1Wd_YYgaWtKWg0rFkdpc=&emci=ff266965-2ddd-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=4ab1c496-2fdd-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=15167427)
I also want your perspective. If you're willing, I'd love to discuss any concerns or questions you have about the campaign — what will be different, our path to victory against the GOP, or anything on your mind.
Let me know if you would — _or wouldn't? _— appreciate a personal call. I'm hoping we can connect this week or next. If you don't require a private conversation, I'm happy to answer any questions via e-mail, and you can learn more and contribute at [bit.ly/FundDrBob.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61913182/401632472/-1190522591?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YWIxYzQ5Ni0yZmRkLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3ohNdC4nwLi3ht1PHWLzj0S1Wd_YYgaWtKWg0rFkdpc=&emci=ff266965-2ddd-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=4ab1c496-2fdd-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=15167427)
Looking forward to your reply and generosity. Let me know if there's a good time to connect.
Eternally grateful,
-Dr. Bob

As I have traveled the country, I'm more convinced than ever that our best days are actually, truly - not in some cheesy politician kind of way - but actually ahead of us. That we are not in some inevitable national decline.

I am not focused on the amount of your donation. I am looking for lots of donations from conservatives all over America to show that this campaign is a grassroots uprising, built by people like you - not the Washington elite.

We are **leading** this race with actual *solutions.* I will do what the other GOP candidates appear afraid to even say. **[But, I need your help to amplify our ideas and message.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=904c4989afaf4ae9befc53556f70ecef&_e=ob74ph5NXEEAzFbckzXybJdPSwCxJDVeRai4KJgh52dw-OhzB0_CQeL6OP9ZdeRTrkg6XPNjCOVWhuu3NLehHBHUrQ15L4kg6Be-zmSZORICYYfTrAl-GiAeH3kREilM7Nc5OLBLdVA5RX7yIqvBYvGf11yCO87C31dYwuIAUCGapEL6xk3suLwgLPK7sFa6fiGA3VNwRfqbtWJwmtgNapU_AeHzIEM6OqRJxzB3sRNlKyF5pwkQuoy3YqzD1VILfiNRyuvgdyFsdTgmT3bpSKhINA-yKSoF9G3QWeeNRC5V8eFX-gAs5uyEtxtUGVpJn0rcE0EzfR362DxZOmO1_ywq2FQEN-NKMwqZv7Yi7DGUK1ZnECKgACvP2qRqyRc3rmj6udTma3ePRCU8d5Tz5PV91TavxovNHwBgFf3u1H0%3D)**

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[ ** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=904c4989afaf4ae9befc53556f70ecef&_e=ob74ph5NXEEAzFbckzXybJdPSwCxJDVeRai4KJgh52dw-OhzB0_CQeL6OP9ZdeRTrkg6XPNjCOVWhuu3NLehHBHUrQ15L4kg6Be-zmSZORICYYfTrAl-GiAeH3kREilM7Nc5OLBLdVA5RX7yIqvBYvGf11yCO87C31dYwuIAUCGapEL6xk3suLwgLPK7sFa6fiGA3VNwRfqbtWJwmtgNapU_AeHzIEM6OqRJxzB3sRNlKyF5pwkQuoy3YqzD1VILaSY1xeT_IiONPRg7tW1auBPCPtgBckpMmVP9l1UimGUDWhBwIFva7ujkUtFdvEOsy4GIYRnkLCBdxqMMJREi2Dc8fq4JYWFDR484GlPX7dd7VX3IBaensllcmw92XMoVsnraaciwtsu4D9Q54YwONCH5V8pfxpjrzHDss5f724Y%3D)

name: Jasmine Smith, Emerge
subject: please don't abandon this fight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emerge America This email was sent by Emerge America
body:
Bad news, Peter. We needed 82 more supporters to step up yesterday before our membership deadline expired – **and we still fell short of goal. **
---
But I just spoke with our finance team, and **we’re officially extending our deadline** – by one more day – to give you the chance to activate your Emerge Community Membership now.
So please, donate any amount today to activate your membership and help Emerge empower Democratic women to run for office, flip seats blue, and fight for our rights across the country.
**Here’s the best link to give: ****[_https://secure.actblue.com/donate/emerge2023_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61914060/401636349/-1986725773?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1188-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjMxNWQ5NjM2LTMxZGQtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=qUAfVlz1SG8sTYfqwweIc4CVjxjW3NDqy9jE9N_toiA=)**
Thank you for staying in this fight,

Jasmine Smith
Development Manager, Emerge
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **A’shanti (personal)**
Date: Sun, Apr 16, 2023
Subject: quickly reaching out while there's still time
| | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61914064/401636359/-1986725773?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1188-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjMxNWQ5NjM2LTMxZGQtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=qUAfVlz1SG8sTYfqwweIc4CVjxjW3NDqy9jE9N_toiA=)
---
Peter, I just got an update on our goal, and we still need** 120 more supporters** to activate their Emerge Community Membership by midnight tonight!
We're asking folks to activate their memberships because we're at the forefront of getting trailblazing women of the New American Majority on the ballot. **When you donate to Emerge, you'll help:**
| | | | Fuel Emerge's for-women-by-women programs to shatter glass ceilings in politics.
|
---|---|---|---
| | | | Ensure that ALL of our communities have a voice in the rooms where decisions are made.
|
---|---|---|---
| | | | Protect our fundamental rights from far-right attacks in every corner of our country.
|
---|---|---|---
I’m personally reaching out to you because I know you’re as committed as we are to breaking glass ceilings in politics and empowering Democratic women who will fight for our communities at every level. **But it’s going to take a collective, community effort!**
**There are only a few hours left, so please don’t wait. Use this link to donate any amount and activate your Emerge Community Membership before our midnight deadline: **[**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/emerge2023**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61914069/401636370/-1986725773?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1188-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjMxNWQ5NjM2LTMxZGQtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=qUAfVlz1SG8sTYfqwweIc4CVjxjW3NDqy9jE9N_toiA=)
Transforming politics takes community effort, and we can’t do this work without you. Thank you.
A’shanti Gholar
President, Emerge
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
Email is an important way for Emerge America to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. name: Pro Life Update
subject: You’ll be surprised who’sbeing cancelled next
body:
You may be shocked to learn that thousands of public schools have recently banned a classic American story.

| | | This sponsored message from Next After is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zv5ajkl8ohd2m8rg5vk92sg07q7j3ptsnvcscmv8_rp22sh2s8i66o74ctim1o31cjh2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, You may be shocked to learn that thousands of public schools have recently banned a classic American story. Even if you haven’t read the book, you know the name. It’s _The Adventures of Huckleberry Finn_ by Mark Twain. **Unfortunately, political correctness has taken this literary classic out of the hands of far too many young Americans.** But here at Hillsdale College, we’re working to safeguard the legacy of this treasured classic, along with the legacy of the man regarded by many as **America’s greatest author.**
---
| | [**That is why I want to offer you a special DVD box set of our fascinating and important online course, “****Mark Twain:**_**Tom Sawyer**_**,**_**Huckleberry Finn**_**, and Selected Short Stories****.** ”](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zhgs9eq4pl0obqrvk6fd9hlqiuknq37dk8cb0240_rp22sh2s8i66o74ctim1o31cjh2bs) Twain’s realist fiction reveals timeless truths about human nature. And while American life has certainly changed since the 1800s, human nature has not. So these literary works are as relevant and as important as ever. Now, we have created a special DVD version of our course that includes all nine lectures. And today, [**I’d like to send you this DVD box set as our way of thanking you for supporting our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty with a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zbi36fo02m0u74eqqq0m23big9vsknjdo9dvm6r8_rp22sh2s8i66o74ctim1o31cjh2bs).
---
| [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zg7gfsvs4keud6h0sqdodfr05id2m4nii6fn8nq0_rp22sh2s8i66o74ctim1o31cjh2bs)
---
| | Only a limited number of these DVD sets are available, so I hope you’ll take this opportunity to add it to your personal library or give it as a gift—before they’re gone (or removed from your local library!). You can use this secure link to get your copy of **“Mark Twain:**_**Tom Sawyer, Huckleberry Finn**_**, and Selected Short Stories”** on DVD: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/support-hillsdales-online-courses-mark-twain**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z0oe344l9srgn4kmjmb0aicshdagijck7oi0k7ug_rp22sh2s8i66o74ctim1o31cjh2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray, ’01 Vice President National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College P.S. Another great author, Ernest Hemingway, once said, “All modern American literature comes from one book by Mark Twain called _Huckleberry Finn._ ” Don’t let this classic disappear forever. Get your DVD box set of **“Mark Twain:**_**Tom Sawyer**_**,**_**Huckleberry Finn**_**, and Selected Short Stories”** right now when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more at this secure link: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/support-hillsdales-online-courses-mark-twain****.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zi5oi84qgckfg2ignuk3kn2rksc0oakmvp11rmd8_rp22sh2s8i66o74ctim1o31cjh2bs)
---

Pro Life Update
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zdns4rcic83ssrffqt8bbh9s9di5a64anidevo48_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjk1p7fcdkmcqjas3h6gonact66uqrf9bjmpqn4djm69qb4d9nkvijbo9getqb3cdkmppmeo0n6mq39cdjkorrbcp4mni60o73c1ge9oh1k8gn48n24hhm1p37clge0ob4s8iv0)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z9tc1fgh7i7kncfcvflni23ci4rfm3518q0rnh5o_rp22sh2s8i66o74ctim1o31cjh2bs)_

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zr1dhvrkp5rqr876gtplk37drfadg369c8vdmlto_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or0shjmao70c5ie49fg)

And today, . | | | Only a limited number of these DVD sets are available, so I hope you’ll take this opportunity to add it to your personal library or give it as a gift—before they’re gone (or removed from your local library!). You can use this secure link to get your copy of “Mark Twain:Tom Sawyer, Huckleberry Finn, and Selected Short Stories” on DVD: Warm regards, Bill Gray, ’01 Vice President National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College P.S. Another great author, Ernest Hemingway, once said, “All modern American literature comes from one book by Mark Twain called Huckleberry Finn. ” Don’t let this classic disappear forever. Get your DVD box set of “Mark Twain:Tom Sawyer,Huckleberry Finn, and Selected Short Stories” right now when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more at this secure link: Pro Life Update 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

body:
We need your help to continue building a better America. | |
---
Derek, the actions we take today will shape the future of our country. That’s why Joe and I have worked alongside Democrats in Congress to create over 12 million jobs, lower costs for families, and make historic investments in our nation’s infrastructure. None of this progress would have been possible without the full support of members of this grassroots team -- thank you. **But to be perfectly candid, Derek: We still have work to do.** A strong DNC is critical to building the nationwide party infrastructure needed to elect more Democrats and keep making meaningful progress for the American people. **That’s why I’m asking you to step up and help Democrats stay on track of their fundraising goal by donating $7 to the DNC today. Can I count on your support?**

clean_body: We need your help to continue building a better America. | | Derek, the actions we take today will shape the future of our country. That’s why Joe and I have worked alongside Democrats in Congress to create over 12 million jobs, lower costs for families, and make historic investments in our nation’s infrastructure. None of this progress would have been possible without the full support of members of this grassroots team -- thank you. But to be perfectly candid, Derek: We still have work to do. A strong DNC is critical to building the nationwide party infrastructure needed to elect more Democrats and keep making meaningful progress for the American people. That’s why I’m asking you to step up and help Democrats stay on track of their fundraising goal by donating $7 to the DNC today. Can I count on your support? When I was a little girl, my mother would always tell my sister and me, "Don’t just sit around and complain about things. Do something. " That is why I am so grateful for this team -- and for your capacity to roll up your sleeves and get to work. You see, progress is a movement -- it can’t be achieved by one person alone. It is going to take every single member of this grassroots team fighting for a better future to safeguard the progress we’ve made so far and keep making a difference in the years to come. I'm so grateful for all of your support. Thank you, Kamala Kamala Harris Vice President of the United States Kamala Harris: Derivative of Adam Schultz / Biden for President Photo. name: CAPT Hung Cao
subject: The American dream
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Unleash America PAC
body:
Let me tell you about why this is so important to me.| | | [](http://links.unleashamericapac.co/u/click?_t=4fd2065bb87d4411bcd7523509144268&_m=2dc4c6038f934ba390082bdba9159795&_e=JYU6g3a2LSDVT_xzs-soW8Ft3ysSWdLCgUXwAxpA-WMnAK5XbFgKFyoH1cjSQaseqqKaJD44vET0y-mhxxuQabuV5Q95C6JK1y9CxfBC4i2_EsVv5JACewzSNRzqAWAA-C4iV3Ub8rIxMIGKGleor600ytHztGRTWbFVYOkFkFfw6X0YCdkYPDg1FzJTo7kAFkyH8_LOfo3ZSqhGqm2gRy0dlO7GnkBHBMIx-Y_bOIs-HQAZ07Qd7B8VXFwNgbLDAz7qdAvOyVmQMEzVxDwj5IzYDJixy2hhYWhirRGGm5BYGTN33-MtmZgnUWZEpzGeXucOxlPQjiT5AcnfOtScoMDIoyC6zljKl20mX_s1ajE%3D)
---
Peter, When I decided to run for office last year, I didn’t want fame, glitz or glory.
**I saw that the American dream that saved my life was on the line - and I realized I had to do whatever it takes to save it.**
[**My fight for the American dream is far from over, and I would love for you to join our team to protect it.**](http://links.unleashamericapac.co/u/click?_t=4fd2065bb87d4411bcd7523509144268&_m=2dc4c6038f934ba390082bdba9159795&_e=JYU6g3a2LSDVT_xzs-soW8Ft3ysSWdLCgUXwAxpA-WMnAK5XbFgKFyoH1cjSQaseqqKaJD44vET0y-mhxxuQabuV5Q95C6JK1y9CxfBC4i2_EsVv5JACewzSNRzqAWAA-C4iV3Ub8rIxMIGKGleor600ytHztGRTWbFVYOkFkFfw6X0YCdkYPDg1FzJTo7kAFkyH8_LOfo3ZSqhGqm2gR62kCOEMJpzhHNzGjklF5E-qUY4QIiZGi9RqJy6K7G6hgFbGJDcS210Gmu48dO4jH_s9L_iQ-sh9Z0AagTAgD8-V6Z_YWAVCofZGGw7YImA1xpeUgyTjzdOsmzr4E5f4Bey1tI4FQ4spapcDJvo20YI%3D)
_But first, let me tell you about why this is so important to me._
I was born in communist Vietnam during the war. My father was put on an execution list for speaking out against the communist party.
---
[](http://links.unleashamericapac.co/u/click?_t=4fd2065bb87d4411bcd7523509144268&_m=2dc4c6038f934ba390082bdba9159795&_e=JYU6g3a2LSDVT_xzs-soW8Ft3ysSWdLCgUXwAxpA-WMnAK5XbFgKFyoH1cjSQaseqqKaJD44vET0y-mhxxuQabuV5Q95C6JK1y9CxfBC4i2_EsVv5JACewzSNRzqAWAA-C4iV3Ub8rIxMIGKGleor600ytHztGRTWbFVYOkFkFfw6X0YCdkYPDg1FzJTo7kAFkyH8_LOfo3ZSqhGqm2gR4sxVP9ggoRKB1myxHV95QkHV6FROOgBzKNXgQx-iviesw-DXZKtC_e4_UYlbGsjRrzrRhFH0UK4MCTfEUfsANXNqEFmSrMSZbp4GS1F09zajo2QkX4J5KK_r4EOmfC_gx_uy_LPWgWORW1-IeuEoDU%3D)
---
**But luckily, we were able to legally immigrate to the United States.**

I owe my life to American freedom, Peter.

The second we stepped foot on U.S. soil, I knew that I had arrived in the land of opportunity. I came to this country not speaking a word of English. But just fourteen years later, I was preparing to serve our great nation as a cadet at the United States Naval Academy.
---
[](http://links.unleashamericapac.co/u/click?_t=4fd2065bb87d4411bcd7523509144268&_m=2dc4c6038f934ba390082bdba9159795&_e=JYU6g3a2LSDVT_xzs-soW8Ft3ysSWdLCgUXwAxpA-WMnAK5XbFgKFyoH1cjSQaseqqKaJD44vET0y-mhxxuQabuV5Q95C6JK1y9CxfBC4i2_EsVv5JACewzSNRzqAWAA-C4iV3Ub8rIxMIGKGleor600ytHztGRTWbFVYOkFkFfw6X0YCdkYPDg1FzJTo7kAFkyH8_LOfo3ZSqhGqm2gR4j0jXfy3QRhTVzev_W4hxJ-fR-CeJS0opdxfgWWp_2jHwblkr0X9TWRZ91Cwi2QLYYys4kah8P_GWe0p2epuVyGY94hhfhLKHpDUr_yKQT3GRp97fSdPxLvvWjUiQzVd398fZBfyjuA9X8DLdM8A2A%3D)
---
Once I graduated, I dedicated my career to protecting and defending this great country and its values. As a U.S. Naval Captain, I served for 25-years in special operations. My service took me to some of the most dangerous places in the world, from Afghanistan to Somalia.

_But I knew my sacrifices were worth it, because I was defending something much bigger than myself: the American dream that saved my life._
---
[](http://links.unleashamericapac.co/u/click?_t=4fd2065bb87d4411bcd7523509144268&_m=2dc4c6038f934ba390082bdba9159795&_e=JYU6g3a2LSDVT_xzs-soW8Ft3ysSWdLCgUXwAxpA-WMnAK5XbFgKFyoH1cjSQaseqqKaJD44vET0y-mhxxuQabuV5Q95C6JK1y9CxfBC4i2_EsVv5JACewzSNRzqAWAA-C4iV3Ub8rIxMIGKGleor600ytHztGRTWbFVYOkFkFfw6X0YCdkYPDg1FzJTo7kAFkyH8_LOfo3ZSqhGqm2gR1npKaG-7CTdYlfAxXBBQ95FbX_gUJkci7bRfPDmKGi5SGnrciMgGbTpEwXGmKlokqN6HWLka_bMgydVfu-oCleq44Y3XjREptqrqqoFl-vGPGzZCMLoxLsW1IIKUbyeLO2pafWEBnHtPZ30vNQJ01w%3D)
---
When I came back from my last combat deployment, I was shocked to see what the radical Left was trying to do to our country. They weren’t just spending out of control, letting crime run rampant, and injecting revisionist lies into our schools: **they were fighting the very values that make America strong.**

I saw too many men and women make the ultimate sacrifice for these values to let the Democrats destroy them in vain.

**Peter, no one loves America like I do, and just because I’ve hung up my Navy uniform doesn’t mean I’m going to stop fighting for our country’s future. Now, I’m on a new mission to elect leaders who will protect and defend the American dream for my children's generation and generations to come, but I need your help.**
---
[](http://links.unleashamericapac.co/u/click?_t=4fd2065bb87d4411bcd7523509144268&_m=2dc4c6038f934ba390082bdba9159795&_e=JYU6g3a2LSDVT_xzs-soW8Ft3ysSWdLCgUXwAxpA-WMnAK5XbFgKFyoH1cjSQaseqqKaJD44vET0y-mhxxuQabuV5Q95C6JK1y9CxfBC4i2_EsVv5JACewzSNRzqAWAA-C4iV3Ub8rIxMIGKGleor600ytHztGRTWbFVYOkFkFfw6X0YCdkYPDg1FzJTo7kAFkyH8_LOfo3ZSqhGqm2gR6e6kZo9tIK-sIlJR2pwW9f02bwSD8OJSvLSNGnP7xfs5vyJzPiNL3Zs3xKO_B7cp-94pJzEdvaNXBeCCLdELaQS3HX6xWDDCtvT_iNgmWI4fLI9yGKQb6NHFCSd_xJkgf8C8xBfXUcDUk9sVK6ESAs%3D)
---
[**Join me today to save the American dream for the next generation and elect strong, conservative leaders who will fight for our nation’s future.**](http://links.unleashamericapac.co/u/click?_t=4fd2065bb87d4411bcd7523509144268&_m=2dc4c6038f934ba390082bdba9159795&_e=JYU6g3a2LSDVT_xzs-soW8Ft3ysSWdLCgUXwAxpA-WMnAK5XbFgKFyoH1cjSQaseqqKaJD44vET0y-mhxxuQabuV5Q95C6JK1y9CxfBC4i2_EsVv5JACewzSNRzqAWAA-C4iV3Ub8rIxMIGKGleor600ytHztGRTWbFVYOkFkFfw6X0YCdkYPDg1FzJTo7kAFkyH8_LOfo3ZSqhGqm2gRwQRd26rb8AnPM-4CMeuvCXtb8Z3-zVH-FLHwtYLw9bRNPE9XZU81v45nbUAQL-m39G4qXLCLGALCod4oBAWL9m4ZraKGHPEALpFJSfwBvvgbx7Qz2OR_te228iPXcJE6NY_twWfuTs_tvJChOWDJ88%3D)
---
[**JOIN ME TODAY >>>**](http://links.unleashamericapac.co/u/click?_t=4fd2065bb87d4411bcd7523509144268&_m=2dc4c6038f934ba390082bdba9159795&_e=JYU6g3a2LSDVT_xzs-soW8Ft3ysSWdLCgUXwAxpA-WMnAK5XbFgKFyoH1cjSQaseqqKaJD44vET0y-mhxxuQabuV5Q95C6JK1y9CxfBC4i2_EsVv5JACewzSNRzqAWAA-C4iV3Ub8rIxMIGKGleor600ytHztGRTWbFVYOkFkFfw6X0YCdkYPDg1FzJTo7kAFkyH8_LOfo3ZSqhGqm2gR9XKjN_Bt_35sZC5xEdamCUkVQ_obrtGeno_Pgf5YWf8usl01-Pd8KZ7wOF2d_K4vGkw2s6QqPpkkKyxgfdWAkrHGryZgMPpi7wLQrPs0Y5SBjoJPF4ToYG-PzEgTfY0YWgukt6LbFG4LRFmfJdY3rg%3D)
---
In Liberty,
---
[](http://links.unleashamericapac.co/u/click?_t=4fd2065bb87d4411bcd7523509144268&_m=2dc4c6038f934ba390082bdba9159795&_e=JYU6g3a2LSDVT_xzs-soW8Ft3ysSWdLCgUXwAxpA-WMnAK5XbFgKFyoH1cjSQaseqqKaJD44vET0y-mhxxuQabuV5Q95C6JK1y9CxfBC4i2_EsVv5JACewzSNRzqAWAA-C4iV3Ub8rIxMIGKGleor600ytHztGRTWbFVYOkFkFfw6X0YCdkYPDg1FzJTo7kAFkyH8_LOfo3ZSqhGqm2gR35dHPvESWVPBTF49HYFBi-uTy7JLw0eKP0i5okLk1HLC9DIjE0V0uSUm79pk8Dv04AJ5oYpKg5x-PfjcJAqGGWHUC6w_xMPy0rv-ezF7sWR0CUgv-m-j84MQmTTQrBK0FicHSL3k1r8Vfe1LB9rxRE%3D)
---
CAPT Hung Cao USN (RET)
---
[**STAND WITH CAPT HUNG CAO**](http://links.unleashamericapac.co/u/click?_t=4fd2065bb87d4411bcd7523509144268&_m=2dc4c6038f934ba390082bdba9159795&_e=JYU6g3a2LSDVT_xzs-soW8Ft3ysSWdLCgUXwAxpA-WMnAK5XbFgKFyoH1cjSQaseqqKaJD44vET0y-mhxxuQabuV5Q95C6JK1y9CxfBC4i2_EsVv5JACewzSNRzqAWAA-C4iV3Ub8rIxMIGKGleor600ytHztGRTWbFVYOkFkFfw6X0YCdkYPDg1FzJTo7kAFkyH8_LOfo3ZSqhGqm2gR9B90g7sLHBKLQ-319zE9_G_ofKE690PYhD76a8tqc62KRXSX3v15dt3jwpQQYOOEI_KeE-Q70d2etuOM3UIRxEqNj0on5EcdzdXeVEinrK53LCyIwAFAef_FQpFvMitMHb1EJnx7xCPkEcc5nw0M_4%3D)
