name: Courier Newsroom
subject: It's about Joe Rogan
body:
We must be doing something right.
# [](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/83?t=1&akid=865%2E120351%2Ex9xaQy)
Peter,
Courier Newsroom is getting attention from an unlikely source...
**Joe Rogan.**
In case you don’t know: Rogan’s podcast is one of the most popular in the country. Boosted by his rumored $200 million dollar deal with Spotify, his show regularly gets tens of millions of listeners per episode.
Rogan’s influence over his audience is powerful. His personal views, his guests, and his politics all have serious, real world implications.
You might remember last year’s firestorm over Rogan spreading misinformation about COVID. The controversy blew up when musician Neil Young took his music off of Spotify to protest Rogan’s questioning of the safety of vaccines and the (completely untrue) virtues of Ivermectin as cure for the virus.
**That’s why when we saw this clip of Rogan making fun of Courier’s mission to stop the spread of misinformation during a recent show, we weren’t the least bit surprised:**
[****](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/3663?refcode=em-20230417&t=2&akid=865%2E120351%2Ex9xaQy)
**[If Joe Rogan is threatened by us, we must be doing something right. If you believe in our mission to hold bad actors like Rogan accountable and stop the spread of bad information, will you chip in $5 today?](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/3663?refcode=em-20230417&t=3&akid=865%2E120351%2Ex9xaQy)**
**[Chip in $5 »](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/3663?refcode=em-20230417&t=4&akid=865%2E120351%2Ex9xaQy)**
When it comes to the spread of misinformation, bad actors like Rogan are allergic to accountability. That’s what makes him so dangerous.
**Let’s be clear: Rogan’s attack isn’t an insult, it’s a sign that the momentum behind Courier Newsroom and our mission are gathering steam.**
Our local teams in 8 battleground states use quality, local reporting to combat the spread of disinformation in-real time. With your support, they can keep doing their jobs, growing their audiences, and expand their operations into communities and online spaces where factual, local journalism is non-existent.
[**We can win the fight against misinformation, but it’s going to take all of us pitching in and doing our part whenever we can. That’s why we’re setting a goal to raise $6,500 by midnight so we can hire more journalists, boost our stories, and grow our reach. Will you join us in the fight against bad information by chipping in $5?**](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/3663?refcode=em-20230417&t=5&akid=865%2E120351%2Ex9xaQy)
**[Chip in $5 »](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/3663?refcode=em-20230417&t=6&akid=865%2E120351%2Ex9xaQy)**
Thank you,
The Courier Newsroom Team

**[DONATE »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=7&refcode2=865_120351_x9xaQy&akid=865%2E120351%2Ex9xaQy)**
Email us: [**info@couriernewsroom.com**](mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/update-your-information)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=8&akid=865%2E120351%2Ex9xaQy)

To give by check:
Courier Newsroom
Box 509
New York, NY 10032
clean_body: We must be doing something right. Peter, Courier Newsroom is getting attention from an unlikely source... Joe Rogan. In case you don’t know: Rogan’s podcast is one of the most popular in the country. Boosted by his rumored $200 million dollar deal with Spotify, his show regularly gets tens of millions of listeners per episode. Rogan’s influence over his audience is powerful. His personal views, his guests, and his politics all have serious, real world implications. You might remember last year’s firestorm over Rogan spreading misinformation about COVID. The controversy blew up when musician Neil Young took his music off of Spotify to protest Rogan’s questioning of the safety of vaccines and the (completely untrue) virtues of Ivermectin as cure for the virus. That’s why when we saw this clip of Rogan making fun of Courier’s mission to stop the spread of misinformation during a recent show, we weren’t the least bit surprised: When it comes to the spread of misinformation, bad actors like Rogan are allergic to accountability. That’s what makes him so dangerous. Let’s be clear: Rogan’s attack isn’t an insult, it’s a sign that the momentum behind Courier Newsroom and our mission are gathering steam. Our local teams in 8 battleground states use quality, local reporting to combat the spread of disinformation in-real time. With your support, they can keep doing their jobs, growing their audiences, and expand their operations into communities and online spaces where factual, local journalism is non-existent. Thank you, The Courier Newsroom Team Email us: mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com

Dr. Marco Vietor and Paul Crusius have been creating successful businesses since college. Now they lead hear.com, the fastest growing hearing aid company in the world. This is their story.

Let's be honest, very few people want to wear hearing aids. Although there have been huge breakthroughs in technology, most people don't use them simply because they are still big and ugly. However, Dr. Marco Vietor and Paul Crusius wanted to change this perception with **a revolutionary device developed with top German hearing aid engineers** formerly from Siemens. After many years of research and development, this team of engineers came up with a game-changing hearing aid that's completely crushing the market with powerful German technology.

**The result:** A hearing device that packs cutting-edge technology in a design so small, it completely disappears inside the ear. It's called the Horizon Mini by hear.com.

# **A Catastrophic Recession is Imminent?**
On the heels of the 2nd largest bank failure in US history and the 9th interest rate hike in the last 12 months, a staggering **186 more banks are on the brink of collapse.** **" Could your bank be next?"** The Fed's reckless recent printing of **$300,000,000** **to bail out more struggling banks** has further devalued the dollar (and your savings) and pushed inflation trending toward all-time highs. If your bank goes under, do you really think the government is going to bail you out like it did SVB and Signature Bank? The **FDIC can 't even cover SVB **and Signature Bank combined deposits, so how can you expect them to cover your deposits if your bank fails? And if that's not enough to terrify you, consider this - experts predict that the latest interest rate hikes will inevitably trigger a recession, causing your investments and retirement accounts to plummet even more in value. name: Kash Patel
subject: New J6 Choir song with Donald Trump
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zpc9n36nblkrlqv96cu7bqm11nkkskt9dj7rbln8_rp22sh2s8i66o74cthm0pr6cth2bs)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2za6knndpfd9r6drn71qen9jg0mirrhfjens7r42g_rp22sh2s8i66o74cthm0pr6cth2bs)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zggaf5gtmor816o3h41uabmucef8tpi6vrnka1qg_rp22sh2s8i66o74cthm0pr6cth2bs)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _" deadly insurrection."_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It's time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

**Support the January 6th Families**

**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Donor Status: MISSING
Goal: **1,000 Donors

[** _Donate Now >>_**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z0htbmh4v2j2rcitalim0p2uvj97gk754f56hfn0_rp22sh2s8i66o74cthm0pr6cth2bs)

**[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zgb8lgegmoe0on41fcqvtne96eicdg393fvolano_rp22sh2s8i66o74cthm0pr6cth2bs)
[_**Donate $25 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zf6034t7d1rjbk5hatgbvj45jde4bkjm353hrj4o_rp22sh2s8i66o74cthm0pr6cth2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1jiuk32hte6uk8ulf0if546t8ulvje1u353du7g_rp22sh2s8i66o74cthm0pr6cth2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zh76ddt45gb3c9a2c1o3fui7d68ivtmb60p15u20_rp22sh2s8i66o74cthm0pr6cth2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ziurp6ps0b93fbid6th87ieu45tat53j019m0dog_rp22sh2s8i66o74cthm0pr6cth2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z79n8uauuebbuofffgnib1dt6k4k8oqcnd6k9gf8_rp22sh2s8i66o74cthm0pr6cth2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z9a1rnpgvesu3t60ho5drmpegqmomuju2as9v4eo_rp22sh2s8i66o74cthm0pr6cth2bs)**
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zhitpob5hrvl3notpki0ql3hajf2guemodiam6i0_rp22sh2s8i66o74cthm0pr6cth2bs)
[**_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zo1ejqvp4i51gug5miqdl4j901c5lis1phlltk28_rp22sh2s8i66o74cthm0pr6cth2bs)

**I launched the _Kash Foundation_ to offer legal help to America First families like the ones from the Jan 6th witch hunts. **

I know what it's like. I've been the target of the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself.

I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump.

The FBI used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they are doing everything they can to hide any evidence that they tried to provoke the protesters. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, _I will do everything in my power to help out_.

**Friend, I 'm humbly asking you to help us get justice for the Jan 6th detainees and set them free. **

[_**Will you be one of the 1,000 patriots brave enough to fight for some of the Jan 6th detainees and their families? You can show your support by donating $10, $25, $50, or even $100 today. Click here to step up >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zg2bhmog60ngo07cnlsb3093ujbkppjeej9unp5o_rp22sh2s8i66o74cthm0pr6cth2bs)

Please hurry.

And as moving as it is to hear them sing every night from their prison cells, it will sound so much sweeter when they can sing our national anthem underneath the stars with their freedom restored.

[_**You can rush your urgent donation by clicking here.**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zcu9nr01n3lmsq2bg1ma9r4afrbm7b8pvdnbg078_rp22sh2s8i66o74cthm0pr6cth2bs)

For Freedom,

Kash Patel

_The Kash Foundation is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit. All donations are tax-deductible._

GOP Presidential

_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ztpnqja70be4u8j4vct7taecfv1efcirmnccdka8_rp22sh2s8i66o74cthm0pr6cth238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pqedtge1p7adjkm4qj7cbkmgor79hnmmrqastmelp3cthieip3adt7skqu2c3neior3d5medjm05plmgqb3ct66uqr695lshg61or4chgm49fg)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zjhb48kugu85t11lo2hainfmc43q8hihoadjb6t8_rp22sh2s8i66o74cthm0pr6cth2bs)_

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Will you fight to take back our courts from corrupt zealots forced on us by billionaires with Hitler fetishes?
body:
We need judicial reform now
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tca4d8c6b-bb7d-4c9a-90ae-f68de88b776e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **_BREAKING_ :** _In addition to his $500,000 vacations and superyacht rides covered by billionaire-Nazi-fetishist Harlan Crow--trips that Thomas purposely hid--he's has now been exposed for lying on his disclosure forms for years about the source of real estate income._ From _The Washington Post_ : [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc410dafc-72ea-4466-8ff1-5de5b5bb5b9e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **_Meanwhile, Judge Kacsmaryk, the zealot installed on a federal court who overturned the FDA's approval of mifepristone, has also been exposed. He deceitfully had his name removed as the author of an inflammatory screed attacking gay rights and abortion during his confirmation hearings._** **Both men, in a democracy with two functioning parties, and not a GOP transformed into an authoritarian cult, would be subject to impeachment hearings immediately. But...Kevin McCarthy...** **_Demand Justice is fighting to add members to our federal courts to dilute the power of Republicans pretending to be judges, like Kacsmaryk, Thomas and, sadly, many you've never heard of. We must stop them--ASAP--or the damage they'll do to us, and those we love, is incalculable._** [**_Will you fight to take back our courts from corrupt zealots forced on us by billionaires with Hitler fetishes? Will you give $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to Demand Justice to really make America the land of the free?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T839d7981-3adf-497a-b729-e4300fd97ccd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thank you for fighting to take corruption and hatred off our courts._ Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T15d046fc-d270-42e9-9c8e-992efe3f34dc/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Attorney Larry Klayman
subject: Citizens’ Grand Jury to seek indictment of NYC District Attorney Alvin Bragg
body:
New York City District Attorney Alvin Bragg has declared war on President Trump and the American people.

| | | | | [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zkuetdsdro1obhfa0k86hgebf7emrkgnhhb3emd0_rp22sh2s8i66o74cthm8or1c9h2bs)
---
| |
---
[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z8lbe8iii23vo4hsse0vss79kdod72g9l8su34r8_rp22sh2s8i66o74cthm8or1c9h2bs)Dear Patriot,

New York City District Attorney Alvin Bragg has declared war on President Trump and the American people.

**Like I told you yesterday, this shocking indictment threatens the rule of law, honest elections, and the future of our country.**

What’s more, what District Attorney Bragg has done is **ILLEGAL.**

So once again, Freedom Watch turns to its Citizens’ Grand Jury. We’re going to seek a criminal indictment against Alvin Bragg for his crime...and we’re going to seek justice, peacefully and legally.

This fight isn't over, Peter and we need activists like you in the fight against anti-choice extremism. the EMILYs List team _\----------Original Message---------
From: The EMILYs List Team
Sent: Fri., Apr. 14, 2023_ **ABORTION ACCESS NEWS: Florida Governor Signs Near-Total Abortion Ban** Late last night, Florida Governor Ron DeSantis signed a six-week abortion ban into law.

Let's be clear about what is dangerous about this: _everything_.

**FIRST:** Many people don't know they're pregnant after just six weeks. And even for those that do, it will still be almost impossible to overcome Florida's additional barriers to access, including _two_ doctor's appointments and a 24-hour waiting period, before the six-week window closes.

[**This is effectively a total ban on abortion, hiding in plain sight. If you're ready to fight back, donate right now to help elect more Democratic pro-choice women.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61917045/401648610/1866787119?sourceid=1048922&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYjQ3NjA5ZC0zOWRkLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uUdu8j5hVtkMB-qql88cqo-n_8r2TaunDoP01ThELWU=&emci=1c745875-03db-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=0b47609d-39dd-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934)

**THEN:** There are other near-total bans, like Florida's, in the works. We already know, for example, that the Nebraska Legislature is working on a ban very similar to Florida's. Nebraska, like Florida, already had abortion restrictions in place after _Roe v. Wade_ was overturned last June, but is now opting for a harsher ban. The Republicans are showing us again and again: _The cruelty is the point._

It was never about a number of weeks. It was never about "women's health." (Stripping a person of their bodily autonomy DOES NOT improve their health.) **For anti-choice extremists like Ron DeSantis, it is about making anyone who can get pregnant _less_ free.** ****We have never needed Democratic pro-choice women in office more than we do right now. Please donate today to help elect women who will fight for our most fundamental rights:**

**[https://emilyslist.org/go/Bite-Back-Sticker](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61917052/401648617/1866787119?sourceid=1048922&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYjQ3NjA5ZC0zOWRkLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uUdu8j5hVtkMB-qql88cqo-n_8r2TaunDoP01ThELWU=&emci=1c745875-03db-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=0b47609d-39dd-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934)**** Thank you for taking a stand,

the EMILYs List team

body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=2114%2E5257348%2Et-Fcbo ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek —

I’m in New York City today...along with Jim Jordan and the rest of the
Republican-controlled House Judiciary Committee.

Why?

Jordan and Kevin McCarthy are exerting an unprecedented level of political
pressure against Manhattan District Attorney Alvin Bragg in a corrupt
attempt to block Donald Trump from legal accountability and place him
above the rule of law.

But no one is above the law. Not even presidents.

As I’m in Manhattan calling out Republican efforts to undermine the
justice system and meddle in Trump’s criminal case, MAGA trolls and their
amplifiers in the right-wing media will be attacking me relentlessly. So
before Jim Jordan’s “field hearing” begins, I am urgently asking:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=apr2023_abs_em.S8d4Hr&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC30_20230417_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=2114%2E5257348%2Et-Fcbo ]Will you chip in $10 or any amount to our campaign right now so that we
are prepared to respond to Republican attacks against my work on the House
Judiciary Committee?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1015?c0=apr2023_abs_em.O2ILzB&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC30_20230417_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1005&akid=2114%2E5257348%2Et-Fcbo ]EXPRESS DONATE $10

I’ll have much more to say soon once this hearing is over. But for now,
thanks for standing with me in our fight against Trump’s extreme MAGA
enablers in Congress.

— Adam

clean_body: [ ]Adam Schiff for Senate Derek — I’m in New York City today...along with Jim Jordan and the rest of the Republican-controlled House Judiciary Committee. Why? Jordan and Kevin McCarthy are exerting an unprecedented level of political pressure against Manhattan District Attorney Alvin Bragg in a corrupt attempt to block Donald Trump from legal accountability and place him above the rule of law. But no one is above the law. Not even presidents. As I’m in Manhattan calling out Republican efforts to undermine the justice system and meddle in Trump’s criminal case, MAGA trolls and their amplifiers in the right-wing media will be attacking me relentlessly. So before Jim Jordan’s “field hearing” begins, I am urgently asking: [ ]Will you chip in $10 or any amount to our campaign right now so that we are prepared to respond to Republican attacks against my work on the House Judiciary Committee? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $10 [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $25 [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $50 [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $100 [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $250 [ ]ANOTHER AMOUNT I’ll have much more to say soon once this hearing is over. But for now, thanks for standing with me in our fight against Trump’s extreme MAGA enablers in Congress. — Adam [ ]Adam Schiff for Senate Banner [ ]DONATE MONTHLY 150 E. _ “DeSantis is colluding with his globalist handlers to go full Never Trump in order to gaslight the people into thinking that Medicare and Social Security should be ripped away from hard-working Americans. President Trump has made it clear that he will always stand on the side of Americans, and protect benefits seniors worked for and paid for their entire lives.” – Steven Cheung, spokesperson _
As a congressman, Ron DeSantis voted **three times** to raise the eligibility age to 70 to receive full Social Security benefits— [ in 2013 ](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8j7tu6zAQRL9m1VlYrvgQCxb2NdQYuGUSpKPFlcWYCgVRtuO_DxQEaWcGB3P8NKc4PB2YAxCNMRQggmYPRCd5ePuvT6-n427_8s67o1bysbX0D4jW58x_019KzZOPaUvNsQpO0SCwYid0K4w0VolqdA0FVmzZnD2b1jbaK2vlWUiFaM9DU0VHSA1KYYQWJGw9MCK36FtCa3Xfg8TA5ZqHkD99Ch_rcpvmus9Tldy4rnP5-dQBdX3i5VqP-Va4vuQ7UMf3AtQRigaoW3JK2Or6a0rV4sL8iCnFog1IvGwiG_M7AAD__0ZuU-w) , [ in 2014 ](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8j81OwzAQhJ9mc2u03vonPvjQUuUSiSMgbsHeNKYOjuK0pW-PghDXmdGn-fppTnF4ODBHIBpjKEAE-wMQdfL49qy71-60O7y88-6klbxvLT0B0fqY-X_6R6l56mPaUnOqglM0CKzYCd0II41Vohqdb6xVQbI2hEbsZRj6Bsly6L3_UEpV0RHSHqUwQgsSth4YkRvsG0JrtfcgMXC55CHkrz6Fz3W5TnPt81QlN67rXH4_tUCtT7xc6jFfC9fnfANq-VaAWkIhgdolpySMqr-nVC0uzPeYUizagMTzJrIxfwIAAP__Vq5UFg) , and [ in 2015 ](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8j81OwzAQhJ9mc2vk3fgvBx9aqlwqcQTEzdibJtTBUZy29O1REOI6M_o0n5_mNPYPB-YARMMYCxBBsweikzy8PevT6-m427-88-6olbxvLT0B0fqY-X_6R6l58mPaUnOsolPUo6jYobZopGkVVoOzvfeNxeiVUTb4oD84SGItOaoWpalGR4IaIdGgRsK27lkItsJbEm2rQwApIpdL7mP-8il-rst1muuQpyq5YV3n8vupA-pC4uVSD_lauD7nG1DHtwLUkUAF1C05JWxs_T2lanFxvo8pjUUbkOK8iWzMnwAAAP__mjxUcw) .

Ron DeSantis has long embraced plans to cut Social Security and Medicare, as well as raising the eligibility age of both programs, yet the majority of Americans remain united in their opposition to these positions.

Recent polling from [ AP-NORC ](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kM9u8yAQxJ8G34hg-esDh-SLcon0HduqNwxLQ4tjZIgiv33lqupx9zeaGY2fa8lpc8ScCMAtx0YAiDgSgKs8vf3X19frmR5f3pGetZLPncI_AtC3in_SX5cDzj6X_WvOQ3QKEmcDOq4tN9KMig83pxXjOipuvYkBjEhovGJMq2CTsAKH7ICBYJIbrjnw8ZCQMbTMW2DjqEMgkkVsX0uKy92X-NnXx1wPYZmH4m691_bT6ULg4usdn21H-7H2HAoSuLQlZF9ow_BYc9_ojDEHvyINj96or7QupdApR7zTEY0YFVpM6CdtmRbRSD6hDxoTyGlYXazPXEpu2hDJPvYF9sTvAAAA__-RXmg9) showed:
· 79% of U.S. adults oppose cutting Social Security.
· 67% of U.S. adults oppose increasing Medicare premiums.
· 70% of U.S. adults oppose raising the age of Medicare benefits to 70.
· 75% of U.S. adults oppose raising the age for Social Security benefits to 70.
These positions embody the dated and disastrous thinking of an establishment and globalist class in Washington that puts private interests before public good. We cannot allow our nation to return down the path to ruin.

body:
The establishment GOP claims to care about ending affirmative action, critical race, and gender theory in schools, and controlling the southern border | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/b0899aafda6a/jr-majewski-officially-announces-campaign-to-represent-ohios-9th-district-in-congress-8123273?e=0426928d91)
---
[](https://jrforohio.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f8b050a6338dbb74901cdea58&id=e6d166f1ec&e=0426928d91)
Peter,
I'm running for Congress to save Ohio and our country from the radical woke agenda that is corrupting our classrooms and destroying America.

The establishment GOP claims to care about ending affirmative action, critical race, and gender theory in schools, and controlling the southern border. But in reality, they are sacrificing these causes to appease the unpopular fixations of the donor class.

**We need proven conservative fighters in Congress** who will end the radical woke agenda and put America first, not work with Democrats behind closed doors for personal and political gain.

name: Congressman Greg Stanton
subject: SIGN THE PETITION: Protect access to the abortion pill.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
Doctors and scientists should be the ones deciding which medications are safe – not activist judges.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61917545/401650753/-1978803564?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMzODYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjdhZmY0MDMtM2JkZC1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=BOSB629c1Wg1hlskWvagQ4Vg44PC4OE4Qm6j2MVmSvg=&emci=9ff9b7b3-39dd-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=b7aff403-3bdd-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=7714718) Friends,

Women’s access to reproductive health care is a fundamental right. It’s that simple. However, that right is under attack.

A Trump-appointed activist judge in Texas recently issued a bogus ruling that could potentially take the drug mifepristone – the commonly prescribed abortion pill – off the market in the U.S.

**Importantly, the medication is STILL LEGAL, and the Supreme Court has placed a temporary hold on restriction.**

But we can’t sit on the sidelines – we must do everything we can to preserve and protect the FDA’s authority to approve safe and effective medication, including abortion medication. I support the Department of Justice’s efforts to protect access to mifepristone and will continue to advocate for protections in Congress.

**[Doctors and scientists should be the ones deciding which medications are safe – not activist judges. If you agree, will you add your name to my petition?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61917546/401650754/-1978803564?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMzODYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjdhZmY0MDMtM2JkZC1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=BOSB629c1Wg1hlskWvagQ4Vg44PC4OE4Qm6j2MVmSvg=&emci=9ff9b7b3-39dd-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=b7aff403-3bdd-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=7714718)** | [ADD YOUR NAME →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61917547/401650755/-1978803564?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMzODYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjdhZmY0MDMtM2JkZC1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=BOSB629c1Wg1hlskWvagQ4Vg44PC4OE4Qm6j2MVmSvg=&emci=9ff9b7b3-39dd-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=b7aff403-3bdd-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=7714718)

name: Greater Georgia
subject: GREATER GEORGIA URGES DEKALB TO REJECT RADICAL SCHOOL SUPERINTENDENT
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greater Georgia Action, Inc
body:
| | | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE MONDAY, APRIL 17
GREATER GEORGIA URGES DEKALB TO REJECT RADICAL SCHOOL SUPERINTENDENT
ATLANTA - Today, former U.S. Senator and Greater Georgia Chairwoman Kelly Loeffler urged the DeKalb County Board of Education to vote no on the confirmation of Devon Horton for DeKalb County School Superintendent. Greater Georgia, which previously [spoke out](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001WGmgpD0fnOwyujEoR8N220b_Tw7kkmOraH5eYZmNzctZe7xUoTNFUpFKB0o3sLoc9qNJuATkslYtLfqCnPjtDZEEyBt6BuxjYN_JIxxhDybnUM1B5Jp1qNM_J380w4IvDX9HV_tLcNEgtgl4yyrOOVe2Xc7nmFa4QPO6wZr3G5TAIHmSvV50ryxWRjvxVAAklNEEPNCQtLYNn1N_cWgZrwxj5OW5hZv0BIcNA2bC5-bQ1X6UNc6zq6lthYotAwXo&c=E9a-qU3FF-HHvs_NWJfrCaCGoVvNpac590vNobjpIxHtEl67VH9rTQ==&ch=KltRf5TukYhHV46izG6KHKL51uCwVgaPeQ1POXpcJzF-46imBenCEQ==) against partisan curriculum in the Atlanta Public School System, slammed Horton's controversial history of indoctrination and racial discrimination at past school districts.
"One of the greatest threats to future generations is school administrators who utilize classrooms as the conduit for partisan or cultural indoctrination rather than for educational success," said Loeffler. "DeKalb's choice for school superintendent is one such radical activist. With his track record of pushing a progressive worldview onto faculty and students alike, including divisive BLM Inc. curriculum, he's hijacked the education system he is supposed to support. The bottom line is, we fail our children when we abandon teaching basic skills like math and reading to push political agendas. DeKalb County students deserve the best chance at success, which is why Greater Georgia urges the School Board to vote "NO" on the approval of Devon Horton."
Horton, who currently serves as a superintendent in the Chicago area, first became a figure of national controversy in 2020 when he [announced](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001WGmgpD0fnOwyujEoR8N220b_Tw7kkmOraH5eYZmNzctZe7xUoTNFUvRv4qTrUDTxr7tQuyMAxIqM3nx3q4qUOPDSpj2KLIkpPACoFMJrHNEfpQpafIxhfkBV0cRLgFhn2xHhvtrLZVdRKvVaP5aDoN9gdzkZzFaWBgxqIrFJWa_xm96FCxQ_bp-Toee9C3reYUDslSAmbnURiQcPBtceXvytLllpNipb&c=E9a-qU3FF-HHvs_NWJfrCaCGoVvNpac590vNobjpIxHtEl67VH9rTQ==&ch=KltRf5TukYhHV46izG6KHKL51uCwVgaPeQ1POXpcJzF-46imBenCEQ==) that black, brown, and LGBTQ students would return to in-person learning in his school district before other students. When parents objected, Horton [lashed out](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001WGmgpD0fnOwyujEoR8N220b_Tw7kkmOraH5eYZmNzctZe7xUoTNFUvRv4qTrUDTxvYjC9mp7qg4T9rGZ_BiapQAGMo7mkhfxI6lDuDS9_SCrmIRnug0ig0j_x38Zb0mXlHEXxl4MMwkwob3NwRYW6XTXSTidqaOR0HhKqPnh_HJNgFcoZEcqoVQvyY88j---r4gAxpJ_8GJXgiUNM9kFWuN6ELmpGCGi_uu1zCVwiMxkNplQwOdzUXtCSII5OIrBgyvhMP_6JJ67e8dVpsiXPRezQMnpyUnkIALFSJD6PswDnr5WPOAHJ_d4MLhJ18Xe&c=E9a-qU3FF-HHvs_NWJfrCaCGoVvNpac590vNobjpIxHtEl67VH9rTQ==&ch=KltRf5TukYhHV46izG6KHKL51uCwVgaPeQ1POXpcJzF-46imBenCEQ==), accusing them of "white supremacist thinking."
He earned further notoriety for becoming one of the first superintendents in the nation to implement "BLM at School" - [collaborating](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001WGmgpD0fnOwyujEoR8N220b_Tw7kkmOraH5eYZmNzctZe7xUoTNFUvRv4qTrUDTxzUw-tSy7Cpw_R35NURsoW5ubGuzw5hl0uhv4KhMWeyHroFMk5Y3lMFIdJQpkWco1jjLoDiG6xJRTyUvSmHTuMX0D_svOjdm3GST5RYtUYZT0HD4S_v0nOo2_72nGoyvOgaQt9Kuho8Nou34kNMnfAFER-OIe7DuYVY13cviGikI92BgGbSoydtirjox3kGmQawJDRSxza58zaVAe3niCyQ==&c=E9a-qU3FF-HHvs_NWJfrCaCGoVvNpac590vNobjpIxHtEl67VH9rTQ==&ch=KltRf5TukYhHV46izG6KHKL51uCwVgaPeQ1POXpcJzF-46imBenCEQ==) with Black Lives Matter activists and local teachers' unions to create a [curriculum](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001WGmgpD0fnOwyujEoR8N220b_Tw7kkmOraH5eYZmNzctZe7xUoTNFUvRv4qTrUDTxPhTizvlwYaHnDb_5_dca9Q2YPy4I55zTJVtJ_RQ1s4WjaHiqGfVyvjSk26kiO6r5bVb6sPSE5v7nJCvb8hOU7uaaw1KCnNgSyju1G_ovEEdKu1RC5wSH2d_c0dZoAmSeq2HnQwa-cGI=&c=E9a-qU3FF-HHvs_NWJfrCaCGoVvNpac590vNobjpIxHtEl67VH9rTQ==&ch=KltRf5TukYhHV46izG6KHKL51uCwVgaPeQ1POXpcJzF-46imBenCEQ==) that aims to "disrupt Western-prescribed nuclear family structure" and "foster a queer-affirming network."
Horton was later [sued](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001WGmgpD0fnOwyujEoR8N220b_Tw7kkmOraH5eYZmNzctZe7xUoTNFUvRv4qTrUDTxeMvwite0Dy_2bxAQl6pvPbY_IESu9LWUW2mqerviOYNIpKwLZ7nmzIidfVjXwjKU6o_juxsfyFvS4DUkVg-VKyg6krhWHsGwHSmd8gyCRC4EW4TVPdczV563010ioNgDKZ0iVvj7jHD9Db6sTXQxGT_Ew2txFWonoCCnjPJYNuA95Q26VHaWQfYBKLJxVv5Y12VILx-qfFrmgUBWS4Sp07ZYbdl7sTi_PRFUJnbfWB9W1H2oLNvrbki_OnIhbVf4&c=E9a-qU3FF-HHvs_NWJfrCaCGoVvNpac590vNobjpIxHtEl67VH9rTQ==&ch=KltRf5TukYhHV46izG6KHKL51uCwVgaPeQ1POXpcJzF-46imBenCEQ==) in 2021 for his racially-charged policies and curriculum - including mandatory training that required teachers to accept that "white individuals are loud, authoritative and controlling" and to "denounce white privilege." Students, meanwhile, were encouraged to sign a "pledge to be anti-racist" as part of their curriculum.
The DeKalb County Board of Education, which selected Horton as its sole finalist for the position of Superintendent, is slated to vote to approve his contract in the [coming days](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001WGmgpD0fnOwyujEoR8N220b_Tw7kkmOraH5eYZmNzctZe7xUoTNFUvRv4qTrUDTxP9jdGSCCUYwA_bds1C7ZdwXOW-28QgdBchR_h9GL1tc68V2wYCi51VcqT6A5ghja4go2Pu_DVQbtKQnHhvVL2mWY6lk-vojV1r94sPKJRdBMZlxZHKCAn1cDANjeLdfLiHmomHBkzRg3OnFqBy3VK3aEkCxRMhkXuj-z9r5WIIXRGAly4GBZ2hhnFRoQNodMhoSobaW4V0RwRUrEbvgfIw==&c=E9a-qU3FF-HHvs_NWJfrCaCGoVvNpac590vNobjpIxHtEl67VH9rTQ==&ch=KltRf5TukYhHV46izG6KHKL51uCwVgaPeQ1POXpcJzF-46imBenCEQ==). Many in the community have criticized a lack of transparency in the Board's selection process - with one board member [admitting](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001WGmgpD0fnOwyujEoR8N220b_Tw7kkmOraH5eYZmNzctZe7xUoTNFUvRv4qTrUDTxo-7N1QtIvyiDZ0GCfm2tWHXa0vdOqLbi9WkDCSPpa5D2MTS4darpvlFGVJ-eVsDQA48Cy3wVOOm4WgS57sxXJC4-c8DSQvvKt7FCjkoJ23uK2HmD1N4MGH7CU7iwp2t9UfkDycp5hrjlMV7Ur_M3gODhZ5LiSsNQO5rGLgZlf8CmhnpfoHKKuHkzU0Fanf7TgkySKTwzmkGduGWDCL4AdNnbScyAh_kI&c=E9a-qU3FF-HHvs_NWJfrCaCGoVvNpac590vNobjpIxHtEl67VH9rTQ==&ch=KltRf5TukYhHV46izG6KHKL51uCwVgaPeQ1POXpcJzF-46imBenCEQ==) that Horton was never actually in the top five candidates for consideration. A bipartisan coalition including a [Democrat lawmaker](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001WGmgpD0fnOwyujEoR8N220b_Tw7kkmOraH5eYZmNzctZe7xUoTNFUvRv4qTrUDTxv-Yk3cjGJ4-wgY7a1Bb17MckRTQTdBbluDfOxD_R2KmfMLb81YjtxIzTJLmf-SJ12dBy8go-9Y7nLjzIatJo4S7gY9kLMofK50UdlVJBtRA7jQgNWN5Nz9Mm4076PZxUwxg4t00W2afznZun_TrzYhZuxP_VHKxjIzMJNLRWDWD0g_XEE1SOxdh8iRceKASPNXGz9edHNmnGU0Mrh_-8Fu6z4J486HdZ&c=E9a-qU3FF-HHvs_NWJfrCaCGoVvNpac590vNobjpIxHtEl67VH9rTQ==&ch=KltRf5TukYhHV46izG6KHKL51uCwVgaPeQ1POXpcJzF-46imBenCEQ==), local [GOP groups](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001WGmgpD0fnOwyujEoR8N220b_Tw7kkmOraH5eYZmNzctZe7xUoTNFUvRv4qTrUDTxe-fC9jJrzqlJ9Fqd3xiYaYdOYq627jnKugTXoAf7wpWn3wIwBaksMcUftjO80y4qM5O4ZcblaYlfseIeRPsMTgMMb2JDHpeMWLo6IxAA-yxMYwIMmZ_d0PHfgstJ_peTV0yFteHYa8a0GbX8iSYcW4IrlOJK4WGJaCsYNwXLK8DUeuv6klGTOtVb89dPmmgCW9Yg5sZUn0FPSybvbZpjLyPKX3mDz2vY&c=E9a-qU3FF-HHvs_NWJfrCaCGoVvNpac590vNobjpIxHtEl67VH9rTQ==&ch=KltRf5TukYhHV46izG6KHKL51uCwVgaPeQ1POXpcJzF-46imBenCEQ==), and the [NAACP](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001WGmgpD0fnOwyujEoR8N220b_Tw7kkmOraH5eYZmNzctZe7xUoTNFUvRv4qTrUDTxprLKw1orVK6AM4wGvfX749KG-VHCBAdkSWZI95zRmTvzhDuJSU6advtlVmKBIxiV6v78lPnCiNamIe5oo7JanirXHdBLCOrQV2wZyrFje6MFDLO_BZslLf5QeIizIo2GZkr8Yvk1notgNOG9CX6o0Hd3p3o06oxWEaNZrVdIT5ffdoMsGNJF7BvfpU_yTsYCZWjpCbd8BEP3BoZ4tNWHuNo6xupMw7cW6Xe8FZ0xgafeFrDKGTtCLw==&c=E9a-qU3FF-HHvs_NWJfrCaCGoVvNpac590vNobjpIxHtEl67VH9rTQ==&ch=KltRf5TukYhHV46izG6KHKL51uCwVgaPeQ1POXpcJzF-46imBenCEQ==) have all spoken out in opposition to Horton. If approved, he would oversee more than 90,000 students - in one of the largest school systems in Georgia.

From believing that biological men can compete in women’s sports to trusting Joe Biden with our national security, they’re taking our country down a dangerous path. And they’re doing it while they rewrite reality in their own woke image. There’s no limit to how far they’ll go to tear apart our great country. But that’s where patriots like you come in. This is important, everyone.
The vast majority of folks who support our campaign do it through emails like this one. I don’t take that for granted!
I’m emailing you because I am hoping that you can be one of the people who take action through this email. **[I’ll explain why below but first, could you please chip in $3 or more right now to ensure that this blue Senate seat stays strong?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61918272/401653587/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk2258-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNzM5ZjUxNy0zZGRkLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jT5ogtNL06-q3ohG7nRgs8zCXe1RdGJfj1AO9X9ywFI=)**

body:
|
---
| Dear Friends, Are you already enjoying the privileges of being a Common Sense Club member? If not, now's your chance to join the ranks of those committed to restoring common sense in New Jersey and beyond. As a Common Sense Club member, you'll have unique opportunities to engage with influential community leaders and fellow conservatives who share your passion for making a difference. **This Thursday, April 20th, at 5:45 PM EDT, Bill Spadea is hosting small group Zoom call + live Q &A session exclusively for our valued members. Bill will be discussing the latest developments in New Jersey, providing updates on the club's accomplishments, and answering your questions LIVE.** **If you're already a member, watch your inbox for the private Zoom link arriving tomorrow.** If you're not a member yet, act fast because we have... **[⚠️ ONLY A FEW MEMBERSHIPS LEFT! ⚠️ Don't miss out on this LIMITED opportunity – secure your membership now!](https://xtz223.keap-link012.com/v2/click/5a498ae1f3bdf4670136329905507d6a/eJyNkMEKgkAQht9lzpa5W0TeQkTE8hB1jkWn3NJ12abMwndvrehU0PWfb77hnzsQKqEozsGHK90Y4-CAwUxqiYqCWpHInlM2GXvcc6CU6hiZ-qzBv39d_gB9PPOmDlCr0RLr1TxI4jTaLuI0saAWxp74SzPl_KMJl_N4AV3304uVpPBi1SfwyZyx75NL24k2prR8QaRPvus2TTM81FJRgTu5L4iNGB9mdeX24QArIUtrE1qjyt-PSLB9ObsHiulmlQ==)** By joining the Common Sense Club, you'll be granted access to Thursday's EXCLUSIVE SESSION with Bill Spadea, where YOU can discuss pressing issues, share your thoughts, and learn from one of the foremost conservative voices in our community.
---

CLAIM YOUR MEMBERSHIP HERE! ](https://xtz223.keap-link012.com/v2/click/d7f8d8b3cfec05b821cf9effc60e4ad0/eJyNkE0LgkAQhv_LnC1zt4i8iYiI1SHqHItOuaXrsk3ZB_731gpPBV3feeYZ3nkAoRKKkhx8uNKdMQ4OGMyklqgorBWJ7DVlk7HHPQdKqY6xqc8a_MfX5R7o4pk3cYBuGi2xXgVhmizj7TxZphbUwtgTf2mmnPeaaBEkc2jbn16sJEUXqz6BT-aMXZ9c2k60MaXlCyJ98l23aZrhoZaKCtzJfUFsxPgwqyu3CwdYCVlam9AaVf55RIq3t7N9Aok7ZpM=)

| Membership in the Common Sense Club also entitles you to numerous benefits based on your chosen tier, such as:
* **Access to exclusive member-only events**
* **Opportunities to network with like-minded individuals**
* **A limited-edition Common Sense Club Swag**
* **Priority seating at events**

name: =?UTF-8?B?SGlsbHNkYWxlIENvbGxlZ2UgdmlhIOKYhkNJ?=
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsAKFsiDNo

A movement is growing, led by progressives-but supported by many
well-meaning Americans-to change the way we elect our president.

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osAKFsiDNo

Please see a special message from our
sponsor:

Dear
Fellow American,

I am
enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

It will
only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our
nation's future.

A
movement is growing, led by progressives-but supported by many
well-meaning Americans-to change the way we elect our president.
In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as
devised by the Framers of our Constitution.

That's
why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on
Presidential Selection.

By
completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as
possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand
the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue-views we
will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.

You can
complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using
the link below:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61712287:sAKFsiDNo:m:3:2532013465:580EC6967EC1757DBF8D2D6AE24C8734:r

Do you
think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College
works and its role in preserving free and representative
government?
YES
NO

For most
of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the
Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it
was considered essential to preserving free and representative
government.

But
today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an
attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.

This
movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because
of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with
a proper grounding in American civics-too many Americans simply
don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including
the Electoral College, to liberty.

Because
of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission
on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of
Americans in all 50 states.

These
efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of
our schools, include:

Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online
courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American
Story: A Land of Hope;"

Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide
with Imprimis, Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;

Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets
popular with young people;

Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding
documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and

Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and
guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of
charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including
American civics) to thousands of American educators and
homeschoolers.

Your
answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will
help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate
millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to
liberty-including the importance of the Electoral College.

And this
is especially important in this critical time for America's
future.

So please
share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National
Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon
as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.

You can
take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61712287:sAKFsiDNo:m:3:2532013465:580EC6967EC1757DBF8D2D6AE24C8734:r

And after
you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting
Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Since
1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty."
Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach
efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government
funding-not even indirectly in the form of federal or state
student grants or loans.

The
support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.

Please
represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential
Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention-and for
your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm
regards,

Larry P.
Arnn

President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing
Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system January 18, 2022.
For more information please follow the URL below:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/isAKFsiDNo

Follow the URL below to update your preferences or opt-out:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osAKFsiDNo

To unsubscribe from future mailings, send an email to mailto:unsub-72009821846-echo3-01BC03BEA09C6755B15691031F0C9AF5@emailsendr.net?Subject=Unsubscribe&body=Please%20remove%20me%20from%20further%20mailings
with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line.

The new rule is reminiscent of Trump's transit ban — which we successfully advocated against and a federal court declared illegal.

subject: Momentum is picking up!

body:
we are full steam ahead
#
Peter, momentum is picking up! As you may have noticed, many Democratic Senators have launched their re-election campaigns this month.
Why is this? Because we are full steam ahead towards election day and ensuring we can defend our Democratic Senate majority next year is going to take all hands on deck.
Republicans across the country have been strategizing around the clock to take back the Senate — but we are not going to back down from this fight.
**Reproductive health care, gun reform, LGBTQ+ rights, and so many more issues hang in the balance.**
**[If you’re ready to join us, pitch in $5 or whatever you can right now to help us keep this momentum going and defend our Senate majority.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61918594/401655398/-1001897696?refcode=dd_em_230417_1_t1_b&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOGMzYmJjNi0zZWRkLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zinAVX6axHLo_szgiVGvp6R_6RJBSAe9lOjNSJf6OEE=)**
**Thirty-three seats are on the line** , 20 of which are currently held by Dems. With a majority as slim as we have now, this is truly anyone's game. **We have to be prepared to defend every seat.**
**[Contribute $5 today to help us meet our mid-month fundraising goal and stay on track to win in 2024.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61918595/401655399/-1001897696?refcode=dd_em_230417_1_t1_b&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOGMzYmJjNi0zZWRkLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zinAVX6axHLo_szgiVGvp6R_6RJBSAe9lOjNSJf6OEE=)**
Every donation, no matter the size, makes a difference in these critical races.
Thank you for all your continued support,
Team Durbin

name: Gabby Giffords
subject: April 17, 2013
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
In honor of ten years since the Senate’s vote against universal background checks after the Sandy Hook tragedy, I hope you’ll join me in renewing our call to action by demanding that Congress pass universal background checks at the federal level.
#

[](https://go.giffords.org/signup/giffords_em_ubcpetition_apr23/?source=em230417-1-15&refcode2=5231.3935704.UPf3n5&akid=5231%2E3935704%2EUPf3n5)
---
April 17, 2013.
It’s a day that I’ll never forget.
On this day, a minority in the Senate used the filibuster to block legislation to expand background checks shortly after the tragedy at Sandy Hook Elementary School.
Today is April 17, 2023, exactly ten years after that dark day, and we are still fighting to enact universal background checks at the federal level.
I know that this may be frustrating to hear. But I want you to understand that we still have made significant progress in our movement.
Ten years ago, what we’ve accomplished would have been unimaginable. Many of our elected officials didn’t even want to talk about gun violence out of fear of sparking too much political division.
But year after year, Democrats, Republicans, Independents, and gun owners alike have joined us in our movement and said enough is enough.
Even though there’s so much more to be done, our elected officials have taken action. Just last year, Congress passed the most significant gun safety legislation package in nearly three decades.
So yes, progress has been made. But we must keep moving forward. Just this past weekend, we witnessed multiple heartbreaking tragedies: over 20 people were shot at a sweet sixteen birthday party in Alabama. The Louisville community is reeling again after two people were killed and four others were injured at a shooting in a park. In St. Louis, 16 year old Ralph Yarl was shot in the head simply for ringing the wrong doorbell.
We cannot become numb to this violence. We must work together to stop this.
[**In honor of ten years since the Senate’s vote against universal background checks after the Sandy Hook tragedy, I hope you’ll join me in renewing our call to action by demanding that Congress pass universal background checks at the federal level. Add your name to our petition here:**](https://go.giffords.org/signup/giffords_em_ubcpetition_apr23/?source=em230417-1-15&refcode2=5231.3935704.UPf3n5&akid=5231%2E3935704%2EUPf3n5)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://go.giffords.org/signup/giffords_em_ubcpetition_apr23/?source=em230417-1-15&refcode2=5231.3935704.UPf3n5&akid=5231%2E3935704%2EUPf3n5)**
Thank you for standing with me in this crucial fight.
Onward,
Gabby Giffords

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1&akid=5231%2E3935704%2EUPf3n5) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: Dr. Ibraheem Samirah
subject: Gov. Youngkin is taking Virginia back to Jim Crow
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Samirah for State Senate
body:
We need to fight for our fundamental right to vote | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61919194/401657766/-1410322864?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83Mjc4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYmM3ZTZlMC00MGRkLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fevHhhmBJE_wO380TTDzgbJ8b9kRL_cwoVzTlmB3h1U=&emci=b7ff49da-40dd-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=dbc7e6e0-40dd-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=14089178) Derek, I want to say thank you to so many of you who have taken the time to fill out the survey and share with me what matters to you most. As many of you shared, one of the biggest issues concerning so many Virginians right now is voting rights. [**Virginians need a representative who will fight at the front lines of the issues that matter most. That’s why I’m running to represent Loudoun — but I can’t do it alone. Will you chip in to elect a true voting rights champion to the Virginia State Senate?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61919195/401657767/-1088863227?refcode=em-20230417&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83Mjc4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYmM3ZTZlMC00MGRkLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fevHhhmBJE_wO380TTDzgbJ8b9kRL_cwoVzTlmB3h1U=) **[Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61919196/401657768/-1088863227?refcode=em-20230417&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83Mjc4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYmM3ZTZlMC00MGRkLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fevHhhmBJE_wO380TTDzgbJ8b9kRL_cwoVzTlmB3h1U=)** [Governor Glenn Youngkin has taken upon himself to decide which returning Virginia citizens should be allowed to vote.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61919197/401657769/-456879943?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83Mjc4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYmM3ZTZlMC00MGRkLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fevHhhmBJE_wO380TTDzgbJ8b9kRL_cwoVzTlmB3h1U=&emci=b7ff49da-40dd-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=dbc7e6e0-40dd-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=14089178) And what’s worse is that he implemented this policy without any public discussion. Now Virginians have to apply for the restoration of their voting rights after they have served their time, and the Governor’s administration decides who gets their rights back or not. At his sole discretion. **This is taking Virginia back into the Jim Crow Era. We cannot stand by and watch our fellow Virginians lose their voting rights at the hands of regressive politicians.** When it comes to criminal justice, I’m an advocate for rehabilitation, not retribution. And that’s exactly what we’re talking about here: these Virginians are still being punished after they’ve already served their time, when they are meant to be reentering our society. Look, Derek, this is the type of battle that I’ll be taking on as your next State Senator and fighting to win. **[But I can’t win this fight alone, I need your support. If you’re ready to fight with me, will you pitch $5, $27, or whatever you can afford so that we have all the tools to win this seat and fight for working-class Virginians?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61919198/401657770/-1088863227?refcode=em-20230417&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83Mjc4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYmM3ZTZlMC00MGRkLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fevHhhmBJE_wO380TTDzgbJ8b9kRL_cwoVzTlmB3h1U=)** We need to build a progressive community that works for all Virginians and that starts with making sure that folks don’t lose their most basic rights. In solidarity, Dr. Ibraheem Samirah | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61919199/401657771/966826497?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83Mjc4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYmM3ZTZlMC00MGRkLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fevHhhmBJE_wO380TTDzgbJ8b9kRL_cwoVzTlmB3h1U=&emci=b7ff49da-40dd-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=dbc7e6e0-40dd-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=14089178) | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61919200/401657772/1897281395?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83Mjc4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYmM3ZTZlMC00MGRkLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fevHhhmBJE_wO380TTDzgbJ8b9kRL_cwoVzTlmB3h1U=&emci=b7ff49da-40dd-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=dbc7e6e0-40dd-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=14089178) | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61919201/401657773/1000175125?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83Mjc4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYmM3ZTZlMC00MGRkLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fevHhhmBJE_wO380TTDzgbJ8b9kRL_cwoVzTlmB3h1U=&emci=b7ff49da-40dd-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=dbc7e6e0-40dd-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=14089178)

Peter,

Extremist Republicans across the country are passing dangerous and hateful legislation that attacks LGBTQ+ Americans.

While legislators should be focused on increasing access to affordable healthcare, ending gun violence, and creating jobs, extremist Republicans are instead spending their time banning drag shows and attacking the LGBTQ+ community.

But Seth and the Democrats are fighting back. There is no place in our country for hate and discrimination, and we have to keep up the fight to protect LGBTQ+ Americans and ensure equality for every person in our country.

[Stand with Seth in the fight to defend the LGBTQ+ community by adding your name to our petition today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61919209/401657884/-1857058467?source=EM_NBI_SM_20230417_PT_lgbtq_0_6MO_sethmagaziner.com_NA_NA_lgbtq&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYmI0NGFmYy00MGRkLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0rnMcgWXuoPwFEvnHpDrMBRHOAKnpr0MWgVCdmmCLBk=&emci=d9b44afc-40dd-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=ebb44afc-40dd-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=15384964)

body:
It’s decision time, Friend

| | | Friend, I need you to make a critical decision today: _**[Will you let radical leftists who want to brainwash, indoctrinate, and radicalize our children win a critical election next month?](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z7rlces99i2ohnlimla91d3949g65aad2o5kfamg_rp22sh2s8i66o74cthmaoj6chh2bs)**_ OR _**[Will you join proven conservative leaders like Ben Shapiro and Tucker Carlson and stand up for our children, their parents, and their future?](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z01ksae3cmpes76jma5p5upaifvenjb4j4h7em28_rp22sh2s8i66o74cthmaoj6chh2bs)**_ Let me take a step back: My name is Ryan Girdusky and I founded the 1776 Project PAC **_all by myself in my apartment in New York_**. I designed the PAC from the ground up to help brave conservatives take back their local school boards, county by county, NATIONWIDE! And so far, we’ve had INCREDIBLE SUCCESS: **In fact, we’ve won more than 132 school board races across the country, including over 2 dozen on April 4th in Wisconsin!** And that’s why Ben Shapiro and Tucker Carlson expressed their support for our movement:

**_“If you’re thinking of writing a check... Consider writing it to Ryan Girdusky [Founder of the 1776 Project PAC]”_** **_\- Tucker Carlson_**

**_“Shout out to Ryan Girdusky who is doing an excellent job with the 1776 Project PAC.”_**** _\- Ben Shapiro_** Our goal is to support 250 more conservative candidates across the country by the end of 2023! **[Friend, I’m personally asking you to please rush in a donation of just $17.76 ASAP to help fund our next slate of candidates in May!](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zgk12mlgsf42ko8s87sv81fc4v57tiro25d6u78g_rp22sh2s8i66o74cthmaoj6chh2bs)** Time is RUNNING OUT, friend. We’re only a few weeks away from gearing up for this critical election and we need your help now more than ever before. Thank you, Ryan

clean_body: | | Team, Abortion attacks are coming down all across the country in the wake of Roe v. Wade — and the latest anti-abortion decision from a Texas judge could have nationwide impacts on abortion access. 80% of Americans want to see abortion protected, yet extremist officials who have been elected or appointed to office are operating in direct opposition to what the majority of their constituents want. We need to show our strength in numbers and make sure these anti-abortion extremists know just how many people they are up against. We refuse to sit by while attacks on abortion access and reproductive health care happen in states across the country. That’s why we’ve started to deploy ballot measures to secure our permanent reproductive freedom. And it’s working. In 5 states just last November, the overwhelming majority of voters cast their ballots in favor of protecting abortion access in their home state. We’re gearing up for more ballot measure campaigns in 2023 and beyond to protect reproductive freedom for good. Thanks for your help, friend. — Fairness Project Thanks to grassroots supporters like you, our team at the Fairness Project has won 31 people-powered ballot measure campaigns since 2016, changing over 18 million lives by expanding health care, raising wages, guaranteeing paid leave, and ending predatory lending directly at the ballot box when politicians refuse to act. Your support allows us to make this progress possible.** = = Contributions or gifts to the Fairness Project are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. name: =?utf-8?Q?Amanda=20St.=20George?=
subject: Hey, did you see your invite?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Washington State Republican Party
body:
Join us in the fight to move Washington State in the RIGHT direction! | | |
---
| | [ ](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=fa326d32bf&e=6a281f566d)
---
| |
---
| Hi Peter,

I hope this email finds you well! I wanted to make sure you saw the invitation to the upcoming Heart of the Party events hosted by the Washington State Republican Party. These gatherings are a fantastic opportunity to connect with fellow Republicans, elected officials, and party leaders.

In case you missed the details, I've forwarded the original email below for your reference. Remember, these events are a great way to stay informed and engaged with the party. We hope you'll join us and show your support!
---
| [Kennewick Banquet - May 6th](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=b337cf6c61&e=6a281f566d "Kennewick Banquet - May 6th")
---
| [Spokane Reception - June 27th](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=55bf579ff9&e=6a281f566d "Spokane Reception - June 27th")
---
| [Maple Valley Reception - July 21st](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=a6724cc225&e=6a281f566d "Maple Valley Reception - July 21st")
---
| If you haven't already, be sure to register for one of the events near you - we look forward to seeing you there!

Best regards,

Amanda St. George
Director of Administrative Services
Washington State Republican Party
---
|
---
| **BEGIN FORWARDED MESSAGE:**
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com

Dear Peter,

We're thrilled to announce our upcoming "Heart of the Party" events, a series of receptions designed for you to connect with fellow Republicans, meet elected officials, and celebrate the heart of our party - YOU!

This year, we're offering three fantastic opportunities for you to be part of the excitement:

🌟 [May 6th: Heart of the Party Banquet - Kennewick](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=dc4b041b24&e=6a281f566d): Join us at our Heart of the Party banquet, the culmination of our Republican Action Conference! Featuring keynote speaker Liz Harrington, Trump Spokesperson, and State Representative Jim Walsh - this is an event you won't want to miss! Mingle with party members and enjoy an unforgettable evening at the Red Lion Hotel, Kennewick Columbia Center, on May 6th. [Amplify your experience by joining us for the full Republican Action Conference that weekend!](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=8d0bbbf27a&e=6a281f566d)

🌟 [June 27th: Heart of the Party Reception - Spokane](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=5699b87993&e=6a281f566d): Come and meet Rep. Cathy McMorris Rodgers, U.S. Representative for Washington's 5th congressional district, amd Chairman of the House Energy and Commerce Committee at our 5th Annual Heart of the Party Reception in Spokane. Rep. McMorris Rodgers is a national leader and this is a great opportunity to hear the imact she is having on national policy. Come and connect with fellow Republicans and share your thoughts on the future of our party.

🌟 [July 21st: Heart of the Party Reception - Maple Valley](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=daddfbd3c5&e=6a281f566d): Join us in Maple Valley for an evening with Republican candidates and local elected Republicans, like King County Councilmember Reagan Dunn. This is your chance to learn more about their vision for our great state and show your support.

Don't miss these incredible events that bring together the most passionate and dedicated members of our party and help build the framework for success in 2023 and 2024!
---
| [Reserve your spot today!](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=a3a92bf897&e=6a281f566d "Reserve your spot today!")
---
| We look forward to seeing you there!

-Team WAGOP
---
| | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/wsrp/heart-of-the-party-1340932?e=6a281f566d)
---

subject: Tell Republicans: “You built the debt. Don’t lecture us on it, and don't default on it”
body:
| | | | |
---
| | | [Tell Republicans: “You built the debt. Don’t lecture us on it, and don't default on it”](https://default.salsalabs.org/T74c8c074-bc0e-4c49-8b59-0febad69bdce/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9171d738-468c-4c12-89a3-5355fcd21f6d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Congressional Republicans are refusing to raise the debt limit, threatening to push America into default, and tank our economy. And now [Kevin McCarthy is lecturing Democrats](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3d4ddc22-7fc4-4140-8c78-fe4681c09a61/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) about the need to cut the debt, which is really rich, considering that **Republicans are the ones who largely built it.** \- Every Republican president in the last 40 years left a larger deficit that the one he inherited. \- Every Democratic president in that same period left a smaller deficit. \- Donald Trump sent the deficit through the roof — nearly 1/4 of the entire national debt came during Trump's 4 years. \- President Biden has already cut the annual deficit by nearly 50%. Republicans like to lecture about the debt, but they are a disaster when it comes to doing anything about it. It's time for them to shut up, let the adults do the work, and not force us into default. [**Tell Republicans: "You built the debt. Don't lecture us on it, and don't default on it"**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T594c6af7-a93e-4542-a75a-6e0cc8068878/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

From creating more jobs in the first two years of ANY president in history to signing the Inflation Reduction Act into law, **President Biden has gone above and beyond in his first two years in office to meet the challenges Americans face, friend. **

One of his greatest accomplishments was signing the most comprehensive gun safety bill in decades, the Bipartisan Safer Communities Act, into law. **This bill provides critical resources to help prevent gun violence, but President Biden is continuing to fight to end the gun violence epidemic in America.**

After recent shootings in Nashville and Louisville, President Biden re-upped his call for a BAN on the military-style assault weapons that are the weapons of choice in these violent acts. **But the GOP would rather put their donations from the gun lobby ahead of the American people.**

President Biden won't back down – and neither will we. We're grateful for his dedication to this critical fight, but with the GOP doing everything they can to attack him and sink his approval ratings, we launched an urgent poll to see where top Democrats stand.

**Please, friend, tell us what you think before midnight >>**

This bill provides critical resources to help prevent gun violence, but President Biden is continuing to fight to end the gun violence epidemic in America. After recent shootings in Nashville and Louisville, President Biden re-upped his call for a BAN on the military-style assault weapons that are the weapons of choice in these violent acts. But the GOP would rather put their donations from the gun lobby ahead of the American people. President Biden won't back down – and neither will we. We're grateful for his dedication to this critical fight, but with the GOP doing everything they can to attack him and sink his approval ratings, we launched an urgent poll to see where top Democrats stand. Please, friend, tell us what you think before midnight >> | | | | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. | | Paid for by AB PAC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. American Bridge 21st Century 800 Maine Ave SW Suite 400 Washington, DC 20024 United States

name: Team Granite Solutions
subject: Join Granite Staters for the Parental Rights Rally Tomorrow Morning
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Granite Solutions, Joe Sweeney Chairman
body:
Support Parental Rights Rally Tomorrow!

| | | | | [](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fgranitesolutions%2Fexpand-majorities/1/0100018790437282-a263f849-537d-4618-94c6-24f6369f15aa-000000/AvnzY-WcWigtYvM27iXllrksCmk=317)
---
| | Derek,

As concerned Granite Staters, we believe that parents have a fundamental right to know what their children are learning in school and to have the final say in their education. That's why we're urging you to join other concerned citizens at the State House lawn tomorrow at 9 AM for the Parental Rights Rally.

---
[](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Fevents%2F5622411097864821/1/0100018790437282-a263f849-537d-4618-94c6-24f6369f15aa-000000/_9v2erSfdc2K-NXzAsI7ZRmozgY=317)
---
Unfortunately, Democrats and special interest groups want to keep parents in the dark about what's happening in New Hampshire public classrooms. They want to give school administrators and staff the power to keep secret the on-campus activities of our children regarding sex and gender. This is not only unacceptable but also goes against our values and principles of transparency and accountability.

Together, we can make a difference and ensure that our voices are heard. Let's send a strong message to our elected officials that Granite Staters demand transparency and accountability in our schools.

Please spread the word and bring your friends and family to the rally. Let's show our elected officials that we will not stand for any legislation that undermines our parental rights.

Thank you for your support, and we hope to see you tomorrow!

Best,

\- Team Granite Solutions

---
| | [Donate to Granite Solutions](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fgranitesolutions%2Fexpand-majorities/2/0100018790437282-a263f849-537d-4618-94c6-24f6369f15aa-000000/3KGvegH7faZiKuwE1uMhgY7hHHE=317 "Donate to Granite Solutions")

Friend,
I sat down with Tucker Carlson last week for my FIRST INTERVIEW since I was arrested and arraigned.
_Tucker asked if there 's **ANYTHING** the Democrats could throw at me that would make me drop out of the presidential race._
Without hesitation, I said, _**" NO. I'D NEVER DROP OUT."**_
Because the fate of America hangs in the balance - and I will _NEVER SURRENDER_ our country to the radical Left.
If an unjust, and possibly illegal, ARREST didn't even make me flinch - then I promise you, NOTHING WILL.
**Now, I 'm asking YOU to stand with me as the Left tries to throw everything they can at us to _force me out of the presidential election._**

body:
| | | Over the weekend, the Governor of the failed state of California, Gavin Newsom, came to Mississippi to campaign for Mississippi Democrats.

It’s no surprise that Democrats recruited an out-of-state, far-Left socialist to come and bolster their liberal agenda.
**But Gavin Newsom didn’t come to Mississippi empty-handed -_he brought big California money, and he’s launching a $10 MILLION PAC to attack me_. **
Far-Left coastal money is FLOODING our great state, and I need YOUR help to fight it.
[**Join me today to keep California policies OUT of the Hospitality state!**](http://mail.tateforourstate.com/u/click?_t=e163c146c72243a2a9464e8d755030ab&_m=ce1f09bdc42d4210841f2d77521ea757&_e=AQjaLLTLPHXckwkZ6UT8shdE_apCKAbFzhwiD4ppiDqJ7ZkOxvXGt58gvNHCWc5gWcvqn1DAIW-Au-cjz_FRBMdq50WBROA8NC108AUfOUnv7c1O6TPcuF4JJL4E1porwTB8rm_nt00aH6p2n4JwSxgcNjWzObfiY1mPbxGA0Fc_I3RoRnyl8J1ZxVo-i8Dovvg_tFkk9q_tp6JZ54VQYakx2Jc0se-jvWQXiv-Wf7oQN1Y6NewaqBGcLW4KG_JhCqPlr-SlgtkxuWXvGn37Ckr7hcZQZXiGFGCKol5WvMRa_Z0cDH1Klk_4l_pB8Xb4iB6T7cUTw1x4XFqY8a58sWiraKh9IVYa7INQtidOuwE%3D)

Gavin Newsom is on a mission to make every state in America the same blue failure as his home state.

name: Judicial Watch Tipsheet
subject: Judicial Watch Sues FBI For Records on Hunter Biden Gun Scandal
body:
Judicial Watch announced recently that it filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit for FBI records about the gun owned by Hunter Biden that reportedly was thrown in a trash can behind a Delaware grocery store.

### [Judicial Watch Sues MD Police for Records on Illegal Protests Outside SCOTUS Justices Homes ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62989&L=29324&F=H&&hash=991f3810f4be3d4fe67baed664eab1e2e9ae1f1b3ac553e42bdb612854b11e70) CNS News The Montgomery County Police Department in Maryland has not responded to a standard and legal Public Information Act (PIA) request for records and communications about the ongoing protests outside the homes of some Supreme Court justices. clean_body: Judicial Watch announced recently that it filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit for FBI records about the gun owned by Hunter Biden that reportedly was thrown in a trash can behind a Delaware grocery store. | | | | | | Because no one is above the law! | Apr 17, 2023 ---|---|--- Today's Top Stories | | | | | “The FBI and Secret Service have both been implicated in a corrupt clean-up operation to protect Hunter Biden from the criminal consequences of his gun scandal,” said Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton. ---|--- | | | | | Since the leak of the Dobbs draft opinion, leftists targeted conservative justices’ homes with protests in violation of federal law, which prohibits “interfering with, obstructing, or impeding the administration of justice ... with the intent of influencing any judge, juror, witness, or court officer.” Several justices received death threats and, on June 8, 2022, a heavily armed man was arrested outside Justice Kavanaugh’s home in Bethesda, and was charged with attempted murder. ---|--- | | | | | A year after launching an extensive Equity Action Plan that gave around $2 billion to “small disadvantaged businesses,” the nation’s space agency wants to do more to advance racial equity and support underserved communities with the billions of dollars in grants and contracts it distributes annually. To complete this important mission the National Aeronautics and Space Administration (NASA) is seeking input from the public on the barriers and challenges that prevent members of underserved communities from receiving funds. ---|--- | | | | | As part of the Biden administration’s push for governmentwide racial equity, a new research center dedicated to supporting and investigating the needs of low-income Hispanics will be launched with a $1.5 million grant from the Department of Health and Human Services (HHS). The goal is to develop promising approaches to promote social and economic well-being among poor Hispanics and to assess current government policies and practices that contribute to disparities in access to public services, a recently published grant announcement states. ---|--- | | | CNS News The Montgomery County Police Department in Maryland has not responded to a standard and legal Public Information Act (PIA) request for records and communications about the ongoing protests outside the homes of some Supreme Court justices. As a result, Judicial Watch has filed a PIA lawsuit against the police department in the Montgomery Circuit Court for those records. The Daily Caller Government watchdog Judicial Watch sued the Department Homeland Security (DHS) Wednesday for allegedly failing to disclose documents related to its censorship activities. The lawsuit stems from an unanswered December 2022 FOIA request for communications records between Cybersecurity and Information Security Agency (CISA) officials and social media platforms. The request sought information relating to activities revealed in the Twitter files, such as the “industry meetings” the FBI, DHS and other government agencies held with tech companies. New York Post A son of billionaire George Soros has quietly become a de-facto White House “ambassador,” making at least 14 visits there on behalf of the far-left kingmaker since President Joe Biden took office, records reviewed by The Post show. Alexander Soros — a prolific Democratic fundraiser in his own right who likes to boast about his relationships with world leaders on social media — scored at least a dozen meetings with White House officials in 2022, according to recently updated White House visitor logs. Soros, 37, also participated in two other confabs there in late 2021, the records show. | CLIPS | | | | | | Keep our investigators on the job uncovering the truth: | | | | | ---|---|--- Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800, Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 (C)2017-2023, All Rights Reserved |

name: Rick Larsen
subject: Sign my Petition: Pass the America Votes Act
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Citizens to Elect Rick Larsen
body:
Did you see my email last month?

I need your help to pass the America Votes Act. The Republican leadership has bottled up the America Votes Act — refusing to give it a committee hearing, let alone a vote.

All Americans have the right to vote and Congress needs to pass the America Votes Act to protect that right across the country. [https://takeaction.ricklarsen.org/a/petition-ava-e?contactdata=ZuvBJUiNGDdHRFkyi4CmDQbQkPtf8tz36duEgDv43YRGNAtwwevIxGR+LX4CpaxgQipbtkX8NJvTx2hyEtuOBneVZfwhVnFNbJjYnX+o2Md4sv6B17WdbtJ61DAmZJoLBGcNXhD/BlHDNC1fs7PZ4w==]

Sign the Petition [https://takeaction.ricklarsen.org/a/petition-ava-e?contactdata=ZuvBJUiNGDdHRFkyi4CmDQbQkPtf8tz36duEgDv43YRGNAtwwevIxGR+LX4CpaxgQipbtkX8NJvTx2hyEtuOBneVZfwhVnFNbJjYnX+o2Md4sv6B17WdbtJ61DAmZJoLBGcNXhD/BlHDNC1fs7PZ4w==]

For generations, Americans have fought to expand the right to vote. Now it is our turn to ensure that Americans do not lose the right to vote. Sign the petition and help us safeguard everyone's rights. [https://takeaction.ricklarsen.org/a/petition-ava-e?contactdata=ZuvBJUiNGDdHRFkyi4CmDQbQkPtf8tz36duEgDv43YRGNAtwwevIxGR+LX4CpaxgQipbtkX8NJvTx2hyEtuOBneVZfwhVnFNbJjYnX+o2Md4sv6B17WdbtJ61DAmZJoLBGcNXhD/BlHDNC1fs7PZ4w==]

Rick
