Forwarded Message

https://www.ricklarsen.org [https://www.ricklarsen.org]

Washington does voter ID right.I love how easily we can vote here in Washington state, and I think people around the country should be able to vote with the same ease.

In the previous Congress, I included this bill in the For the People Act, but despite passing the House the bill did not receive a vote in the Senate. So this year, Congressman Marc Veasey (TX-33) and I reintroduced the bill to make it easier for Americans to register to vote and cast their ballots.

Across the country many states are tightening their voter registration laws – making it harder to register to vote and cast their ballot without a very specific form of ID.

In the first three months of this year, more than 150 restrictive voting bills have been introduced across the country . Of those, at least 32 bills would require voters to show their ID at the polls in order to vote.

These voter ID laws suppress people's ability to vote and disproportionately affect marginalized communities and communities of color.

For example, 25 percent of Black adults do not have a government-issued ID. Now compare that to the eight percent of white adults who do not have a government issued ID. And why are there so many Black people without ID? Many elderly Black citizens were born at home, in rural poverty, and so no birth certificate was ever issued.

Additionally, of the more than 700,000 transgender people in non-vote-by-mail-states, nearly 43 percent do not have an ID that reflects their correct name and gender. These laws are voter suppression and they affect the lives of real people.

this is wholly unacceptable. In Washington we have seen how great voting is when we make it easy and accessible. We believe every American deserves to exercise their rights regardless of whether or not they have a driver's license.

The America Votes Act will make it easier for folks to register to vote and cast their ballot because it will remove burdensome voter ID laws that disproportionately affect marginalized communities.

Democracy only works if we all have a voice. That is why I am asking Congress to pass the America Votes Act so we can ensure every American can have a voice.

More soon,

Rick

clean_body: Did you see my email last month? I need your help to pass the America Votes Act. The Republican leadership has bottled up the America Votes Act — refusing to give it a committee hearing, let alone a vote. All Americans have the right to vote and Congress needs to pass the America Votes Act to protect that right across the country. [==] Sign the Petition [==] For generations, Americans have fought to expand the right to vote. Now it is our turn to ensure that Americans do not lose the right to vote. Sign the petition and help us safeguard everyone's rights. [==] Rick Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: $5 [] $15 [] $25 [] $50 [] Forwarded Message [] Washington does voter ID right.I love how easily we can vote here in Washington state, and I think people around the country should be able to vote with the same ease. In the previous Congress, I included this bill in the For the People Act, but despite passing the House the bill did not receive a vote in the Senate. So this year, Congressman Marc Veasey (TX-33) and I reintroduced the bill to make it easier for Americans to register to vote and cast their ballots. Across the country many states are tightening their voter registration laws – making it harder to register to vote and cast their ballot without a very specific form of ID. In the first three months of this year, more than 150 restrictive voting bills have been introduced across the country . Of those, at least 32 bills would require voters to show their ID at the polls in order to vote. These voter ID laws suppress people's ability to vote and disproportionately affect marginalized communities and communities of color. For example, 25 percent of Black adults do not have a government-issued ID. Now compare that to the eight percent of white adults who do not have a government issued ID. And why are there so many Black people without ID? Many elderly Black citizens were born at home, in rural poverty, and so no birth certificate was ever issued. Additionally, of the more than 700,000 transgender people in non-vote-by-mail-states, nearly 43 percent do not have an ID that reflects their correct name and gender. These laws are voter suppression and they affect the lives of real people. this is wholly unacceptable. In Washington we have seen how great voting is when we make it easy and accessible. We believe every American deserves to exercise their rights regardless of whether or not they have a driver's license. The America Votes Act will make it easier for folks to register to vote and cast their ballot because it will remove burdensome voter ID laws that disproportionately affect marginalized communities. Democracy only works if we all have a voice. That is why I am asking Congress to pass the America Votes Act so we can ensure every American can have a voice. subject: BREAKING: Conservative Police Chief Fired as Payback
body:
Many residents of Robbins now fear for their lives, and they can thank Mayor Darren Bryant for it.

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/dd5f8fe3cddb/breaking-conservative-police-chief-fired-as-payback?e=1cb5fdae9e)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=89d1ed22a5-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_17_05_12&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-89d1ed22a5-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
https://www.goldentreewealth.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=89d1ed22a5-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_17_05_12&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-89d1ed22a5-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Robbins Mayor Darren Bryant Fires 'Law & Order' Police Chief as Payback for Filing Whistleblower Complaint Alleging Abuse of Power, Endangering the Community (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/04/robbins-mayor-darren-bryant-fires-law-order-police-chief-as-payback-for-filing-whistleblower-complaint-alleging-abuse-of-power-endangering-the-community.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=89d1ed22a5-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_17_05_12&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-89d1ed22a5-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/04/robbins-mayor-darren-bryant-fires-law-order-police-chief-as-payback-for-filing-whistleblower-complaint-alleging-abuse-of-power-endangering-the-community.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=89d1ed22a5-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_17_05_12&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-89d1ed22a5-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
Mayor Darren Bryant, left, poses for a photo with then Illinois Republican nominee for governor and state senator Darren Bailey during a Labor Day parade in Robbins in September, 2022. (Source: Facebook)

Robbins Police Chief David Sheppard has only been on the job for eighteen months, but in that short period of time, he’s quadrupled the number of police officers patrolling the streets; he’s overseen a dramatic reduction in violent crimes, including sexual assaults and aggravated battery; and the homicide rate has decreased by over 90 percent.
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/04/robbins-mayor-darren-bryant-fires-law-order-police-chief-as-payback-for-filing-whistleblower-complaint-alleging-abuse-of-power-endangering-the-community.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=89d1ed22a5-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_17_05_12&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-89d1ed22a5-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
Since taking over as Robbin Police Chief, David Sheppard has led a city that has seen a dramatic reduction in overall crime.

But late last week, Mayor Darren Bryant fired Sheppard only a day after the police chief filed a whistleblower complaint against the mayor, alleging illegal and unethical behavior – citing several examples, including the mayor’s request to move a vehicle from the scene of a fatal car accident in the middle of a police investigation, potentially tainting the evidence, and demanding that Sheppard hire an individual with ties to the mayor despite concerns following that individual’s background check.

Bryant, who marched in a Robbins Labor Day parade alongside former Republican nominee for governor Darren Bailey in September, has been under fire from the community after a series of
water main (https://abc7chicago.com/village-of-robbins-illinois-water-main-break-issues/12490385/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=89d1ed22a5-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_17_05_12&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-89d1ed22a5-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) breaks that have left residents without running water on more than 20 different occasions during the past year.
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/04/robbins-mayor-darren-bryant-fires-law-order-police-chief-as-payback-for-filing-whistleblower-complaint-alleging-abuse-of-power-endangering-the-community.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=89d1ed22a5-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_17_05_12&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-89d1ed22a5-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
Mayor Darren Bryant, wearing multiple badges, poses for a photo with then Illinois Republican nominee for governor and state senator Darren Bailey, far right, during a Labor Day parade in Robbins in September, 2022. (Source: Facebook)

And this past Thanksgiving (https://www.cbsnews.com/chicago/news/robbins-residents-water-service-thanksgiving/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=89d1ed22a5-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_17_05_12&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-89d1ed22a5-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) , nearly 100 residents were without water, as city officials dropped off cases of bottled water on doorsteps, leaving families to try and figure out how to prepare their Thanksgiving feasts and do the dishes using only bottled water.

Despite befriending Bailey during the General Election campaign, Bryant is making direct appeals to Gov. JB Pritzker, and requesting financial assistance from the state to repair the broken infrastructure.

Bryant estimates that it will cost about
$40 million (https://abc7chicago.com/village-of-robbins-illinois-water-main-break-issues/12490385/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=89d1ed22a5-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_17_05_12&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-89d1ed22a5-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) to repair and replace the broken pipes – and he’s going to need the governor’s help to make that happen.

The Village of Robbins is also facing a lawsuit from the City of Chicago, alleging that Robbins owes the city
$16 million (https://news.wttw.com/2022/12/01/chicago-tonight-your-neighborhood-robbins-calls-federal-help-fix-aging-water?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=89d1ed22a5-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_17_05_12&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-89d1ed22a5-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) in overdue water bills and late fees – creating yet another public relations nightmare for the embattled mayor.

Sheppard, a registered Republican, Navy veteran and former
candidate (https://ballotpedia.org/David_Sheppard?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=89d1ed22a5-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_17_05_12&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-89d1ed22a5-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) for the Illinois House of Representatives, was recently elected to serve on his local school board, district 124.
https://www.facebook.com/photo.php?fbid=222295550381460&set=a.120733470537669&type=3&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=89d1ed22a5-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_17_05_12&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-89d1ed22a5-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
(Source: Facebook/David Sheppard for School Board Dist. 124)

In February, Gov. Pritzker went on the attack during a press conference (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=5FPkUhtMAs0&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=89d1ed22a5-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_17_05_12&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-89d1ed22a5-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) , calling Illinois-based conservative grassroots organizations that recruit and support local conservative school board candidates’ “racists” and “anti-LGBTQ.”

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=5FPkUhtMAs0&t=8s&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=89d1ed22a5-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_17_05_12&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-89d1ed22a5-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Gov. Pritzker fears conservative school board candidates and conservative organizations, and goes on attack during press conference.

During this past municipal election, Pritzker and the Democratic Party of Illinois spent $800,000 to support their liberal, progressive school board candidates and to attack conservative, grassroots candidates – every day moms and dads simply because they want to reverse this dangerous trend of plummeting test scores and put our kids back on track so they can lead successful lives and careers in the future.

But it’s clear that Bryant is making a conscious decision – and if there’s any chance at saving his own failures as mayor, it’s going to take the help and support of Gov. Pritzker – and that can’t happen so long as Sheppard is his police chief.

It also can’t happen so long as Sheppard continues to hold the mayor accountable – and calling him out when he sees a public official abusing their power.

With crime continuing to rise in Chicago and the surrounding communities, having a “tough on crime” police chief like Sheppard brought great comfort to the residents of Robbins.

Now, some say, they fear for their lives.

And they can thank their mayor for it.

https://youtu.be/cFRMGzOvVNE?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=89d1ed22a5-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_17_05_12&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-89d1ed22a5-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Editor-in-Chief Mark Vargas joins Newsmax to discuss Chicago Mayor-Elect Brandon Johnson's failed first leadership test and the "Teen Takeover" that happened in Downtown Chicago this past weekend.

https://youtu.be/_8Y8J677yoY?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=89d1ed22a5-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_17_05_12&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-89d1ed22a5-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Tyrone Muhammad, founder of Ex-Cons for Community and Social Change (ECCSC), joins Editor-in-Chief Mark Vargas live on "Mark My Words" on AM560 The Answer: "It is easier for kids to get their hands on a gun than it is to get their hands on a book."

https://www.goldentreewealth.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=89d1ed22a5-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_17_05_12&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-89d1ed22a5-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

| | | If you'd like to unsubscribe,[click here.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnl7NBjmTZL5F5oqdT0MFW4GLNp5FjRArZ2gECnWf63UZWzcCuYR-Es9PjYmAXR4JxZbuH_t8O228MjZNOxN7Lm2WoL5eKG3lZx13kI8WltFNCkPW2dj1EwB1wMwtbbHiScWiRWCgApA39-INY9CX4XOKDrnVYtzok3-KQTPL4isnnMA7pYoBdVYFMbeo6vLZa_-V77pF1itfT57CIYb9V_gusGOyQYBwcr-wNh1OVPzBXUaWo6TeNt9UihYqFFGWhbwWxiaAzIpvFXhnsfWIpsSCo6P7jb7uif8LhkMLNmS8WaBqLkb2e_Bn1Cw_ue341TscE1jILbxbmkJBw4wb3-C2d-l-HWDn3ATqHQbp2wKRn0eR3LkiKLRIFd_WK5YphU/3vf/_I6lukZVRFa-EpBoR2d5jg/h0/nVyTDVFvPhmUnMwPsBz_MgSZD-cGQ0J-uQ84LsZLDxY) | |
---
Friend --

**73 million.**

The number of children in the United States — they all don't look alike or sound alike but they all have a voice, and they are not afraid to use it. But the one place America's kids don't have a voice is Washington DC. And it shows.

Today everything from healthcare to education to how far our kids can go in life is more determined by their zip code than their genetic code. Our planet is warming, voting rights are under attack, and our kids can’t even go to school without fear of being shot. Because they don't have lawyers or lobbyists or millions dollar super PACS standing up for them.

**Until now.**

That’s why I am starting **Their Future. Our Vote.** The first of its kind organization dedicated solely to advocating for kids and electing leaders and lawmakers who will do the same.

**[So I am writing today to ask you to chip in and become a founding donor of Their Future. Our Vote. Your support is critical to ensure children have a voice in Congress.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yydMUN1nt5thY_dWpLP_JnQamTJ_lj_LGoWVO3R5xEJCPM_LJblFD0unwkC4EkdfE1o5jFL6UtvIhQkmwHNBcFEU0tTZi0HF7bDBAlEbTR0gT8Ety9Fw-LYjCmMGw-f_waCz19cs09ch5LgS3LZPSEetWzh0hFnBN-4QYOvnuTzEcBXbyW9fWwH86ECY1JA7ORKYoCGSt-sM4AxIPzTZ01SFSphZvjtZwmHWyN2LUyBsMjBsGX3xPoK_JqPXpjgcd292Xd9-NjXyO7M3ljdP12PawcztpC1_S-MKVrPbd0VqA4khVio9ynmmE6wpPQUv4/3vf/_I6lukZVRFa-EpBoR2d5jg/h1/1Gr8R9qzhD7ll5N1NDbx_w9W5-nPMSTDFAv_nJoL3mg)**

I ran for Congress and we put up a good fight thanks to supporters like you. And while I didn’t win that race, I knew I wasn’t done fighting for what I believed in. I knew I couldn’t go back to the hospital watching kids needlessly suffer because of bad policy choices being made in Washington. I knew kids needed a voice and that’s what Their Future is all about. Instead of playing politics with our kids, it's time to get political for our kids. Look, maybe you’re turned off by how decisive and partisan things in Washington have become.

Maybe you don’t care about politics. But if you do care about kids, then it's time to get off the sidelines. Because America's children deserve a better future. And my message to you is this:

**There is no one better to build that future,_their future_ , than us.**

**[Can I count on you to chip in and help us start strong?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yydMUN1nt5thY_dWpLP_JnQamTJ_lj_LGoWVO3R5xEJCPM_LJblFD0unwkC4EkdfE1o5jFL6UtvIhQkmwHNBcFEU0tTZi0HF7bDBAlEbTR0joLC1oDn3bB2TjY4nOxd6Ea6LYN5COEEalrwLh2ZhMuOB_-p2IfFnL5-8qCYq-jTkCq9KQuncofTqAYLmlVnhC22_CyKDlyVHgGhD5N6PdKlhNTuG2SawK8AvygyIXu6Fy_vBs6ixSmU19nwkkuvIdWH-SdG4o3Va3tKMzZseLUsq5x_d4DHbI_yKael-VtQtloaG84kDH5bzglmXP8sJA/3vf/_I6lukZVRFa-EpBoR2d5jg/h2/I88N3ETIozjGx4IDiM9igfBk69ae31mpsuNAmLXWh1c)**

Thank you,

Annie

* * *
| | PAID FOR BY THEIR FUTURE OUR VOTE

clean_body: | | | If you'd like to unsubscribe, | | Friend -- 73 million. The number of children in the United States — they all don't look alike or sound alike but they all have a voice, and they are not afraid to use it. But the one place America's kids don't have a voice is Washington DC. And it shows. Today everything from healthcare to education to how far our kids can go in life is more determined by their zip code than their genetic code. Our planet is warming, voting rights are under attack, and our kids can’t even go to school without fear of being shot. Because they don't have lawyers or lobbyists or millions dollar super PACS standing up for them. Until now. That’s why I am starting Their Future. Our Vote. The first of its kind organization dedicated solely to advocating for kids and electing leaders and lawmakers who will do the same. I ran for Congress and we put up a good fight thanks to supporters like you. And while I didn’t win that race, I knew I wasn’t done fighting for what I believed in. I knew I couldn’t go back to the hospital watching kids needlessly suffer because of bad policy choices being made in Washington. I knew kids needed a voice and that’s what Their Future is all about. Instead of playing politics with our kids, it's time to get political for our kids. Look, maybe you’re turned off by how decisive and partisan things in Washington have become. Maybe you don’t care about politics. But if you do care about kids, then it's time to get off the sidelines. Because America's children deserve a better future. And my message to you is this: There is no one better to build that future,their future , than us. Thank you, Annie * | | PAID FOR BY THEIR FUTURE OUR VOTE If you need to you can unsubscribe by . | | Sent via . name: Replace Sinema
subject: NEWS: FEC filing shows Sinema’s grassroots support COLLAPSED
body:
Sinema got big payouts from Wall Street, private equity, hedge funds | | | Peter – Sinema's new campaign finance report has been posted–and she’s raking in the cash from Wall Street – especially private equity and hedge funds. This quarter alone she raised over $2 million – and a large chunk of that is from private equity firms like Blackstone and The Carlyle Group. What Sinema’s numbers don’t show: support from everyday Arizonans. Out of $2.1 million raised, only 0.3% of her contributions were less than $200. In fact, most were “max-out” contributions from wealthy individuals and PACs. **Sinema’s first quarter as an ‘independent’ shows the only people she’s independent from are her constituents–she’s certainly not independent from Wall Street, Big Pharma, corporate PACs, or the other special interests writing her checks.** **** **[We need someone who is going to fight for working families, not Wall Street fat cats. Here’s a quick breakdown of where Sinema’s latest campaign cash came from:

🚩$664,975 of her total haul is from private equity
🚩$231,000 from corporate PACs
🚩$108,700 from hedge funds
🚩$5536 from small dollar donors
Remember, Kyrsten Sinema has gone to bat for private equity – AKA job killers – time and again. **Most prominently when she interfered at the last minute in the Inflation Reduction Act to save the “carried interest loophole.”** This loophole is widely unpopular – no one likes it. No one except private equity, which benefits to the tune of $18 billion per year.
[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953z7M--GZ1GyLWgOcKurJTvaAaV6wG9U99q9txFzwEEO76QwQb3kUuoXAAIcQFYl7dAkLuvnUq1Ck61Ym0p86ZV1BmW395nh9HKMqlyQ1l8RF3tX4XFJ2OdYjl5nIoQV_xJS6Wm3_ia9AndyBBwgFTjcRODoOB6-Z4FRAu22UHRSgj8ueUKXQBA0QGlPabKomVIgoCn5TRSgUp3tNantjTNZkFkdqqRWk1LLAF0Zcc_33wq93AFTpT5UYO56DrrKy-U7OZBbJufnLPzLkCrEi3SRc5D1FbBrbiOsHQcQwyhxVa3HivInH6HlxpivF8MmQe0dgQ69j0xeWEPZIsTtLHj0AnBdPTqb_A_Nde5me-EsKocn8Mvz91x-BLlZ-sx9GNU/3vf/vBdHYTCjTnq1HhCl175gyA/h7/V3tNJVJmZFp_XQ6Xx8k1vNyKRp9FIPj1PcdPwzPeznc)
It’s no wonder Sinema gets little to no support from actual Arizonans–her big corporate donors reward her far too handsomely for the little guys to compete.
Compare Sinema’s Wall Street haul to Democrat Ruben Gallego. Gallego managed to raise more money overall – but 99% of his donations came from grassroots, small-dollar donors.
Another telling sign? The most frequent occupation for Sinema’s donors was “finance.” The most frequent occupation for Gallego’s donors was “teacher.”
The polls show Sinema can no longer win this Senate race. But she can still hurt the Democrat and throw the election to a Republican like Kari Lake or Mark Lamb. We can't let that happen. **[Can you help us do everything we can to stop Sinema, stop the Republicans, and help a Democrat like Ruben Gallego win this race?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953z7M--GZ1GyLWgOcKurJTvauGVR3Meq-_hTOLcgqLT7mmiDMlF3d64a1jjsmNWCixVP4IGliG48ouFtkGuONmkagFYRpWUDiG42ORs--k9gIwxyjSiQAsHOsies4zEJXat4Eo_i9NIRzz8BxLCv1k7Rnsz3ynTsclzyXq_LtuYI97R0G1TK4qWolkMG2E8kV3QU_JQXEc6OElAf_KfggGeC5qc2WTBDuqxibKvIzDXmx4eM7kaYYQJ6dJ3gyBugZGVl6eIZ0uDRWGa9WOYGNyXoT4PW73li-qFNlQvgxEWPHkvY_F3jdtzjnQjOwuYnz9z6Xebk1-PQiCsAj6Z1BToFL5ruymfT1dtMd7r0T6e9TM40GrG-IlpBpfvGIeFB_vQ/3vf/vBdHYTCjTnq1HhCl175gyA/h8/Y7dtqOzp1HRt76jeUKTbJcXW8R5xnrcQ5Xx5XH_WK2c)**

name: Jacky Rosen
subject: zero room for error
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC
body:
#
Friends — I recently launched my very first reelection campaign for the U.S. Senate in Nevada. Can I take just a minute to explain why this race is so important?
Right now, analysts at _FiveThirtyEight_ say that the GOP has “a clear path” to retaking the Senate majority — and it could all come down to what happens in Nevada.
In the last Senate race here, the GOP spent over $55 MILLION to turn Nevada red — and they nearly succeeded. Democrats won by _less than a percentage point._ Just 7,928 votes.
**This means we have zero room for error.** With _The Washington Post_ calling me one of the most vulnerable senators up for reelection, the GOP is coming after me as a TOP target for defeat — already launching misleading attack ads against me.
**I’m going to need grassroots supporters like you by my side to win. But with just hours left to reach our Reelection Founding Donor goal, my team says we’re still falling short. We need 1,456 more donations before our critical midnight deadline — and I’m counting on your to help us get back on track.**
[**So please, I’m humbly asking: Will you split $5 between my campaign and The Long Run now to become a Founding Donor of our very first reelection campaign in Nevada? Every dollar could be the difference between winning and losing.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-rosen-split.NmckDm&refcode=em230417-1-t1&t=1&akid=4369%2E196590%2EB_014a)
_If you 've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will automatically be evenly split between Jacky Rosen and the Long Run PAC:_
[Express Donate: $5](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/2924?c0=longrunpac-em-rosen-split.fdKpeu&refcode=em230417-1-t1&t=20&akid=4369%2E196590%2EB_014a)
[Express Donate: $25](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1273?c0=longrunpac-em-rosen-split.gsWpxM&refcode=em230417-1-t1&t=21&akid=4369%2E196590%2EB_014a)
[Express Donate: $50](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1274?c0=longrunpac-em-rosen-split.3abA_k&refcode=em230417-1-t1&t=22&akid=4369%2E196590%2EB_014a)
[Express Donate: $100](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1275?c0=longrunpac-em-rosen-split.yOZsBB&refcode=em230417-1-t1&t=23&akid=4369%2E196590%2EB_014a)
[Express Donate: $250](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1266?c0=longrunpac-em-rosen-split.njee-3&refcode=em230417-1-t1&t=24&akid=4369%2E196590%2EB_014a)
[Or donate another amount](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-rosen-split.NmckDm&refcode=em230417-1-t1&t=25&akid=4369%2E196590%2EB_014a)
Thank you. I’m so grateful for your grassroots support.
– Jacky Rosen

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you. We'd hate to see you go, but if you'd like you can [**unsubscribe here**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=26&akid=4369%2E196590%2EB_014a). You can also [**sign up to receive fewer emails.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=27&akid=4369%2E196590%2EB_014a)
The Long Run PAC is funded by grassroots donors giving what they can, when they can. [**Make a contribution to The Long Run PAC today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/longrunpac-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=28&refcode2=4369_196590_B_014a&akid=4369%2E196590%2EB_014a)
Submit this form to [**update your contact information.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/update-contact-info/?source=em-footer&t=29&akid=4369%2E196590%2EB_014a)
Paid for by The Long Run PAC
P.O. Box 597
Milwaukee, WI 53201

name: Lucas Kunce
subject: Ralph Yarl
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
#
Peter, I wanted to make sure you saw this news from Kansas City.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/30923?t=1&akid=3010%2E614464%2Ej1v5wp)
You shouldn’t get shot for mixing up an address. And shooting a child for ringing your doorbell should get you locked up forever. Both should be givens.
But in Missouri, violent white supremacists and criminals get to claim a legal defense to shoot first, ask later. **"Law and order" doesn't look like this.**
**[If you can, please support Ralph Yarl by clicking here to donate to the GoFundMe set up by his family for medical expenses, college, and more.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/30923?t=2&akid=3010%2E614464%2Ej1v5wp)**
**[SUPPORT RALPH YARL](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/30923?t=3&akid=3010%2E614464%2Ej1v5wp)**
— Lucas Kunce

[](https://www.facebook.com/lucaskuncemo/) | [](https://twitter.com/lucaskuncemo) | [](https://www.instagram.com/lucaskuncemo/)
---|---|---

name: Mifepristone Alert (via HER Time)
subject: We won’t stop until every women has the right to choose
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61929551/401675921/-2095412496?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230417_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmJkNjY1NDItNGVkZC1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=zut2oXiAeVRV6rj_hIpGEfdn_lIAHY4kNjjJGucGTy4=)
---
Abortion rights are under attack in states across the country, in statehouses and in federal courts. Republicans are trying to roll back every right, every option, every shred of dignity a woman still has. The latest decision is that mifepristone can stay available in states where abortion remains legal, but may not be distributed by mail. This is a HUGE problem for women who live in states with hostile abortion laws — and we’re not going to leave them behind. We’re mobilizing to make sure EVERY woman has access to safe abortion care. It’s a human right, no matter what the Republicans try to do. [_**We set an emergency goal to raise $5,000 by midnight tonight, and we’re counting on your support to reach it. Nikki just wrapped up her first 100 days as our Representative in Congress. In those 100 days, she’s already introduced multiple pieces of legislation with bipartisan support, including pieces focused on workforce opportunities, support for small businesses, and healthcare resources in rural areas.

But Nikki’s not slowing down now. She’s criss-crossing the district to hear from constituents about the things they care about most, and where she should focus her energy next. [As Nikki wraps up her 100 days tour in her district, could you take a moment to let her know what issues you’d like to see her tackle in Congress next?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61929658/401676426/-616135501?refcode=EM_FR_230417100Days_TN_6_TESTB_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3N2ExMTQ4Ni00ZmRkLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DI_0Ib9Uwh5I1UhHU0Kws_Cs126CXiB-p5Xr4g0JlpQ=&emci=74a11486-4fdd-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=77a11486-4fdd-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=13891387)

Nikki has spent her life fighting for workers and working families by strengthening unions nationwide, and she was instrumental in passing a $15 minimum wage in Illinois while working as a senior advisor for Governor JB Pritzker. Most recently, Nikki served in President Biden's administration in the office that implemented the American Rescue Plan.

Nikki believes in the American Dream and will bring people together to level the playing field and rebuild the middle class so families have a shot to get ahead.

body:
we need your help

|

Derek, We know the end game for the GOP — they aren’t keeping it a secret anymore. **They’re going to ban abortion in Virginia, they’re going to keep defunding public schools, and they are going to keep trying to undo all the progress Democrats have made while we had power in Richmond — if we let them.** But Derek, we’re running behind on our fundraising numbers for 2023. We might not be able to provide the resources our most critical campaigns need if our grassroots donors don’t step up. The South Carolina Senator recently announced he would be opening an exploratory team for the 2024 presidential election taking him one step closer to a formal announcement. Now, Scott has pledged the “most conservative pro-life legislation” if elected. Kamala Harris’ Latest Abortion Antics Take Priority Over Her Job In the midst of Florida’s 6-week abortion ban, Friday Scott was asked about his stance on the ban and future bans to come. Scott finally gave his official stance on the matter. He said, “If were president of READ MORE](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zc6rk996v7t5ctm435njiuq4en7aiomoafgocrfg_rp22sh2s8i66o74ctjm4p32cth2bs)

[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z1i05t6k6n5jg5pkfk39ep654bdaf0g1lgko70r0_rp22sh2s8i66o74ctjm4p32cth2bs) | #### [ NRA Annual Meeting Draws Over 77,000 People - Full Mag News The 2023 NRA Annual Meeting drew a massive attendance of over 77,000 people this past weekend. The event was held at Indiana Convention Center in Indianapolis and the headline speech was made by former President Donald Trump. Gun companies used the exhibit to showcase new products and promote second amendment rights. name: Team Engel
subject: We want to hear from you!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Engel for Arizona
body:
https://www.engelforarizona.com/ [https://www.engelforarizona.com/]
Hi friend,
Last week, Kirsten Engel launched her campaign to flip AZ-06 blue and take back the House. Now, as we look down the road to 2024, we want to hear from you.
Last year, our campaign was powered by grassroots support, not by corporate PACs or special interests. Our people-first campaign outperformed all expectations — because when we come together, we can have a BIG impact.
It's input from folks like you that helps us shape the issues we fight for.
What would you like to see Kirsten focus on in this campaign? Fill out our issue survey here to let us know! [https://secure.ngpvan.com/OvIPhkzd8U-czvdHq6a99Q2]
Fill out our survey >> [https://secure.ngpvan.com/OvIPhkzd8U-czvdHq6a99Q2]
Thanks for taking the time to let us know what matters to you!
— Team Engel
Support our campaign >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_041723_IssueSurvey]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_041723_IssueSurvey [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_041723_IssueSurvey] Kirsten is a mom, an environmental attorney, and a former State Legislator who has spent the past six years fighting to restore funding to public schools, protect Arizona's natural resources, and make our communities safer.
She’s ready to take that fight to Washington to find common-sense solutions to the challenges we’re facing here in Arizona's Sixth Congressional District.
In 2022, Kirsten lost her race by one of the smallest margins in the country. Will you make sure she can build a winning campaign early by chipping in now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_041723_IssueSurvey]
https://twitter.com/EngelForArizona [https://twitter.com/EngelForArizona] https://www.instagram.com/engelforarizona/ [https://www.instagram.com/engelforarizona/] https://www.facebook.com/EngelForArizona/ [https://www.facebook.com/EngelForArizona/] https://www.engelforarizona.com/ [https://www.engelforarizona.com/]

Tucson, AZ 85717

| | | | | Peter, **_The Blue Letter 4/17/23_** 🔥🔥 Fascinating podcast w/ former Lincoln Project Exec Director, Fred Wellman. We've tried many ways to describe the GOP's authoritarianism, mass corruption, etc...Fred[ may have the best explanation I've heard](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1a33b796-45ba-45df-bcec-e4f8622ed61d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9). WATCH: [bit.ly/41mjDpG](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tcd0e1691-2240-4784-8085-609635614a34/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) 🔥🔥 Former head of AP coverage in the Middle East, Africa & Europe, Dan Perry is American. Yet, he lives abroad, allowing him to apply a keen intellect & outsider's perspective on issues like [healthcare](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2fecbecd-b58f-4b51-9559-a731a91cc3a6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)/[guns ](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfb169ef8-32e8-4068-b8c3-12318b82a130/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)that we refuse to solve w/ obvious answers. Read his smart pieces, [subscribe to his Substack](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td0bb63bf-90e8-4f07-bf47-10950b5f57b6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)! 🔥🔥 Freakin DeSantis. He continued his doomed book tour as Ft. Lauderdale flooded, flew back just just to sign an unpopular 6-week abortion ban. | | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc9ced4a8-162a-4f62-8375-1a8768443566/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: JohnFetterman.com
subject: BREAKING NEWS: GOP trying to change rules in Montana Senate race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
#
**Facing Tough Senate Race, Montana GOP Looks to Change the Rules **— _New York Times_
Republican politicians in Montana are trying to thwart Jon Tester’s chances of winning Montana’s U.S. Senate race. **They’re using dirty tricks to try and change Montana’s election laws in the hopes of defeating him in 2024.**
It’s no secret Montana will decide Senate control, and Republicans are desperate to hand the gavel back to Mitch McConnell. Jon Tester needs our help ASAP to combat these outrageous attacks before it’s too late.
**[Please, rush a split donation RIGHT NOW between John Fetterman and Jon’s campaign so we can fight back and show Republicans just how strong this team is. We need 7,500 supporters to step up today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230417-1?refcode=em20230417-8339&refcode2=8339_434096_CS9vJh&akid=8339%2E434096%2ECS9vJh)**

It’s clear Republicans are absolutely terrified of the strong coalition of supporters Jon has built. They’re resorting to shady backgroom deals to try to change the rules, silence voters, and hold onto power.
**With our fragile Senate majority at stake, we cannot afford to lose Montana’s Senate race. That’s why we need**** _you_****to step up today and show your support.**
**[Chip in a split donation now to help us meet this emergency goal »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230417-1?refcode=em20230417-8339&refcode2=8339_434096_CS9vJh&akid=8339%2E434096%2ECS9vJh)**

Team Fetterman HQ

Donald Trump's presidency nearly destroyed our country and left our economy in shambles. Extremists like Governor Ron DeSantis and former Vice President Mike Pence have done nothing but fight tooth and nail to strip abortion rights, reverse LGBTQ rights, and dismantle our freedom to vote. On the other hand, President Joe Biden is committed to rebuilding America and has already proved it with remarkable progress. He's made historic investments in infrastructure, the economy, and fighting climate change — making America stronger and more optimistic. But we want to know where you stand, Peter. Unite the Country is conducting an exclusive 2024 Presidential Poll to see if our most dedicated supporters agree with us. We need your response before midnight, but we’re 59 responses short! Who do you trust to move the country forward in 2024? = = Thanks for your support, Unite the Country | Unite the Country was formed in 2019 to support Joe Biden’s candidacy for President. After a resounding victory in 2020, we’ve been working around the clock to uplift President Biden’s message to the American electorate and elect Democrats who will continue to fight for his ambitious agenda. President Biden and the Democrats are fighting tooth-and-nail to move our country forward, but Republicans are threatening to derail everything. = | = = Follow along: | ---|--- | Paid for by Unite the Country, , and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. subject: Our candidates haven't been indicted 👀
disclaimer_text: Paid for by United Rural Democrats](https://click
body:
Trump would never make our list, Peter. | | | Hi Peter – As an organization that supports political candidates, we have a strict criterion for determining who we will support, endorse, and organize for. We want URD-endorsed candidates to have integrity, honor, and candor. Donald Trump is a perfect example of someone who would never make our list. Trump was recently indicted by a grand jury for allegedly falsifying business records related to hush money payments to Stormy Daniels during his 2016 presidential campaign. **We can tell you one thing with confidence, Peter—none of our URD-endorsed candidates have ever been indicted.** The truth is, Donald Trump can run for office again, even if he is convicted. Americans have the right to a representative and political leader who runs an honest campaign, upholds the law, and respects the responsibilities of public office. That’s why we support candidates who believe in campaign finance reform, who have a history of experience in service to their community, and who were raised on the importance of the working class. **_[We’re doing everything we can to make sure that Trump’s indictment signals an end to the GOP’s corrupt rule, but we need your help. Will you chip in $5 or more to elect URD-endorsed candidates who have never been indicted and are committed to honorable public clean_body: Trump would never make our list, Peter. | | | Hi Peter – As an organization that supports political candidates, we have a strict criterion for determining who we will support, endorse, and organize for. We want URD-endorsed candidates to have integrity, honor, and candor. Donald Trump is a perfect example of someone who would never make our list. Trump was recently indicted by a grand jury for allegedly falsifying business records related to hush money payments to Stormy Daniels during his 2016 presidential campaign. We can tell you one thing with confidence, Peter—none of our URD-endorsed candidates have ever been indicted. The truth is, Donald Trump can run for office again, even if he is convicted. Americans have the right to a representative and political leader who runs an honest campaign, upholds the law, and respects the responsibilities of public office. That’s why we support candidates who believe in campaign finance reform, who have a history of experience in service to their community, and who were raised on the importance of the working class. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: – URD HQ United Rural Democrats (URD) is leading the effort to rebuild the Democratic Party in rural America. If we're going to take back our country, we need a 50-state strategy to organize in every community across the country. Will you support our network of activists on the ground as we work to rebuild our party's infrastructure and flip these areas blue?

name: Josh Shapiro HQ
subject: Our kids are counting on us
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHAPIRO FOR PENNSYLVANIA
body:
It's up to us to make sure they get the education they need and deserve.

Our children are our future. And it’s up to us to make sure they get the education they need and deserve.

But right now, kids are going to school hungry. Too many teaching positions are going unfilled. And some schools need critical repairs to provide students with safer learning environments.

Governor Josh Shapiro just announced his first budget plan – and it’s full of proposals to invest in our public schools and make sure students AND teachers have the resources they need to thrive.

**If you believe we must invest in education, sign your name to support Josh Shapiro’s plan:** | | [SIGN YOUR NAME →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61939320/401713330/-1440446869?utm_campaign=email_041723_education&source=email_041723_education&refcode=email_041723_education&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNGY1ZDIyYy03OGRkLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2cIVNX_t2LCoWV0Y0hPLM2r70Hzn8yPMjTPMaXbH2YY=&emci=3929ab53-55dd-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=e4f5d22c-78dd-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=21962291)
---
Josh Shapiro’s bold budget plan would provide free breakfast to every student in Pennsylvania’s public schools – because we can’t expect students to learn when they’re hungry.

It’ll provide funding to hire more teachers.

It’ll expand investments to make important environmental repairs to our schools, so our kids aren’t exposed to things like lead and asbestos.

And it’ll put technical education back in the classroom, so Pennsylvania’s workers get the best training possible and have access to new economic opportunity.

We need to support students at every age and every level, and that’s what Josh Shapiro’s plan is all about.

**Now, we need your support. Sign your name now to support Josh Shapiro’s plan to invest in education for every Pennsylvanian:**

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2caaf3e4614344d7b2b1bdf63e08d63c&_e=lVPPHQscXJwWzpbvn2BSxPG-nQSKVLtRmo3ePcaqxFGkQoy64NCCdrcWD-Npme8ntNOn_25Qx058GXQAH2OzwK7LTY-aoGrRCOD-ABtEA3gBKy940ADX8A5qNq3-JxA_bTgmi-JdGg__Voh35vR2FacEgAX_1JeFr1hmga3EaNcM7jKCK82P1Naz9GoLtOIGtYi0RrsLYrXvFYW-wWcbBrIeaaO9UZlbdNTzMdmqOMiygj6v3RQpJOS00u4RR0Tgk9KT3F_xoRopAvf7XYnCCQ%3D%3D)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2caaf3e4614344d7b2b1bdf63e08d63c&_e=lVPPHQscXJwWzpbvn2BSxPG-nQSKVLtRmo3ePcaqxFGkQoy64NCCdrcWD-Npme8ntNOn_25Qx058GXQAH2OzwK7LTY-aoGrRCOD-ABtEA3gBKy940ADX8A5qNq3-JxA_Zjbcj4ZMZFd1kii5qGjOj9Z3f9VwrklZskPmCwKSPTmbTsX4dthhg-Nilo1OjHGK46MhFD6lxzTvr1DfryeQyS42GOuGzcQ9Koj3cvU2lk5luu_ML9vkgL_-Z0f8U_wFgmPa57CAp6c2IRan6D0eSA%3D%3D)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2caaf3e4614344d7b2b1bdf63e08d63c&_e=lVPPHQscXJwWzpbvn2BSxPG-nQSKVLtRmo3ePcaqxFGkQoy64NCCdrcWD-Npme8ntNOn_25Qx058GXQAH2OzwK7LTY-aoGrRCOD-ABtEA3gBKy940ADX8A5qNq3-JxA_bvJYhWj2cJcrERbKZPrNVcLXcJ-2z3-pzcPmW3wMii6IGBtK80-D7d4-cfkxyegpsYTbGv1ejQydXmEgd5uySFZ142NzIXhzLk-rmLP68uzSXkkh1Uc2aSKJmyN5iH3ZRDsOpt3zMD6bQ-VJfrak1Q%3D%3D)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _" deadly insurrection."_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It's time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

**Support the January 6th Families**

**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com

body:
There is a disturbing trend on the left

| | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=cd8568110f894fc49ef3b0a8014cf1ae&_e=STp1DY33ZKugO7rjUmULlmmD_GekwDzmFPInZNm09SEMJtyWkNtSxN1oH2p6lDkejZJ79zHziU6-_VN_Aph9TRCvVoL9rG6aUdx6EUONiUjLTPV02b530GeFBCL4EN-iCZBwbJ6-gxMWqflpQNwyn8v0zySyu0vff1N7ndXdxrALFO8sedxivSykfdhoqv6Sx8JbpNDFOrsXC-sulp6pmzDcdkH7Dj3x3PfElk5yCh3gO6ZJrrhqF2JdsydzeEE14dSBhGRq-jdC7KCuZ0Xo4A%3D%3D)
---
Fellow American,

There is a disturbing trend on the left-- Transgender activists are increasingly emboldened to attack those who oppose them. Time after time, we watch the left enable the rhetoric and justify the violence-- **ENOUGH IS ENOUGH!** This weekend, I was ambushed and assaulted by a transgender activist after speaking to a group of students at San Francisco State University. Students gathered wanting to hear the pro-woman side of the sports debate but were impeded by transgender activists, shouting, cursing, and threatening. This left-wing intimidation campaign won't work! This is only more evidence that I'm fighting the good fight, and proof that women need sex-protected spaces! I know what I'm doing is right. When they want you silent, speak louder. I'm on the frontlines fighting for women and girls and speaking TRUTH to all, even those who refuse to hear it. [**Will you step up and stand with me in this fight? Donate to NinePAC and help me continue to speak TRUTH where it's not welcome and FIGHT to protect the future of women's sports!**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=cd8568110f894fc49ef3b0a8014cf1ae&_e=STp1DY33ZKugO7rjUmULlmmD_GekwDzmFPInZNm09SEMJtyWkNtSxN1oH2p6lDkejZJ79zHziU6-_VN_Aph9TRCvVoL9rG6aUdx6EUONiUjLTPV02b530GeFBCL4EN-i_IMfXi4Ky6Rck4VQX6kulSPk8yP_NZTnlTKJQgb2AFquvwA6T9gaagBxCWNP53rnPxHHOrptLceTMCJVW9RJp7vioGdUJJLUt4Pt_XUWiu5DwupmFVPf5uGlQuMd06LDkTu_hJUCKF9GCNY93l1RqQ%3D%3D)

clean_body: There is a disturbing trend on the left | | | Fellow American, There is a disturbing trend on the left-- Transgender activists are increasingly emboldened to attack those who oppose them. Time after time, we watch the left enable the rhetoric and justify the violence-- ENOUGH IS ENOUGH! This weekend, I was ambushed and assaulted by a transgender activist after speaking to a group of students at San Francisco State University. Students gathered wanting to hear the pro-woman side of the sports debate but were impeded by transgender activists, shouting, cursing, and threatening. This left-wing intimidation campaign won't work! This is only more evidence that I'm fighting the good fight, and proof that women need sex-protected spaces! I know what I'm doing is right. When they want you silent, speak louder. I'm on the frontlines fighting for women and girls and speaking TRUTH to all, even those who refuse to hear it. Thank you for your support, Riley Gaines | | Paid for by the Nine PAC | | Reclaiming American Freedom 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

subject: Does Mississippi send too many people to prison?
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/leadershipacademy-8132980?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
|
Dear Friend,
**Does Mississippi send too many people to prison? **For years, we have been told that Mississippi locks up too many people, but is that really true?

Instead of measuring how many criminals we send to jail relative to the size of our population, we ought to consider how many criminals we send to jail relative to the level of criminality.

**Rafael Mangual, a best-selling author, is coming to Jackson to explain why sentencing leniency actually harms our state and its residents.**
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=ef88f17616&e=5703353baa)
---
**_Click on the image above to reserve a ticket!_**
| Decarceration is dangerous and policymakers in our state need to understand why.

Mangual will be joined on May 4 by State Auditor Shad White to discuss why Mississippi should support our law enforcement. **Tickets are available[here](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=0bd304eda7&e=5703353baa). **

Hope to see you there!
---
|
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=65c9667b9d&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
Best,

Anika Page
Director of Operations
---
|

| Peter,

A full 18 months until Election Day, national Republican and outside spending groups are throwing everything they have at VA-07 in the hopes of flipping it **red.**

_**FIRST**_ – The National Republican Congressional Committee called Abigail one of its _**top targets**_ for the 2024 cycle.

_**THEN**_ – The Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee named VA-07 a _**‘frontline’ district**_ – affirming that Republicans have their sights set on our district.

_**NOW**_ – The Republican hits keep pouring in – from digital ads to billboards to TV spots.

clean_body: Republicans are clearly putting in early work, and we have to do the same. | = | Peter, A full 18 months until Election Day, national Republican and outside spending groups are throwing everything they have at VA-07 in the hopes of flipping it red. THEN – The Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee named VA-07 a ‘frontline’ district – affirming that Republicans have their sights set on our district. NOW – The Republican hits keep pouring in – from digital ads to billboards to TV spots. subject: Can I count on you to let me know what issues are most important to you and your family?

body:
Last month, my team sent out a quick poll to gauge what issues are most important to you and your family. But when I was reading through the responses, I didn’t see yours, Peter.
Hi everyone, it’s Emilia.

Last month, my team sent out a quick poll to gauge what issues are most important to you and your family. **But when I was reading through the responses, I didn’t see yours, Peter.**

It would mean the world to me to understand the issues you care about so I know how to best serve you in Congress.
**So if you have a moment, will you take our 30 second poll? Peter,

It’s been almost two months since Emilia was officially sworn into Congress to serve Northeast Ohio – _and she’s only just getting started on delivering for our community._

Emilia is working everyday to amplify our voices and fight for the changes we wish to see right here at home. But to ensure our team is focusing on the areas that matter most to you, we have to ask: **Which of these issues is most important to you and your family?**

clean_body: Last month, my team sent out a quick poll to gauge what issues are most important to you and your family. But when I was reading through the responses, I didn’t see yours, Peter. Hi everyone, it’s Emilia. Last month, my team sent out a quick poll to gauge what issues are most important to you and your family. But when I was reading through the responses, I didn’t see yours, Peter. It would mean the world to me to understand the issues you care about so I know how to best serve you in Congress. So if you have a moment, will you take our 30 second poll? Thank you so much! | = = = = = = = = = = Emilia On Sat, March 4, 2023 Team Emilia wrote: = Peter, It’s been almost two months since Emilia was officially sworn into Congress to serve Northeast Ohio – and she’s only just getting started on delivering for our community. Emilia is working everyday to amplify our voices and fight for the changes we wish to see right here at home. But to ensure our team is focusing on the areas that matter most to you, we have to ask: Which of these issues is most important to you and your family? = = = = = = = = = = Thanks for letting us know, Peter! name: Andy Kim
subject: Our youngest heroes
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Kim for Congress
body:
We ask a lot of military families. Oftentimes their sacrifices on behalf of our country go unnoticed and underappreciated.

That's why in April – and every month – we recognize and celebrate the amazing resiliency of children with parents or guardians who serve in the military.

These children can face challenges unique to being part of a military family. They typically move more often, leaving communities, schools, teachers, and friendships behind.

Military children can endure long stretches without seeing their military parent – missing out on both life's important events and evening catch-ups at the dinner table.

I am inspired by these children and teens. They shoulder a burden, often quietly and out of the public eye.

This month – the month of the military child – is an important time to remember that the honor and commitment of military service isn't limited to those who wear the uniform every day. That's why I am committed to strengthening our country's support for military families and ensuring our youngest heroes and their parents have access to the resources they need.

Please join me in celebrating the month of the military child by donating to Blue Star Families, a charity that provides community resources for military families and children. **Are you there? I still haven 't heard back from you...**

* * *
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61940290/401726395/1575385346?code=jtk4097-su-nd&refcode=jtk4097-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZmRjZDc5OC03ZmRkLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=elzkRznwguPP_6O5-Ej6rj6b2I-imrNSwWovHp9YLHA=) A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 – and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight is saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. clean_body: | | | BREAKING: "Ron DeSantis quietly signs Florida's 6-week abortion ban into law" - CNBC News After this breaking update, we put together a rapid-response live poll to see where grassroots Democrats stand — but we're still waiting for your response. Do you approve of Ron DeSantis? | | | | Response missing from dpwillis67@gmail.com | Deadline: 11:59 p.m. tonight | Friend, Ron DeSantis is one of the most extreme and dangerous politicians in our country. As governor of Florida, he's pushed hate-fueled, radical policies that attack and threaten everything from reproductive rights, LGBTQ+ rights, to our very democracy itself. There's no question that DeSantis would be just as dangerous as Donald Trump in the White House — if not even more so. But current data shows that he has a real chance to secure the Republican nomination. And now, he's already meeting with voters and building a base of support in key early primary states! We must confirm where grassroots Democrats like you stand immediately. But we're still missing 22 responses from your area — including yours, friend. Please, tell us right now: Do you approve of Ron DeSantis? | | | | | * | = A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 – and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight is saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. = And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, = Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

It's Tim Scott.

I'm really glad you chose to open this email so I'll cut right to the chase: **I just launched my Presidential Exploratory Committee.**
I believe in securing the border.
I believe in election integrity.
I believe in parental rights.
I believe in supporting our brave law enforcement.
**And I believe that with faith and conservative values, this country 's best days are ahead of us.**

---
| | | [SUPPORT ME HERE](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=1bdf79f346ef4ea396b23458737c347f&_e=f9mh8rzS9sZgsbrOTCCoOdK3aBtHQa962a2WaS0o2c-i3p349t1dm_wpTip4HzSYbOsQqux623XMoDe8dS5BUBmFGfJpPGkoufOb9men_qjoIfhvTksie0EIhipHkI1br0b51BaDJLniIHO-j7-FXq-T0o-elsYAdN_LlGMiybm-dMiPOJtqd0AHOoFxoWjLR8DhWB38XJWIv6blQpmMrSKEnm1_2RHbtMrSnjtC9G5X4XfX7u-2-qvSHeKXE3MW4McXNIUrJf66kfUbF-5f4vhbcB8_PIosr6VncBleEen90hryX-c-m3bi0-Y3NHnrpj0mgoezzmXuGlg4knd05GPh3jgKdhWgnxLVu5dw1Yi3f-at5dTyGDGuvxkFcdTqAXgPTjF1p85N4NCw-5l2Uw%3D%3D "SUPPORT ME HERE")
---

Here's the deal, my faith is the central pillar of my life. It's what guides me through my day. Without God in my life, I would have no purpose and that's why I need your help to restore faith to our nation's values.

I can't stress enough that I can't do this alone. Polls show Americans are losing faith and if we don't take action right now, it could be gone forever. But I won't allow this and I certainly hope you will not either.

_**[So, if you agree with me that we can attain a better tomorrow and are determined to ensure the future of our country is rooted in conservative values, then I'm humbly asking you to be one of the first donors to my Presidential Exploratory Committee Fund. Can I count on you?](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=1bdf79f346ef4ea396b23458737c347f&_e=f9mh8rzS9sZgsbrOTCCoOdK3aBtHQa962a2WaS0o2c-i3p349t1dm_wpTip4HzSYbOsQqux623XMoDe8dS5BUBmFGfJpPGkoufOb9men_qjoIfhvTksie0EIhipHkI1br0b51BaDJLniIHO-j7-FXq-T0o-elsYAdN_LlGMiybm-dMiPOJtqd0AHOoFxoWjLR8DhWB38XJWIv6blQpmMrSKEnm1_2RHbtMrSnjtC9G5X4XfX7u-2-qvSHeKXE3MW9fGoWn1B01I7cEwTW_Cxi_W_4vofQaKXyGhZiS5DJ0W3Wwh4qecNAtwXqCXvUcZcmne9qtdSeSDHskoaQy2BGZ6SlBKuuySGY1ki-4NfCVZ73RtCBfKXodPiAoIdTiwnxbAs0GRKnRZO_iz93iu9Jw%3D%3D "So, if you agree with me that we can attain a better tomorrow and are determined to ensure the future of our country is rooted in conservative values, then I’m humbly asking you to be one of the first donors to my Presidential Exploratory Committee Fund. Can I count on you?")**_

---
| | | [SUPPORT ME HERE](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=1bdf79f346ef4ea396b23458737c347f&_e=f9mh8rzS9sZgsbrOTCCoOdK3aBtHQa962a2WaS0o2c-i3p349t1dm_wpTip4HzSYbOsQqux623XMoDe8dS5BUBmFGfJpPGkoufOb9men_qjoIfhvTksie0EIhipHkI1br0b51BaDJLniIHO-j7-FXq-T0o-elsYAdN_LlGMiybm-dMiPOJtqd0AHOoFxoWjLR8DhWB38XJWIv6blQpmMrSKEnm1_2RHbtMrSnjtC9G5X4XfX7u-2-qvSHeKXE3MWPk49h76kSBL7om8wWMaY0ZxZ9bb0ybvKGfYcUISDbLvwp8tQ1B9fQ38fEe7skv3a-73-ZamkOQV5sq5n6WUCqsZyFpp-9cYHKQObHZ_bbw1e54x1tzV0LURRtN66mBAZuRoedCYmglYNCzTHbx3LHw%3D%3D "SUPPORT ME HERE")

I hope to see you're with me.

God Bless,
Tim Scott

---

---
* * *
---
| | | [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=1bdf79f346ef4ea396b23458737c347f&_e=F1JXzzMdQQzeEzHbcmsu73kjTwxWHG69CHqo9hPyuvbCsuJRPNYp1EPzuU1mtzgCZE6tT5VU1Hw0pJ95zEZYj24fm106uwzHoA_E8wz8cDF9axhfcpN0W4GU8SLkoGSScAQFBFfaPr5iF8MFUzmxt81Gb0NHFi5gPyJPNCfwBxjfUEdUgyrf7OGXSetRN-NcIOugDypGZ8W4fCJg3h6AlmXhbjW7gYwarAxUE2zJBXLnw-Hyif_EEzm81IQPPXfNbGMs2pMj45tUuAPfnZ2VYbTyOQ3vzlv2Y6jPzFwwyH6QeUqL8RloSsqO_69lWJSxRcIPSw6m5Vn4vRFDjKVxhSTqCyaMkc02hW01y3k2teAYLyuAnSDlhGvW1JFld8Oz)
---

I just launched my Presidential Exploratory Committee, and I couldn't be more excited to hit the ground and listen to more Americans about their concerns, worries, fears, and priorities.

But the truth is, accomplishing our goal isn't cheap. _**[So today, I'm humbly asking if you could please chip in $5, $10, $25, or anything you can afford to help my team and I keep trying to restore FAITH in America.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=1bdf79f346ef4ea396b23458737c347f&_e=F1JXzzMdQQzeEzHbcmsu73kjTwxWHG69CHqo9hPyuvbCsuJRPNYp1EPzuU1mtzgCZE6tT5VU1Hw0pJ95zEZYj24fm106uwzHoA_E8wz8cDF9axhfcpN0W4GU8SLkoGSScAQFBFfaPr5iF8MFUzmxt81Gb0NHFi5gPyJPNCfwBxjfUEdUgyrf7OGXSetRN-NcIOugDypGZ8W4fCJg3h6AlmXhbjW7gYwarAxUE2zJBXJhC1yH1hEwyaRLSxWsok10V3k0RSbDTOHfMiHW9Z292eiSRE9cVNlut1K7Je31F42OGbjOUJWoCVbU5QbMnQVndYgO1bwHgwIwcwaCTxcQgmLG64vMOjE8oRbV2veknq4fNU7HijocqZgrtWrvccif "So today, I’m humbly asking if you could please chip in $5, $10, $25, or anything you can afford to help my team and I keep trying to restore FAITH in America.")**_ I believe our best days are ahead of us, but I can't do this alone. Are you with me?
---
| | [I'M WITH TIM SCOTT](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=1bdf79f346ef4ea396b23458737c347f&_e=f9mh8rzS9sZgsbrOTCCoOdK3aBtHQa962a2WaS0o2c-i3p349t1dm_wpTip4HzSYx4fXq453R8MszVPCEn_Tdv5x_bZpIRuj4OKLAj6jRUiUY1k3ddfzzEL7tpTV6vtBojd8jbtHBmT760cWOTyV0GcNdYSGnMrO1m1HFXT7yjAT27Lv8jwtA9GJbkvKxFLx0_soyoPuLUOW-BpilLLWQd7e3BS-1wcNXOrGTvOi8WOoabzbh1E-CRU4R8gZG_BAvMkr6Ail6x6fkcVm-AK9Mu2mIQ8pIIrtGzbDotIsAe5e1Fg-XuK6443aKW96xFpsDbh_LPHXaYpwGn19_mlnNOii2sX6ol4AqDwMTkgqrnFk4hVTebRho44KlXbo1mkw "JOIN MY TEAM")
---

I was raised in a single-parent household in North Charleston, South Carolina. My mom worked 16-hour days to keep food on the table and a roof over our heads. I got my first job, changing oil at a gas station, when I was 13. **I understand the value of a dollar.**

I don't take asking for money lightly. I know that every donation made is a sacrifice, and I am forever grateful for each and every gift.

_**[I know we have been asking a lot lately, but it would mean so much if you could give $5 to help us restore faith in America.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=1bdf79f346ef4ea396b23458737c347f&_e=f9mh8rzS9sZgsbrOTCCoOdK3aBtHQa962a2WaS0o2c-i3p349t1dm_wpTip4HzSYx4fXq453R8MszVPCEn_Tdv5x_bZpIRuj4OKLAj6jRUiUY1k3ddfzzEL7tpTV6vtBojd8jbtHBmT760cWOTyV0GcNdYSGnMrO1m1HFXT7yjAT27Lv8jwtA9GJbkvKxFLx0_soyoPuLUOW-BpilLLWQd7e3BS-1wcNXOrGTvOi8WNJEWLY0v6SR2KuW5Oqs_WQLpdt0W6MOwigq7Dz29XFhEI-9g5XfgvlltOpVkj_VeR-po78tlfV_4Er02F_Jp9lmhX0rkKQ7RX-JAaSXk5WHuILlMbl9ggE8j5iDmwl6lA1hnD3J9eoc5TnC8l_XkE8 "I know we have been asking a lot lately, but it would mean so much if you could give $5 to help us restore faith in America.")**_

| This is absurd, Peter.

Republicans are focused on banning everything they deem is “hurting our kids.” Books. Drag shows. Sex-Ed. You name it.

But when it comes to addressing assault rifles — the very thing killing our kids at schools — they are silent.

It’s clear the GOP’s priorities are out of whack. We need to take back the House majority in order to protect our communities from weapons of war that have no place on the streets. clean_body: The effects of climate change are worsening at a rapid pace, while climate action is falling behind. | = | | | Rising seas could swallow millions of acres in the U.S. within decades \- The Washington Post | = Rising sea levels threaten thousands of homes, offices, and other infrastructure across U.S. coastlines. This will have an immediate impact on the livelihoods of millions of people, according to a new study. The effects of climate change are worsening at a rapid pace, while climate action is falling behind.We need to change this. = | = We cannot wait another decade to take action — our homes will be underwater, and we will be left to face the life-threatening consequences. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Let’s protect our planet together, Jane Fonda Climate PAC | | = Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. name: Lateefah Simon
subject: This movement is powered by people like you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LATEEFAH FOR CONGRESS
body:
We're going to organize in every community of California’s 12th to bring people together.
# [](https://act.lateefahsimon.com/go/39?t=1&akid=13%2E1163%2EQuE8jm)
**[As this week gets going, I'm reaching out to ask you to please invest in our campaign right now.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ls-em20230417-1&refcode=em20230417-1?refcode2=13_1163_QuE8jm&akid=13%2E1163%2EQuE8jm)** Here's why:
Over the course of this campaign, we're going to organize in every community of California's 12th to bring people together, build a movement, and ensure our voices are heard all the way in Washington.
_That organizing is powered by grassroots supporters like you._ It's the greatest blessing to know so many members of our beloved community are already on this team -- but we're just getting started.
Right now, we are still behind where we need to be in terms of fundraising. **[Can you chip in whatever you can to help us catch up? I wouldn't ask if it weren't really important.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ls-em20230417-1&refcode=em20230417-1?refcode2=13_1163_QuE8jm&akid=13%2E1163%2EQuE8jm)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ls-em20230417-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230417-1&refcode2=13_1163_QuE8jm&akid=13%2E1163%2EQuE8jm)**
With such a big organizing program to get ready for, now's the worst time to fall short -- and I know that together, we'll be ready for anything. Thank you for being with me.
Onward,
Lateefah Simon

* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ls-em20230417-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230417-1&refcode2=13_1163_QuE8jm&akid=13%2E1163%2EQuE8jm)**

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.lateefahsimon.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=13%2E1163%2EQuE8jm)

To give by check:
Lateefah for Congress
1714 Franklin St #100 - 438,
Oakland, CA, 94612
Email us: [info@lateefahsimon.com](mailto:info@lateefahsimon.com)

The Democrat who steps up to take on Ted Cruz is going to need a massive grassroots army behind them.
We're fundraising earlier than ever so we can help Ted Cruz's opponent hit the ground running. We're asking you to join us. Chip in any amount now to become a Defeat Cruz Founding Donor >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/therealtexas_cruz?refcode=021923_1]
Peter, we wanted you to be the first to know:
We’re taking on Ted Cruz.
He’s up for re-election next year, and he’s never been more vulnerable. This is a once in a lifetime political opportunity, and we aren't going to waste it.
As soon a Democrat steps up to run against him, they’re going to need our support. So we’re launching our fundraising efforts earlier than EVER before.

And if he loses... the Democrats are all but GUARANTEED to hold the Senate.

name: Alexander Hyatt
subject: Activate your membership
body:
The Heritage Foundation is excited to welcome new members in 2023

| | | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6d7e8f50bdf04f229f580e0940c45c5d&_e=WKq52XvDKGTHVLtqOxXUE1PI5SDoWmsBB7Yf3fR9-u-SZdASmhoEUG1jXfPbKtjAhD7YM2QPGEPnHNryJ2zQxjTIlJaAybS0sQZ6AYjpgnC8iT-jN38-NTRsYD4QoXN1jyM6Ura4r1cYkFfEkGRUz6ioJJvNnt5i4sHILemXleSkeV2GQbIg4VU_QE8wPHegQV7kSCCyDXu74N7RI05jmGO3qy07Ip9-2sarr9i49hzUpZJ1Cg4BFjW_fWbppMxNgEGmYacyJwVCOQVyc4UK_I_uvj3mQ4T_AUZvOuzx6cFs6C0cCMMMpADsVjHje3Ei67vUzkLHO_cqSwmbXONUxA%3D%3D)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative,

I hope this email finds you well. The Heritage Foundation is excited to welcome new members in 2023, and we would be honored if you joined us in our fight to advance conservative policy solutions in Washington and across the country.

---
|
[](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6d7e8f50bdf04f229f580e0940c45c5d&_e=WKq52XvDKGTHVLtqOxXUE1PI5SDoWmsBB7Yf3fR9-u-SZdASmhoEUG1jXfPbKtjAhD7YM2QPGEPnHNryJ2zQxjTIlJaAybS0sQZ6AYjpgnC8iT-jN38-NTRsYD4QoXN1jyM6Ura4r1cYkFfEkGRUz6ioJJvNnt5i4sHILemXleSkeV2GQbIg4VU_QE8wPHegs39tbyvfX_WUSrtLTtwJ1V7dYuH3S2GMK2Xiyvpcx7dkx2-L64KR_EaB5fzlMG36PZnaajsvVqlIvP29M6Qomk8NNKtUcwMdwfPZ8W0nZGlF_49ej5GpPRidwrE_BIoW0yPHWYeBMbDk_GCzFoR-_g%3D%3D)
---
| | As someone who believes in individual freedom, limited government, and free enterprise, we know you share our values. We need your help to ensure that conservative policies continue to shape the direction of our country.

I would like to personally invite you to join The Heritage Foundation today by clicking on this secure link: [https://secured.heritage.org/activate/](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6d7e8f50bdf04f229f580e0940c45c5d&_e=WKq52XvDKGTHVLtqOxXUE1PI5SDoWmsBB7Yf3fR9-u-SZdASmhoEUG1jXfPbKtjAhD7YM2QPGEPnHNryJ2zQxjTIlJaAybS0sQZ6AYjpgnC8iT-jN38-NTRsYD4QoXN1jyM6Ura4r1cYkFfEkGRUz6ioJJvNnt5i4sHILemXleSkeV2GQbIg4VU_QE8wPHegvULt7Hbt-fdnm4_5jDtDv5yIrg5BhDtF5aa51tlM4_aQb5TmvVHKwYxrbQo-t5iyllgrbYYPDeNPtHeawaw5OlfzabchH0T2vlcN-1b-DbrXCDtNvuZycU4Fb3lKpTVjYI5OzjuMCKV3tEnhqDSPvw%3D%3D)

Once you become a member, you will receive access to our exclusive members-only resources, such as policy briefings, research reports, and special events with our experts. Your support will help us stand up against the radical left agenda that seeks to undermine American values.

Thank you for considering joining our efforts to make a difference. We hope to welcome you to our community soon.

Best regards,

Alexander Hyatt
Membership Programs
The Heritage Foundation

**P.S. When you activate your membership, you will also receive a personalized membership card and access to our weekly policy update emails. Join us today by clicking on this secure link:[https://secured.heritage.org/activate/](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6d7e8f50bdf04f229f580e0940c45c5d&_e=WKq52XvDKGTHVLtqOxXUE1PI5SDoWmsBB7Yf3fR9-u-SZdASmhoEUG1jXfPbKtjAhD7YM2QPGEPnHNryJ2zQxjTIlJaAybS0sQZ6AYjpgnC8iT-jN38-NTRsYD4QoXN1jyM6Ura4r1cYkFfEkGRUz6ioJJvNnt5i4sHILemXleSkeV2GQbIg4VU_QE8wPHeg1fka7cj6RHe0AORcPFO8s7G7L4cZtDm3PzkvnpKxEOEM1RKSi2s0gAipje_vEBIq-bsBugZGVE0zr4izwEAo5RXks9zRWyjMyHp0h7JGYfqhnT0VfjHxePtt0pLKdlTUHxyhSbwXV_BbGnLchFpBdg%3D%3D)**

body:

| VCDL-PAC Endorses John McGuire in Senate District 10
---
| Dear Friend,
I'm honored to have the support and endorsement of The Virginia Citizen Defense league (VCDL). I have been a stalwart supporter of the Second Amendment in Virginia. and received a 100% VCDL score each year for six years. As a father, I taught my children everything they needed to know about handling a firearm safely, and about the rights that are guaranteed to them by God, and protected by the United States Constitution. As a Navy SEAL for over ten years, I defended our nation and our Constitution against all enemies, both foreign and domestic. As a Delegate, I have a proven record of standing up for our Second Amendment right and working to repeal infringements to the same. With your support, I will continue my fight in the Virginia State Senate. We must regain the majority in the Senate next year, and ensure our Second Amendments rights are protected.
---

April 17, 2023
For Immediate Release:
VCDL-PAC Endorses John McGuire in Senate District 10
VCDL-PAC announces the enthusiastic endorsement of Delegate John McGuire for Virginia's Senate District 10. John has a 100% voting record representing the 56th District in Virginia's House of Delegates since he was first elected in 2017 and has been a reliable ally in Richmond. Delegate McGuire has also introduced some hard-hitting 2A bills during his time in the legislature. We believe he is the best choice in the new Senate District 10 to preserve and protect our gun rights here in the Commonwealth. The Senate in Virginia needs strong leadership to roll back some of the egregious restrictions we saw under the Northam Administration. John McGuire will provide that leadership, just as he did as a Navy SEAL protecting this country.
Delegates to the 10th Senate District Convention: Please vote for John McGuire on May 6th.

Buckingham County High School 78 Knights Road
Buckingham, Virginia 23921 Registrations begins at 10:30

Yours in Liberty,
Cathy McNickle VCDL-PAC Chair vcdl-pac.chair@vcdl.org

Paid for and Authorized by Friends of John McGuire

subject: Free and fair elections under attack in NC

body:
There’s a tough fight ahead of us, but I know I have a strong network of supporters ready to defend free and fair elections.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61934229/401696900/-340664628?refcode=BLU-VFC-20230417-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhM2NiN2NjZS02MmRkLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oP5ozLLaG1K1KVfScNeEcA6jnHtj5SuwKnBnYg_TDTA=)

| Peter,

Republicans have shown time and time again that they are willing to attack voting rights to stay in power.

Their latest efforts to reverse North Carolina’s gerrymandering ruling could jeopardize the rights of millions of North Carolinians at the ballot, and further disenfranchise Black and Brown communities. I ran for Congress to protect voting rights and stand up to far-right Republicans.

There’s a tough fight ahead of us, but I know I have a strong network of supporters ready to defend free and fair elections. clean_body: There’s a tough fight ahead of us, but I know I have a strong network of supporters ready to defend free and fair elections. | = | Peter, Republicans have shown time and time again that they are willing to attack voting rights to stay in power. Their latest efforts to reverse North Carolina’s gerrymandering ruling could jeopardize the rights of millions of North Carolinians at the ballot, and further disenfranchise Black and Brown communities. I ran for Congress to protect voting rights and stand up to far-right Republicans. There’s a tough fight ahead of us, but I know I have a strong network of supporters ready to defend free and fair elections. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Access to free and fair elections is a constitutional right, and we must be prepared to defend it. | | **_We’re already falling behind in the race to win Georgia._**

The GOP has started pouring resources into Georgia ahead of 2024, and the vast majority of our donors are still sleeping.

The Koch network is building a massive field program in Georgia. Ron DeSantis has made stops in Georgia. GOP Presidential candidates are visiting us to get face time with voters.
