body:
| | Team,

**When my daughter was growing up, there was no place I was happier to see her than in the library.** I wanted her to have a place where she could choose the books she wanted to read and the ideas she wanted to explore, not just those that someone else picked for her. I thought it was an indispensable part of her education.

Yet across America today, the right-wing book-banning brigade is making school and public libraries their next target.

In Missouri, the State Legislature, having failed to intimidate librarians into removing books from the shelves, just voted to **defund all public libraries in the state.** From Michigan to Arkansas, local municipalities have done the same. Last year In New Jersey, a local right-wing group tried to get a school librarian arrested because they objected to books her library offered.

[Here at Districts for Democracy, we are fighting for freedom of expression and against censorship, but we can’t do it alone. Can you pitch in $10 right now to support our mission?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61934793/401698594/1647013030?amount=10&refcode=EM_NBI_DFD_20230417_FR_BookBans_0_TomMalinowski_NA_NA_BookBans&refcode2=088e27e1-63dd-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwODhlMjdlMS02M2RkLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NVoueJ8PJzh7TFe0ffPNHXefd1yFYgc7J53K-00Z46k=) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.

There are real threats to our kids today. School shootings. Substance abuse. A youth mental health crisis. And yes, too many of our kids are exposed to things that aren’t appropriate at too young an age — but on the internet and social media, not the library! The idea that libraries are the most dangerous places for our kids to be is, on its face, absurd — unless, I suppose, you are part of a movement that fears teaching young Americans facts and critical thinking.

At Districts for Democracy, we’d rather protect our kids from guns than ideas. And we’ll be supporting non-partisan school board candidates who feel the same way. Our very first race will be at the end of April, in Westfield, New Jersey, and there will be many more this Fall. [Please pitch in $10 ASAP to help us defeat right-wing attacks on our public schools and libraries, and defend the freedom to learn across our country.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61934800/401698601/1647013030?amount=10&refcode=EM_NBI_DFD_20230417_FR_BookBans_0_TomMalinowski_NA_NA_BookBans&refcode2=088e27e1-63dd-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwODhlMjdlMS02M2RkLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NVoueJ8PJzh7TFe0ffPNHXefd1yFYgc7J53K-00Z46k=)

body:
[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1001&akid=175%2E35263%2EuVvVD8 ]TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE

Peter,

If you look at the Senate map for 2024, very few states will be as
competitive as Wisconsin. We’ll explain more in just a moment, but first,
[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2433?c0=tbe-em-launch23.3BoO5m&refcode=AU_STB_FR_LAU_GEN_AC_20230417_PM2_V1_S1&t=1004&akid=175%2E35263%2EuVvVD8 ]will you chip in $3 to help us protect Tammy’s seat and our Democratic
Senate majority along with it?

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2433?c0=tbe-em-launch23.3BoO5m&refcode=AU_STB_FR_LAU_GEN_AC_20230417_PM2_V1_S1&t=1005&akid=175%2E35263%2EuVvVD8 ]DONATE $3

Last year, Ron Johnson (R) won Wisconsin's other Senate seat by just 1
point. And two years earlier, President Joe Biden won our state by just
0.6 points! With Wisconsin being a top battleground state, there's no
telling how much the GOP will spend to defeat and flip the Senate seat
red.

This race will be one of the most competitive and expensive in the
country, and Tammy urgently needs your support to take on the GOP and
prepare for any attacks they throw our way.

The ONLY way we'll defend this seat is if we're in this together — and
that is why we need to ask:

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2433?c0=tbe-em-launch23.3BoO5m&refcode=AU_STB_FR_LAU_GEN_AC_20230417_PM2_V1_S1&t=1006&akid=175%2E35263%2EuVvVD8 ]Can you make a $3 contribution today to help Tammy Baldwin overcome
whatever the GOP throws our way? You can become a Founding Donor of our
campaign and help keep Tammy on a path to victory in this race.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2235?c0=tbe-em-launch23.pQ6O_t&refcode=AU_STB_FR_LAU_GEN_AC_20230417_PM2_V1_S1&t=1007&akid=175%2E35263%2EuVvVD8 ]CHIP IN $3 NOW

It was thanks to the power of this grassroots team that we were able to make history last November and deliver the change that Southwest Ohio deserved.

But now that _Cook Political Report_ and _Sabato's Crystal Ball_ have named _OH-01 a pure toss-up once again_ , Kevin McCarthy and national Republicans are already crafting their strategy, raising money, and gearing up to try and defeat Greg next November.

name: Team Cori
subject: Justice for Ralph
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
Content Warning: This email contains language about anti-Black violence and white supremacy.
#
_Content warning: This email contains language about anti-Black violence and white supremacy.
_
Peter:
Ralph Yarl, a 16-year-old Black boy, was shot twice in Kansas City, Missouri after accidentally ringing the doorbell of the wrong house. After being shot, Ralph had to run to three different homes before someone finally agreed to help him.
**This is yet another example of the pervasive anti-Black violence we see across this country every single day.** While Ralph is recovering, the trauma that he and his family will endure will be long and painful. We have heard this story many times over — and the painful truth is that most Black boys and men do not survive these racist encounters.
**This was no accident or mistake. This was a hate crime, deeply rooted in white supremacy.** Reports further indicate that the white man who was taken into police custody was released shortly after without being charged — another example of how pervasive white supremacy is in all of our existing systems.
Ralph deserves to live in a country where he and other Black boys and men do not need to worry about whether or not they will survive a simple door knock.
[**That's why today, we're asking if you can support Ralph Yarl's GoFundMe to cover his medical bills and recovery. Any additional funds will be used for college expenses, where Ralph plans to major in chemical engineering.**](https://act.coribush.org/go/1190?t=1&akid=2533%2E1082990%2EtgaQvs)
Thank you for your help,
Team Cori

Follow us on **[Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/VoteCoriBush/)** , **[Twitter](https://twitter.com/CoriBush)** , **[Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/coribush/)** , and **[visit our website](https://coribush.org/)**. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Mail us: Cori Bush for Congress, 75 North Oaks Plaza, St. Louis, MO 63121.
Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress

body:
There is a disturbing trend on the left

| | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=245af596c35741ab8b5e72227744748c&_e=49OdyZFjU8fe3nqYhuEhxZJmInvkan7M0N9woRmPxzUkO1_ryBZVLtn1YAHQCsLud5GpuGK91Q6Whj33DCTtZLNtBrk4ojZpGeCyO3b-Kso1VgFN4mIcyXO9XzHziEoYbLZ1-xVFYdQnvXP4YwsQhnqVfSf73VSKRvTkG8OIgLmXNHg6RJforqF7VhZBRFu1CZsokYB9UU0YTCPjqXfl1mlxvYqqcqoVrm2qRcMaP-wmWkdbBVebeeoULe-ZPh7jcabDMD7YtwOt-u1PSpcIFQ%3D%3D)

Fellow American,

There is a disturbing trend on the left-- Transgender activists are increasingly emboldened to attack those who oppose them. Time after time, we watch the left enable the rhetoric and justify the violence-- **ENOUGH IS ENOUGH!** This weekend, I was ambushed and assaulted by a transgender activist after speaking to a group of students at San Francisco State University. Students gathered wanting to hear the pro-woman side of the sports debate but were impeded by transgender activists, shouting, cursing, and threatening. This left-wing intimidation campaign won't work! This is only more evidence that I'm fighting the good fight, and proof that women need sex-protected spaces! I know what I'm doing is right. When they want you silent, speak louder. I'm on the frontlines fighting for women and girls and speaking TRUTH to all, even those who refuse to hear it. [**Will you step up and stand with me in this fight? clean_body: There is a disturbing trend on the left | | | Fellow American, There is a disturbing trend on the left-- Transgender activists are increasingly emboldened to attack those who oppose them. Time after time, we watch the left enable the rhetoric and justify the violence-- ENOUGH IS ENOUGH! This weekend, I was ambushed and assaulted by a transgender activist after speaking to a group of students at San Francisco State University. Students gathered wanting to hear the pro-woman side of the sports debate but were impeded by transgender activists, shouting, cursing, and threatening. This left-wing intimidation campaign won't work! This is only more evidence that I'm fighting the good fight, and proof that women need sex-protected spaces! I know what I'm doing is right. When they want you silent, speak louder. I'm on the frontlines fighting for women and girls and speaking TRUTH to all, even those who refuse to hear it. Thank you for your support, Riley Gaines | | Paid for by the Nine PAC | | Defend the Constitution 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Ro Khanna
subject: Why I’m calling on Sen. Feinstein to Resign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ro for Congress
body:
https://rokhanna.com [https://rokhanna.com]

Friend,

Last week, I made a simple statement: If Senator Feinstein is missing votes and failing to fulfill her responsibilities as a member of the US Senate, she must resign.

Senator Feinstein has had a long and distinguished career in public service. She has blazed a trail for women in positions of power since her days as mayor of San Francisco. But her absence in the Senate for the foreseeable future leaves Democrats in a very difficult position.

The fact is that without Senator Feinstein’s presence on the Judiciary Committee, we are deadlocked by a 50-50 vote and unable to approve nominees for federal judges. With rogue judges and radical Trump appointees running our federal courts, fundamental constitutional rights such as women’s health and safety and the right to choose are on the line. We cannot afford delay. We must choose democracy over decorum.

Sign if you agree: It’s time for Senator Feinstein to resign so judicial confirmations don’t grind to a halt. [https://act.rokhanna.com/a/senator-feinstein-resign-judicial-confirmations-petition?contactdata=q90aX1FdSdyx1HDcT3eDZpJYaX3jCpf2RpPBb5NBdExCQkA254wvlkhuoCBP4RsRzTG+lNYCjClGCbATCs44hkWQimNSZV3ng7LXlN8Vb6rqj1EZ/uRYFBxDzAMyj47hgzymNGnMi/YUjxX77T5ieg==]

Sign the Petition [https://act.rokhanna.com/a/senator-feinstein-resign-judicial-confirmations-petition?contactdata=q90aX1FdSdyx1HDcT3eDZpJYaX3jCpf2RpPBb5NBdExCQkA254wvlkhuoCBP4RsRzTG+lNYCjClGCbATCs44hkWQimNSZV3ng7LXlN8Vb6rqj1EZ/uRYFBxDzAMyj47hgzymNGnMi/YUjxX77T5ieg==]

https://twitter.com/RoKhanna/status/1646261866258223106 [https://twitter.com/RoKhanna/status/1646261866258223106]

We have a responsibility to put democracy first over personal loyalty. But right now, beltway insiders are holding the Judiciary Committee hostage for the sake of maintaining the status quo.

Sign if you agree: To preserve our fundamental rights in the courts, we need a US Senator who can keep judicial appointments on track. [https://act.rokhanna.com/a/senator-feinstein-resign-judicial-confirmations-petition?contactdata=q90aX1FdSdyx1HDcT3eDZpJYaX3jCpf2RpPBb5NBdExCQkA254wvlkhuoCBP4RsRzTG+lNYCjClGCbATCs44hkWQimNSZV3ng7LXlN8Vb6rqj1EZ/uRYFBxDzAMyj47hgzymNGnMi/YUjxX77T5ieg==]

Onward,
Ro

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature Is Needed: The remaining 900 Southern Beaufort polar bears could be WIPED OUT by Arctic drilling
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1725702?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **_URGENT ACTION NEEDED:_ Vulnerable polar bears are being pushed closer to EXTINCTION by Big Oil’s ocean pollution!** Polar bears are running out of time on this Earth, Friend. Due to human-driven climate change, the Arctic is warming **_TWICE as fast_** as the rest of the world, and experts worry the region will be **_completely ice-free as soon as 2054_ \--_that’s just 31 years away!_** And while their precious habitat melts away before them, helpless polar bears are suffering from **malnutrition and starvation.** The most _**imperiled polar bear**_ in the world is the _Southern Beaufort_ Sea population, which now has only _**900 polar bears remaining.**_ To make matters worse for these iconic sea mammals, the Biden Administration has recently sided with the fossil fuel industry by allowing oil and gas drilling in the Arctic, which could _**WIPE OUT these vulnerable polar bears forever.**_ Please, Friend, if we’re going to STOP Big Oil and Gas from harassing innocent polar bears and pushing them closer to _**EXTINCTION**_ , we need immediate action from **4,017 more activists like you by 11:59 P.M. TONIGHT. [Will you step up right now to help SAVE our beloved polar bears before it’s too late? ADD YOUR NAME! >>](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1725703?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1725704?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Under the new Biden rule, Big Oil and Gas is allowed to perform intensive drilling and other industrial activities that will bring massive amounts of **noise and air pollution, vessel traffic, and hazardous chemicals** into the sensitive Arctic region.
This corporate harassment not only frightens defenseless polar bears but also disrupts critical bear denning sites and can **harm their survival mechanisms,** leading to**impaired ability to feed, hunt, and tend to their young --__which can be FATAL to fragile baby bear cubs.__**
The U.S. Fish and Wildlife Service is our only hope of **PREVENTING** this Biden rule from going into effect and**STOPPING** Big Oil and Gas harassment of at-risk polar bears. In fact, FWS itself has confirmed a **95% probability** that permitting this drilling activity will cause **_serious injury or death to polar bears_ \-- _but the agency swept these findings under the rug!_**
_**Friend, this is completely unacceptable from the agency tasked with protecting our Earth and its living beings.**_ _Are you going to allow our federal government to continue giving**dirty energy handouts** to the fossil fuel industry? Or will you speak up today and fight back to **DEFEND voiceless polar bears** from corporate greed? _[**Take action NOW to demand that FWS does NOT authorize dangerous expanded oil and gas activities in the Arctic! >>**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1725705?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1725704?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Thanks for being a true champion for polar bears and the planet!
Friends of the Earth**
|

body:

## **Happy Monday. Join us[tonight at 6 pm](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qujhkul-trhiujldw-y/) for the April CaucusRoom Council Meeting.**
[](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qujhkul-trhiujldw-j/) **Grow your organization and keep the momentum going with our powerful platform.** [Schedule a CaucusRoom Live demo today!](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qujhkul-trhiujldw-t/) **Teenage Mob in Chicago** Hundreds of****[**teenagers stormed the streets of downtown Chicago** ,](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qujhkul-trhiujldw-i/)**** smashing car windows, attacking bystanders, and sending panicked tourists running from the sound of gunfire. **The Border is Wide Open** Border Patrol agents are **[being kept in the dark](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qujhkul-trhiujldw-d/)** on how to prepare for a flood of illegal immigrants when Title 42 ends on May 11th. Meanwhile, **[Biden has a new app](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qujhkul-trhiujldw-h/)** for migrants that cross our border illegally. **Is he a Whistle Blower?** Massachusetts Air National Guardsman **[is facing 15 years in prison](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qujhkul-trhiujldw-k/) **for leaking the truth about the Ukraine war. **We All Know it's True** Oh my! Rep Jerry Nadler claims **[Republicans are lying to obstruct justice](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qujhkul-trhiujldw-u/)** in Trump's case in NY. **Religious Freedom Threatened** Colorado's Governor has **[made the state a dangerous place](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qujhkul-trhiujldw-o/)** for the lives of children. **YIKES!** Former Vice President **[Mike Pence received a not so warm welcome](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qujhkul-trhiujldw-x/)** during his appearance at the annual National Rifle Association (NRA) convention.

**Protect the Children** Former President Donald Trump **[has called for armed security at all schools across the country](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qujhkul-trhiujldw-m/)** , saying we can better protect children for a small fraction of Biden's spending on Ukraine. **Affordable Education**
# This [**Christian college is booming** ](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qujhkul-trhiujldw-c/)as campus enrollment has more than tripled in the last decade.
**Let****'s [have a good laugh](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qujhkul-trhiujldw-q/)!**
* **[Warning](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qujhkul-trhiujldw-a/).**
* **[History repeats](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qujhkul-trhiujldw-f/) **itself**.**
* His**[one mistake](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qujhkul-trhiujldw-z/).**
* You**[know](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qujhkul-trhiujldw-v/).**

**[We are looking for your feedback](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qujhkul-trhiujldw-e/)** to understand your first impression of our messaging. name: Wes Moore
subject: Abortion remains legal and accessible in Maryland.
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61936023/401702918/2098035812?refcode=fl_em_fr_20230417mifepristone_wm_180da_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MTQ1Y2ExNy02YmRkLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QlSz41HyggzTJlMrkqAbLC-6yNrp2VAOzmL3fc6g2jw=)
---
Team, Recently, a federal judge in Texas delivered yet another blow to reproductive freedom in America through a court ruling that actively takes rights away from Americans. **This conservative judge made the unprecedented decision to invalidate the Food and Drug Administration’s approval of mifepristone, a commonly used abortion pill that was first approved by the FDA more than two decades ago.** It’s the most consequential attack on reproductive choice since the Supreme Court overturned _Roe v. Wade_ last summer, and it leaves the fate of birth control and other reproductive health care at risk. Despite its record of being safer to take than everyday drugs like ibuprofen (Advil), acetaminophen (Tylenol), penicillin, and Viagra, mifepristone could become inaccessible for millions of Americans as soon as Thursday. We know this isn’t about safety. It’s a blatant attack on reproductive choice and women’s health. Not only is mifepristone used in about 50% of abortions across the country, but it’s also used in cases of miscarriage. **That’s why my administration is urgently taking action to stockpile mifepristone for upwards of three years, and our legislative session just passed three bills to increase abortion access and privacy.** Here in Maryland, abortion, including abortion medication like mifepristone, remains legal and accessible in our state. The right to choose is exactly that — a right. And in our Maryland, we will always defend that right. **[Unfortunately, if someone like my previous far-right opponent was elected to this seat, we risk losing that right. As long as I’m your governor, I will protect abortion access. If you can, make a grassroots contribution to support our pro-choice campaign for the long-haul today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61936025/401702920/2098035812?refcode=fl_em_fr_20230417mifepristone_wm_180da_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MTQ1Y2ExNy02YmRkLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QlSz41HyggzTJlMrkqAbLC-6yNrp2VAOzmL3fc6g2jw=)** | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

clean_body: | = Team, Recently, a federal judge in Texas delivered yet another blow to reproductive freedom in America through a court ruling that actively takes rights away from Americans. This conservative judge made the unprecedented decision to invalidate the Food and Drug Administration’s approval of mifepristone, a commonly used abortion pill that was first approved by the FDA more than two decades ago. It’s the most consequential attack on reproductive choice since the Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade last summer, and it leaves the fate of birth control and other reproductive health care at risk. Despite its record of being safer to take than everyday drugs like ibuprofen (Advil), acetaminophen (Tylenol), penicillin, and Viagra, mifepristone could become inaccessible for millions of Americans as soon as Thursday. We know this isn’t about safety. It’s a blatant attack on reproductive choice and women’s health. Not only is mifepristone used in about 50% of abortions across the country, but it’s also used in cases of miscarriage. That’s why my administration is urgently taking action to stockpile mifepristone for upwards of three years, and our legislative session just passed three bills to increase abortion access and privacy. Here in Maryland, abortion, including abortion medication like mifepristone, remains legal and accessible in our state. The right to choose is exactly that — a right. And in our Maryland, we will always defend that right. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Elevate, Wes | Wes Moore is a combat veteran, Rhodes Scholar, former small business owner and leader of one of the nation’s largest poverty-fighting organizations — and now, your Governor! name: Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
subject: Do you support an assault weapons ban?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
There have been more mass shootings than days in 2023 with over 5,000 Americans losing their lives due to an act of gun violence. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61936419/401704273/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwODZkNDgzMy02YmRkLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A-swkgAGS39FVUMxb6gL6JugJsjmDX12gcaiYLYAsCU=&emci=9fe1d58b-35dd-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=086d4833-6bdd-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=15820338)

Peter,

There have been more mass shootings than days in 2023 with over 5,000 Americans losing their lives due to an act of gun violence. From Monterey Park to Nashville and Louisville, recent devastating mass shootings have once again torn communities apart across the nation.

**Enough is enough.** It's time we take action to end this tragic and uniquely American epidemic – and that starts with banning assault weapons.

Assault weapons are consistently the weapon of choice in mass shootings. There's no place for these weapons of war in our communities. That's why last year, Kim was proud to vote to reinstate a federal assault weapons ban to prevent more lives from being lost, but this legislation was held up in the Senate.

As a mom, pediatrician, and member of Congress, Kim is continuing to fight to get weapons of war off our streets, but she wants to hear from you. **[Do you support a federal assault weapons ban? Take our one-question poll now →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61936420/401704274/2080369115?ms=em23_230417_awpoll_esrv_gq_act___ts_ettx&refcode=em23_230417_awpoll_esrv_gq_act___ts_ettx&source=em23_230417_awpoll_esrv_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230417_awpoll_esrv_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=99JsLIGp1/TdRgDgPM7gcGh68qhLXVTXzHi0nsx/rkJSHLzA6zn/Ldt7DcWkatZb5ju2ODLyLVkK34LXvZpwP4sFGwkOuRh9j9Pfg2g/A0xg5Ha7hxfq7MdWw25cX6WZ4yuxENzgvlGAf2pDI95VBTf62UyxfJxI/T+WrnVkp9Y=&refcode2=086d4833-6bdd-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwODZkNDgzMy02YmRkLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A-swkgAGS39FVUMxb6gL6JugJsjmDX12gcaiYLYAsCU=&emci=9fe1d58b-35dd-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=086d4833-6bdd-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=15820338)** | [YES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61936421/401704275/2080369115?ms=em23_230417_awpoll_esrv_gq_act___ts_ettx&refcode=em23_230417_awpoll_esrv_gq_act___ts_ettx&source=em23_230417_awpoll_esrv_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230417_awpoll_esrv_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=99JsLIGp1/TdRgDgPM7gcGh68qhLXVTXzHi0nsx/rkJSHLzA6zn/Ldt7DcWkatZb5ju2ODLyLVkK34LXvZpwP4sFGwkOuRh9j9Pfg2g/A0xg5Ha7hxfq7MdWw25cX6WZ4yuxENzgvlGAf2pDI95VBTf62UyxfJxI/T+WrnVkp9Y=&refcode2=086d4833-6bdd-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwODZkNDgzMy02YmRkLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A-swkgAGS39FVUMxb6gL6JugJsjmDX12gcaiYLYAsCU=&emci=9fe1d58b-35dd-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=086d4833-6bdd-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=15820338)

This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, so we need your help to keep Kim in Congress. Chip in now to help protect Kim's seat in 2024. = Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress Contributions or gifts to Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress are not tax deductible. Fight back against treason

We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0958d529-a765-481a-a15c-3c46d1aa2c32/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

| | | | | Peter, _We all know Marjorie Taylor Greene, the racist, anti-Semitic, anti-gay, ignorant, cruel & incompetent loudmouth is unfit to be in Congress. _**_Yet, she just proved again, and I don't say this lightly: She. Is. A. Dangerous. Traitor._** **_The FBI arrested Justin Teixeira, a white supremacist who burrowed his way into the Air National Guard, stole and shared sensitive, classified secrets online about the war in Ukraine. It helped seditionists and genocidal madman Putin, while endangering Americans around the globe._ ** **_The utterly repulsive Greene immediately defended this scumbag traitor_** , _tweeting that President Biden was persecuting Teixeira because he's "white, male, Christian" and pro-Russia. Here's former Rep. Liz Cheney's response:_ [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf85f6de2-83eb-466e-ba48-306224316138/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Former CIA Director John Brennan called her a dangerous security risk, unfit to be in the House. We must remove her._ **_Sadly, Greene's from a gerrymandered, pro-Trump district. Yet, we have Stacey Abrams. She already proved she can change the tide of history, when her group, Fair Fight, did such an amazing job registering and turning out Georgia voters that President Biden won there in a shocker, as did Senators Warnock (twice) & Ossoff. _** [**_Fair Fight's still changing political gravity in Georgia, and making Marjorie Taylor Greene the face of the GOP nationwide, an albatross. Will you join us in taking that first step towards removing Greene from office by giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to Stacey Abrams' Fair Fight?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta07ebe1b-ffbd-4205-8e65-12c78faaf5d5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thank you for fighting for a Democratic America and against treason._ Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. name: =?utf-8?b?8J+TrFNJR04gT1VSIExFVFRFUiAoVlBQKQ==?=
subject: Thank DA Bragg for Holding Trump Accountable >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
we’re OVERJOYED by this news
| **Trump Surrenders Following Criminal Indictment by Grand Jury** **Listen, this is a HUGE victory for our democracy, so we’re sending Bragg a letter from our top grassroots supporters to thank him for his hard work!** [**We’re sending this letter to his office at 8AM tomorrow – so we only have 105 more signature spots available! SIGN NOW! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/43613?t=6&akid=7151%2E878179%2EIZLxJ2) | [Donate $3 to sign the letter now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/43613?t=7&akid=7151%2E878179%2EIZLxJ2)
---

TO: DA Alvin Bragg
FROM: A grateful Democrat
Subject: Thank you! **_Dear DA Bragg — you’re a HERO!_**

**We cannot begin to tell you the immense sense of relief we felt when we saw Trump had been indicted for his crimes!**

Donald Trump has been free to spout his hateful, treasonous rhetoric for years. _Now, he could FINALLY go to jail where he belongs!_

**We know the MAGA mob is attacking you relentlessly — but you're still doing everything in your power to defend our democracy and hold traitor Trump accountable.**

**So we just wanted to show our thanks!** [**I hope you know that there are MILLIONS of us across the country that stand with you. That’s why I’m signing this letter and chipping in $3 to Voter Protection Project to thank you for holding Trump accountable and to elect Democrats who will stand up for our democracy »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/43613?t=8&akid=7151%2E878179%2EIZLxJ2) | [Donate $3 to sign now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/43613?t=9&akid=7151%2E878179%2EIZLxJ2)
---
**_X A grateful Democrat_**
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=7151%2E878179%2EIZLxJ2). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=7151%2E878179%2EIZLxJ2).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=7151%2E878179%2EIZLxJ2) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=10&akid=7151%2E878179%2EIZLxJ2). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=7151%2E878179%2EIZLxJ2)
---

We know the MAGA mob is attacking you relentlessly — but you're still doing everything in your power to defend our democracy and hold traitor Trump accountable. So we just wanted to show our thanks! | X A grateful Democrat | | Paid for by VPP (www.protectvoting.org) Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104 The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps. Please, consider making a . Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a. to request fewer emails. disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY]( "PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY")
body:
A momentum of historical legislative accomplishments! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/7245b0f65e49/n41kepo7ku-471476?e=25844e23a8)
---
| | [ ](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=dbca8e4669&e=25844e23a8)
---
| | Peter,
---
|
* Legislative Update for Week Ending April 14, 2023
* PRO-LIFE VICTORY!
* CHILDREN PROTECTED!
* Education & Opportunity Scholarship Act Advance
* Voter ID/Election Integrity
* Taxes
* The Evolution of Legislation
* ...Until Next Week

---
|
---
|
## Legislative Update for Week Ending April 14, 2023
---
| This was a historical and amazing week at the Unicameral! Republicans have been waiting to win on the bigger issues for many sessions. The limitations of having enough conservative Senators in the past are seemingly behind us. The 108th Unicameral executed their strategy in a big way this week (after a solid prior week) with multiple victories. The historical bills for Life, School Choice, Let Them Grow, and others have additional rounds of debate to go, so we must remain supportive to the end.

The overall tone of this week’s newsletter is positive, however it is noted that attendance from testifiers has been lower, after what was RECORD & HISTORICAL ATTENDANCE (hats off to you) during the hearing phase of the Legislature. We encourage you to attend the Floor Session of the Unicameral process or watch on Live cast when you can. Watchfulness in the Citizen never stops. We know conflicts with work and life routines arise, so we do want to say how grateful we are for your efforts (you are making the difference).

The moral support is very much needed for our Senators as the emotionally charged environment increases at the Unicameral. A lot is on the line the next two months that will change the trajectory of this state for a generation. To this point, my favorite moment of the week was Catherine handing out a flower to each Senator as they walked through a mob of boos and heckling to thank them for their courageous vote to save babies. Catherine provided the right touch at the right time from her heart that lifted the spirits of many of the Senators at that moment in time. Thank You Catherine! In addition, Chairman Underwood wrote a letter of encouragement, support, and conviction in anticipation of the BOLD votes needed on the "Let Them Grow" cloture vote. He distributed the letter early Thursday morning before session and thanked the Senators for their efforts. #FortheKids
Onto the week...
---
|
## PRO-LIFE VICTORY!
---
| Nebraska is a Pro-Life state and has been wanting substantial change in our legislation to protect the innocent unborn. This week, the entire Republican body held together and voted in harmony to protect pre-born children at the moment a heartbeat is detected. With one vote from a solid Pro-Life Democrat, victory was achieved!!! Tears of joy were shed and palpable. The personal stories of our senators were brave and gripping. Telling your senator ‘Excellent Job’ is needed and encouraged. Two more steps and history will be made for Nebraska. Below is the full press release issued.
---
| [LB 626 NEGOP Press Release](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=26336a1361&e=25844e23a8 "LB 626 NEGOP Press Release")
---
|
---
|
## CHILDREN PROTECTED!
---
| The legislature protected the pre-born AND born child this week. The well funded medical and pharmaceutical lobbies in conjunction with Planned Parenthood, who make substantial money in attempting to change the identity of a child, were given a clear message. The people of Nebraska defeated the "money". As we stated in earlier editions of this letter, kids are not allowed to do a variety of things in society until they are of age with a fully developed brain. “Let Them Grow” passed the second round of legislative action this week. The complete press release can be read below. Stay Vigilant. We are not at the finish line with one round to go.
---
| [LB 574 Press Release](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=63e2c9e991&e=25844e23a8 "LB 574 Press Release")
---
|
---
|
## Education & Opportunity Scholarship Act Advance
---
| The trend of looking out for the kids continued. Senator Linehan’s LB753, Opportunity Scholarship Act, (School Choice) bill passed the second round of the legislative process. We believe this is the beginning of reversing the trend to put power back into the hands of parents over the education of their child. While curriculum and values being taught are concerning conservatives across the state, the poor trend in test scores of our children (especially in the urban areas) have activated some independents and right leaning Democrats to see the need to vote for change as well. Kudos to Senator Linehan for taking a strong stand for our kids' education even with the challenges of big dollar education lobbies.

It is clear Nebraska's kids need advocacy more than ever. Our party will continue to deliver for our kids. As we promised after our election last July, we have placed a stronger emphasis on Education. This Friday, we attended the State Board of Education meeting in Lincoln to continue this point of emphasis. SPIRITED PUBLIC COMMENT grounded in conservative values was spoken directly to the Board. Furthermore, a thorough defense of Conservative board member Kirk Penner occurred. We will continue to back up our elected officials who look out for our values and kids.

The school board(s) continue to be put on notice. They will need to change or citizens will continue to replace these representatives until they respond to the parents and improve outcomes. We need to rebuild a politically-neutral schooling environment. Parental control and improvement in the scores (especially urban areas) will make the difference in stabilizing the future of Nebraska education.
---
| [LB 574 Press Release](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=cd6c80bd9a&e=25844e23a8 "LB 574 Press Release")
---
|
---
|
## Voter ID/Election Integrity
---
| As we continue to see the NEGOP Legislative Plan succeed at all levels, however, we have to address that the Election Security advancement is not. Our Platform is clear on many Election components, but here is a portion of our Platform that should affect the work done this year.

_**The integrity of elections is one of the most critical issues in our Republic. To secure our elections for future generations, we support requiring government-issued picture ID for voting and proof of citizenship at the time of voter registration. To guard against unfair practices and guarantee an open and transparent auditing process, we support a requirement that each vote cast in all elections be documented by a paper record in addition to any digital ballot cast. Because of its potential for abuse and fraud, the Nebraska Republican Party opposes ballot harvesting.**_

Moving forward, the election integrity problem has many lanes to be discussed. The complexity of each lane speaks for itself on why many citizens have election concerns. Unseen computer functions make the environment potentially ripe for problems. The average citizen should feel confident in how a computerized election works and have the ability to see a third party verification. Because, when you lose an election...the system inherently is seen as working against you. Two, if you win an election...the system by definition works for you. Most people do not question a process that affirms one’s self! This is why we have a dichotomy of beliefs between many on Main Street and many at the Capitol. Three, the pressure to prioritize other issues at the Unicameral is real. In the end, what is/was a very important issue to citizens, a 60/40 concern at the ballot box, is a 40/60 concern at the Unicameral. Bottomline, the progress of many bills on election integrity issues have been slowed with the filibuster session.

However, the Voter ID Bill has to be addressed as called for in the Constitutional amendment. We anticipate the version of Voter ID to be released this week. What we know is senators are narrowly tailoring election security to address what the actual amendment calls for. With that said, we wrote this piece for the citizens to understand the debate, and to clarify where our Platform and Legislative Plan stand on interpreting the amendment. Our legislature must enact a STRONG Voter ID Bill that will honor the will of the people. If Voter ID is all that is achieved on election security in 2023...they need to get it right. Below is a opinion piece that deals with the micro debate of the amendment.
---
| [Voter ID](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=86c4919db2&e=25844e23a8 "Voter ID")
---
|
---
|
## Taxes
---
| The first hiccup in the tax package occurred. As we discussed in previous updates, a fiscal note (a statement prepared by the Legislative Fiscal Office estimating the effect a bill would have on state and/or local expenditures and revenue) had to be established before additional measures could be added or considered. Fiscal notes are done once the amendments are established and a bill is passed. The fiscal note after the income tax package with amendments was published was high. They determined that the cuts will cost roughly $900 million more than originally anticipated with the original package. This $900 million has to be addressed due to the balanced budget requirement.

Some of the senators have questioned the accuracy of the fiscal note being published. It is a real concern and some of the relief may have to be paired back. We are far from the finish line on this bill and we recommend not to jump quickly to conclusions...positive or negative. However, the will to pass a substantial tax cut remains.
---
|
---
|
## The Evolution of Legislation
---
| As the Democratic filibuster crew delayed progress of the legislative body, there was less time to achieve needed legislative reform. The response has been to amend bills into other bills that were advancing. Bills that were once widely heralded by outside organizations are now being treated with pause by the same organizations. New amendments (sometimes unrelated to the original bill) have changed the flavor and outcome of the original piece of legislation. This is the beginning of “Christmas Tree” bills (multiple legal clauses and issues) and are becoming more common. Bigger bills that encompass a wide variety of issues are becoming the norm. The Omnibus bill is the result of a devolution of legislation where the entire deal with multiple needs is put into one giant piece of legislation that no one ever has the time to read. Single Issue bills (a frequent norm of the Unicameral in the past) are becoming less common. We encourage the citizens to read the bills for the additions and subtractions to see if the bill you once supported or disagreed with remains your opinion.
---
|
---
|
## ...Until Next Week
---
| This was an incredible week for Republicans in Nebraska. The legislation achieved is what the majority of conservative citizens have been looking for for some time.

However, I would add that the psychology and culture is changing as well. Republicans believe that bigger goals are possible again. Bolder legislation can be achieved when you have conviction. Second, the methods that worked for the left to stop Republicans in the past no longer work. The scare tactics in the media do not paralyze this 108th Unicameral Session. Contrary to the reports of the media (that most have stopped consuming due to a lack of trust), the legislature was not chaotic or some other extreme word this week. It was well organized, calm, and professional on this side of the house. The crying, outbursts, and name calling of the extreme left did not make the session chaotic for the entire body. Chaotic does not turn out 32 out of 32 votes on one side of the aisle. While both parties have different factions as a reality in 2023, the leadership of this party continues to stay committed to platform values and a legislative plan passed by the Central Committee that represents many different Republicans. Our senators have united on many issues despite differing personalities, beliefs, and backgrounds.

The solidarity on life, kids, and taxes are clear as day in the votes on the Big Board. Harmony is still a work in progress....but unity in votes has been achieved the last two weeks. We are grateful for the teamwork to achieve these common values that tie us together as a party.

Next, we want to recognize the hundreds of people in a multitude of groups and areas of the state that make these wins possible. It is popular political culture to take credit for power sake. The reality is, wins like these take work from a multitude of people. We want to make sure the multitude of organizations and people are recognized for their contribution to winning and receive the credit. Reporting, advocating, educating, supporting, diplomacy, etc....it takes an army of citizens in a Republic to make it happen.

Finally, to all the prayer warriors...God Bless. We received bigger help this week. The kids needed it. Keep praying. The social pressure the kids feel in today’s world is intense. Be there for them. They are the future.
---
| Until next week....
Todd Watson
Political Director
**[NE.GOP](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=71039cddab&e=25844e23a8)**
[political@ne.gop](mailto:)
---
| | | | | | | [](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=aef17f60ad&e=25844e23a8)
---
| | [](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=29f4cf7bea&e=25844e23a8)

name: Jennifer Wexton
subject: This nationwide assault on reproductive freedom must stop
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wexton for Congress
body:
Congress needs to act NOW to restore abortion rights at the federal level.

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61936572/401705006/-772585877?refcode=EM_PET_230417CH_N_JW_FULL_9_NG_N_Logo&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNDQxMzBlNC02YmRkLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Qa2YCe-aigWzegbxbK8E9j7ymDhZOWjdMayjy1kNclw=)
---
Recently, a Trump-appointed federal judge in Texas blocked the FDA's approval of mifepristone – a widely-used abortion drug that's been available for _over twenty years_.**If allowed to stand, this outrageous decision would ban mifepristone even in states like Virginia where abortion remains legal.**

It's absurd that a single right-wing judge can ignore years of medical evidence and dictate what medication we can and can't use. His ruling is the latest sign that the GOP intends to keep chipping away at reproductive rights until they've achieved a nationwide abortion ban.

**One thing is clear: Congress must restore the right to choose on a federal level, or anti-choice extremists are going to succeed.**

[**Will you join me and help us show support for legislation that recognizes reproductive freedom? We need to keep the pressure on House Republicans — and make clear that they'll be on the losing end of the next election if they fail to act.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61936573/401705007/-190932627?ms=EM_PET_230417CH_N_JW_FULL_9_NG_N_L1&refcode=EM_PET_230417CH_N_JW_FULL_9_NG_N_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNDQxMzBlNC02YmRkLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Qa2YCe-aigWzegbxbK8E9j7ymDhZOWjdMayjy1kNclw=&emci=e0f63947-58dd-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=b44130e4-6bdd-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=32654120) [Add Your Name ➞](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61936574/401705008/-190932627?ms=EM_PET_230417CH_N_JW_FULL_9_NG_N_B1&refcode=EM_PET_230417CH_N_JW_FULL_9_NG_N_B1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNDQxMzBlNC02YmRkLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Qa2YCe-aigWzegbxbK8E9j7ymDhZOWjdMayjy1kNclw=&emci=e0f63947-58dd-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=b44130e4-6bdd-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=32654120) For years, Republicans cloaked their opposition to _Roe v. Wade_ as a "state's rights" issue. **They were lying.**

Since _Roe_ was overturned, they've proposed a 15-week national abortion ban in the U.S. Senate. They've encouraged states with abortion bans to restrict people from traveling to states where the right to choose remains legal. And now, they're weaponizing the court system to eliminate access to abortion medication _everywhere_.

I'm enraged. And I'm also more motivated than ever to keep fighting. The work ahead won't be easy, but we cannot afford to let up for even one minute – not with the stakes this high.

clean_body: Congress needs to act NOW to restore abortion rights at the federal level. = Recently, a Trump-appointed federal judge in Texas blocked the FDA's approval of mifepristone – a widely-used abortion drug that's been available for over twenty years.If allowed to stand, this outrageous decision would ban mifepristone even in states like Virginia where abortion remains legal. It's absurd that a single right-wing judge can ignore years of medical evidence and dictate what medication we can and can't use. His ruling is the latest sign that the GOP intends to keep chipping away at reproductive rights until they've achieved a nationwide abortion ban. One thing is clear: Congress must restore the right to choose on a federal level, or anti-choice extremists are going to succeed. For years, Republicans cloaked their opposition to Roe v. Wade as a "state's rights" issue. They were lying. Since Roe was overturned, they've proposed a 15-week national abortion ban in the U.S. Senate. They've encouraged states with abortion bans to restrict people from traveling to states where the right to choose remains legal. And now, they're weaponizing the court system to eliminate access to abortion medication everywhere. I'm enraged. And I'm also more motivated than ever to keep fighting. The work ahead won't be easy, but we cannot afford to let up for even one minute – not with the stakes this high. The only way to restore the rights that we had for nearly five decades is for Congress to act. So I need you to stand with me to amplify our voices. Thank you, Jennifer | Rep. Jennifer Wexton proudly serves the 10th District of Virginia. Ron DeSantis stopped in Michigan, and while he was here, he detailed an agenda that would drive Michigan – and our country – backward.

_**Michiganders know better, though.**_ We aren’t buying what DeSantis, Trump, or whoever the GOP nominates for 2024 is selling.

We spoke loud and clear in 2022 and elected a Democratic trifecta which has been getting things done since day one. Together, we’ve been able to expand LGBTQ+ and workers’ rights, cut costs, and defend abortion rights.

Here’s the deal: Michigan is a battleground state, and 2024 will be competitive. That’s why we’re building up a statewide effort to ensure we can keep our Democratic trifecta while driving voters to the polls to support Democrats up and down the ballot.

clean_body: Michigan spoke loud and clear in 2022. | | = Ron DeSantis stopped in Michigan, and while he was here, he detailed an agenda that would drive Michigan – and our country – backward. Michiganders know better, though. We aren’t buying what DeSantis, Trump, or whoever the GOP nominates for 2024 is selling. We spoke loud and clear in 2022 and elected a Democratic trifecta which has been getting things done since day one. Together, we’ve been able to expand LGBTQ+ and workers’ rights, cut costs, and defend abortion rights. Here’s the deal: Michigan is a battleground state, and 2024 will be competitive. That’s why we’re building up a statewide effort to ensure we can keep our Democratic trifecta while driving voters to the polls to support Democrats up and down the ballot. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = Thank you, Team Whitmer | | Now that we have Democratic majorities in both the State House and Senate, we're getting to work – but we can't stop there. We need to double down on our efforts to solidify and build upon our majorities to keep getting things done for Michiganders. At Fair Fight, we know that the extremists who are preventing progress on gun safety are the same ones who are suppressing our freedom to vote. name: Shontel Brown
subject: Demand Congress defends reproductive care
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress
body:
We’re coming dangerously close to a bad reality.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61937110/401706692/-849735382?refcode=EM_FR_230417BlackMaternalHealth_N_SB_90DO_3_NG_TESTB_logo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNzBmOTc2Ni02ZWRkLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1zr2X78zGej49j4ZORXsQDELo-9j29OIND7fr5qnKmU=) On this last day of Black Maternal Health Week, I wanted to reflect on the state of our rights, Peter.

The GOP assault on reproductive care is in full swing, and fighting back has never been more important. Black mothers would be disproportionately impacted by a nationwide abortion ban, **seeing a spike in maternal deaths by nearly 40%.** With recent attacks to ban mifepristone, the most commonly used form of abortion, we’re coming dangerously close to that reality.

Just last week, I joined 240 Democratic members of Congress in signing onto an amicus brief to block a lower court’s decision to ban mifepristone. **While the Supreme Court has temporarily intervened, our fight is far from over.** Too many lives will be lost if we don’t act now, Peter.

[**_So, please, will you sign my petition demanding Congress pass the Women’s Health Protection Act, enshrining our reproductive rights into law? Recent rulings have shown that our reproductive rights are in danger of being undermined in court. There’s no better way to honor the end of Maternal Health Week than for Congress to enact federal abortion protections._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61937111/401706693/593891301?refcode=EM_FR_230417BlackMaternalHealth_N_SB_90DO_3_NG_TESTB_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNzBmOTc2Ni02ZWRkLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1zr2X78zGej49j4ZORXsQDELo-9j29OIND7fr5qnKmU=&emci=c4f8b786-5cdd-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=b70f9766-6edd-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=23746811) [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61937112/401706694/593891301?refcode=EM_FR_230417BlackMaternalHealth_N_SB_90DO_3_NG_TESTB_b1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNzBmOTc2Ni02ZWRkLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1zr2X78zGej49j4ZORXsQDELo-9j29OIND7fr5qnKmU=&emci=c4f8b786-5cdd-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=b70f9766-6edd-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=23746811) Your voice matters,

Shontel Brown | As a Cuyahoga County Council member and Chairwoman of the Cuyahoga County Democratic Party, Shontel Brown has spent the last decade serving the people of Ohio and building coalitions. Now, as the Congresswoman for Ohio’s 11th District, she will fight for affordable quality health care, jobs that pay fair wages, a strong public education system, and equity and justice for all. **Will you join her and be the change we need?**
---
[DONATE TODAY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61937113/401706695/-849735382?refcode=EM_FR_230417BlackMaternalHealth_N_SB_90DO_3_NG_TESTB_biobox&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNzBmOTc2Ni02ZWRkLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1zr2X78zGej49j4ZORXsQDELo-9j29OIND7fr5qnKmU=)

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Speaking out for Palestinian human rights
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

A few days ago, Jamaal Bowman and Bernie Sanders sent a letter to
President Biden, calling on his administration to ensure US military
funding to Israel doesn't support human rights violations.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/133616?refcode=em20230417-28530&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=28530%2E1203867%2EJba3T3 ]Justice Democrats like Jamaal are speaking out for Palestinian human
rights, no matter what the other side throws back at them. Please, rush a
$3 contribution right now to help us recruit and support
even more fighters who will speak out for Palestinian human rights.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/133616?refcode=em20230417-28530&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=28530%2E1203867%2EJba3T3 ]Contribute $3

The escalating violence in Israel-Palestine and actions of the new extreme
right-wing Israeli government are alarming, and unfortunately, instead of
condemning Israel’s human rights abuses, many Democrats and Republicans in
Congress are staying silent.

Justice Democrats have been outspoken about Palestinian human rights and
calling out abuses when they occur, but in response, far-right groups like
AIPAC try to drown out our candidates with their millions.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/133616?refcode=em20230417-28530&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=28530%2E1203867%2EJba3T3 ]Please make a contribution to Justice Democrats right now so we can
elect even more leaders like Jamaal Bowman, Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, Cori
Bush, and Summer Lee.

Thank you so much for your support,

Team JD

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1022&akid=28530%2E1203867%2EJba3T3 ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1023&akid=28530%2E1203867%2EJba3T3 ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20230417-28530-footer&t=1024&refcode2=28530_1203867_Jba3T3&akid=28530%2E1203867%2EJba3T3

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1025&akid=28530%2E1203867%2EJba3T3

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932

name: Team Nguyen
subject: Michelle Steel 🤝 corporate greed
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kim Nguyen for Congress
body:
| | Tomorrow is Tax Day, so we wanted to take a moment to talk about the unfair disparities in our tax system.

**Right now, the corporate minimum tax rate is just 15% – only 2% more than the average working American pays.** It is unacceptable and Kim is committed to correcting this injustice.

Will you rush $15 to help us out-organize Lombardo’s proposed attacks on our elections?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61938087/401709127/-2112663142?refcode=EM_BS_LEE_230417_FR_NVELECTIONS_A0_NA_U4_X2_M1&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OWNlYjk3YS03MWRkLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7mnmi90EH76eZ8-KABaXfB5gAIhHGJkrGa9CvDeOUag=) | | | [Chip in >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61938088/401709128/-2112663142?refcode=EM_BS_LEE_230417_FR_NVELECTIONS_A0_NA_U4_X2_M1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OWNlYjk3YS03MWRkLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7mnmi90EH76eZ8-KABaXfB5gAIhHGJkrGa9CvDeOUag=)

Lombardo’s proposed legislation would dismantle universal mail-in voting across our state.
This would be a disastrous move for our democracy and hurt accessibility across historically disenfranchised communities in Nevada.
The GOP’s recent attacks on voting rights are designed to restrict access to the polls for groups that have voted against them in the past. **Any act of voter suppression here in Nevada would be an undemocratic play at power by the GOP!**

name: Jason Crow
subject: Take a look at this picture
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CARAVEO FOR CONGRESS
body:
| Peter, what do you see in this picture? [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61938101/401709170/598556228?amount=10&refcode=em_fr_2023.04.17_b1_jc_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZGNlYjk3YS03MWRkLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J-xIVp5zVDoMr6yt3Zw-rtrgL8grjlQ29LtKV-vQjXA=) If we ignore the bowl cut, you’ll see a kid who has no clue what life has in store for him. All he wanted was to play with his Legos and run around in the backyard.

I grew up in a working-class family, so I know what the struggle is like for so many Americans. It wasn’t easy at times, but if there’s one thing my early life taught me, it’s to never give up.

I’ll be honest: There wasn’t always enough money growing up, so I started working at a young age. Paper routes, Arby's, construction — and after high school I enlisted in the National Guard to help pay for college.

**Then, right as I was preparing to graduate, 9/11 happened.** It was a defining moment. Like so many others, I felt the call to serve my country. I went active duty and became an Army Ranger, putting my life on the line to defend our nation’s values. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61938102/401709171/598556228?amount=10&refcode=em_fr_2023.04.17_b1_jc_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZGNlYjk3YS03MWRkLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J-xIVp5zVDoMr6yt3Zw-rtrgL8grjlQ29LtKV-vQjXA=) I came back stateside after serving three tours in Iraq and Afghanistan. I wanted to continue giving back, so I offered pro-bono legal services to help veterans transition to civilian life.

Then Donald Trump became president. Extremists began threatening to strip away our health care. Immigrants were being demonized. Even our democracy felt fragile.

I felt that call to step up and serve again, so after long discussions, I decided to run for office. Our country _needed_ a new generation of leadership — one that seeks to unite us, not divide.

**Coloradans agreed. In 2018, I became the first Democrat to ever represent Colorado’s 6th congressional district. It’s been full speed ahead ever since.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61938103/401709172/598556228?amount=10&refcode=em_fr_2023.04.17_b1_jc_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZGNlYjk3YS03MWRkLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J-xIVp5zVDoMr6yt3Zw-rtrgL8grjlQ29LtKV-vQjXA=) That’s my story, Peter. I’ve always gone where the fight is — no matter the odds.

**Progress doesn’t come easy. Progress happens because people put in the work and fight for it. Especially in moments like these.**

Democracy is under attack. The right to vote is under assault. A fundamental freedom was recently yanked away for half of Americans. _And the extremism still isn’t over._ I refuse to let them win without a fight.

**I’m counting on your support every step of the way to make sure Colorado stays blue – but it’s not just me going up against extremism, Peter.** Last year, Yadira Caraveo made history as the first Latina elected to Congress in the state of Colorado. _But it wasn’t easy._

**[We know extremists will put up an even tougher fight next election to send us both home, and we’re relying on folks like you to help us fight back. Please, will you split a $10 donation to reelect me and Yadira Caraveo to help us bring a new generation of leadership to Congress>> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61938104/401709173/1753059826?amount=10&refcode=em_fr_2023.04.17_b1_jc_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZGNlYjk3YS03MWRkLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J-xIVp5zVDoMr6yt3Zw-rtrgL8grjlQ29LtKV-vQjXA=)** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

**********[$50](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61938109/401709178/1753059826?amount=50&express_lane=true&refcode=em_fr_2023.04.17_b1_jc_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZGNlYjk3YS03MWRkLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J-xIVp5zVDoMr6yt3Zw-rtrgL8grjlQ29LtKV-vQjXA=)********** | **********[OTHER](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61938110/401709179/1753059826?refcode=em_fr_2023.04.17_b1_jc_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZGNlYjk3YS03MWRkLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J-xIVp5zVDoMr6yt3Zw-rtrgL8grjlQ29LtKV-vQjXA=)**********
Thank you for reading this email,

— Jason

Paper routes, Arby's, construction — and after high school I enlisted in the National Guard to help pay for college. Then, right as I was preparing to graduate, 9/11 happened. It was a defining moment. Like so many others, I felt the call to serve my country. I went active duty and became an Army Ranger, putting my life on the line to defend our nation’s values. = I came back stateside after serving three tours in Iraq and Afghanistan. I wanted to continue giving back, so I offered pro-bono legal services to help veterans transition to civilian life. Then Donald Trump became president. Extremists began threatening to strip away our health care. Immigrants were being demonized. Even our democracy felt fragile. I felt that call to step up and serve again, so after long discussions, I decided to run for office. Our country needed a new generation of leadership — one that seeks to unite us, not divide. Coloradans agreed. In 2018, I became the first Democrat to ever represent Colorado’s 6th congressional district. It’s been full speed ahead ever since. = That’s my story, Peter. I’ve always gone where the fight is — no matter the odds. Progress doesn’t come easy. Progress happens because people put in the work and fight for it. Especially in moments like these. Democracy is under attack. The right to vote is under assault. A fundamental freedom was recently yanked away for half of Americans. And the extremism still isn’t over. I refuse to let them win without a fight. I’m counting on your support every step of the way to make sure Colorado stays blue – but it’s not just me going up against extremism, Peter. Last year, Yadira Caraveo made history as the first Latina elected to Congress in the state of Colorado. But it wasn’t easy. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | ********=****** | ******=****** ---|--- ******=****** | ******=****** ******=****** | ******=****** Thank you for reading this email, — Jason Jason Crow was a Captain in the U.S. Army. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army or the Department of Defense. | PAID FOR BY CARAVEO FOR CONGRESS Caraveo for Congress PO Box 953 Eastlake, CO 80614 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Helen Gym
subject: How we’ll make Philadelphia safer
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Helen Gym
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-april23-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-april23-em]
I have fought for a safer, healthier and more resilient Philadelphia all my life.

In 2010, I was called into a Philadelphia public high school that was long considered one of the most dangerous in the state. I saw the School District neglect escalating problems and only react and punish as children were being hurt, teachers and staff members assaulted, and parents and families fled the school and the city.

Alongside victim advocates and the U.S. Justice Department, I got to work – establishing accountability for harm, bringing in trained mediators to work with students, retraining teachers and school staff, and investing in academic and health supports for students. I helped turn around that school in less than two years, and learned then what I know now – safety is a whole city mission.

I know that real community safety means working hand-in-hand with those most impacted by violence to find real solutions. As Mayor, my top priority will be ensuring that everyone in Philadelphia is safe and feels safe.

This afternoon, I joined Councilmember Jamie Gauthier and community leaders to outline my comprehensive community safety agenda, with concrete actions to address violence and improve safety in all of our neighborhoods.

My comprehensive safety agenda is the product of months of close collaboration with the communities most impacted by violence. Here are the highlights:

*
Restore
basic
safety
through
community
policing,
targeted
violence
interventions,
investment
in
forensics
and
detectives,
expanding
mental
health
crisis
response
teams,
and
improved
911
response
times.

*
Stop
violence
before
it
happens
with
mediation
and
de-escalation,
hospital
intervention
programs,
and
making
parents
part
of
the
solution.

*
Better
support
victims
and
survivors
with
coordinated
support,
resources
for
crime
scene
cleanup
and
funerals,
and
domestic
violence
response
teams.

*
Support
youth
with
wrap-around
services
,
including
safe
routes
to
school,
guaranteed
youth
jobs
in
violence-impacted
areas,
and
opening
recreation
centers
and
libraries
on
evenings
and
weekends.

*
Make
neighborhood
improvements
,
such
as
adding
lighting,
clearing
vacant
lots,
securing
abandoned
buildings,
cleaning
trash,
cracking
down
onillegal
dumping,
and
investing
in
greening
and
beautification
efforts.

*
Ensure
accountability
and
rebuild
community
trust
by
evaluating
public
safety
spending,
measuring
outcomes,
and
avoiding
failed
policies
like
stop
and
frisk.

Our community safety agenda is focused not only on responding swiftly and effectively to violence when it occurs — but preventing violence from happening in the first place.

On Day One, I will declare a State of Emergency – convening all City and community partners around a shared vision, utilizing evidence-based and data-driven strategies, and engaging directly with the neighborhoods most impacted by violence.

As Mayor, I will work closely with communities to invest in solutions that have been proven to work and to reclaim neighborhoods for our neighbors. By prioritizing outcomes and engaging with the community at every step, we will create a safer Philadelphia for all of our residents.

I have never sat on the sidelines when our city has been in need. Philadelphians need a leader who is tried, tested, and true in taking decisive action that keeps us all safe. It’s who I’ve always been, and it’s what I will do as your Mayor.

Thank you,
Helen

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-april23-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-april23-em]CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-april23-em]
Helen Gym is a Philly mom, a school teacher, a community organizer, and former City Councilmember. She has been fighting for Philly families and communities for decades — winning more resources for our schools, safer communities, and a more affordable Philadelphia. Our efforts are supported by everyday people like you who give what they can, whenever they can, because they want to see a safer, more prosperous, equitable Philadelphia that works for all of us.
