name: Becca Balint
subject: I just introduced my first bill, the Peer Education and Emergency Response for Mental Health Act.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont, P
body:
Our kids are in crisis – and we have a responsibility to act.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61938414/401710086/966991095?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MzJkODY5My03M2RkLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lqUDjBHfetyoBKlXSceODAOSWB2BnW1bJ1qt7TS7BNg=&emci=d5f28e76-67dd-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=732d8693-73dd-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=43402272) | Peter, American kids and teens are reporting record-high levels of stress, sadness, and depression. I’ve seen it in my former students, my constituents, and in the kids I’ve spoken with during recent visits to high schools around Vermont. **Our kids are in crisis – and we have a responsibility to act._That’s why today, I’m proud to introduce The Peer Education and Emergency Response for Mental Health Act. _** My bill ensures that teachers, school personnel, and students can be trained and ready to assist their peers who may be facing a mental health crisis by:
* Recognizing symptoms of mental health disorders in children and adolescents.
* Referring participants to necessary mental health treatment.
* Identifying signs of immediate mental distress (such as a panic attack) and, upon recognizing such signs, apply mental health first aid tactics.
* Educating participants on the resources that are available in the community for individuals with mental health challenges.

**Peer education is an effective, research-backed tool that we can use to improve the mental health of kids and teens – and I’m incredibly proud to introduce this bill on behalf of young people in Vermont and across the country. ** [**Add your name here to become a Citizen Co-Sponsor of my very first bill – The Peer Education and Emergency Response for Mental Health Act.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61938415/401710087/-288822252?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MzJkODY5My03M2RkLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lqUDjBHfetyoBKlXSceODAOSWB2BnW1bJ1qt7TS7BNg=&emci=d5f28e76-67dd-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=732d8693-73dd-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=43402272) [BECOME A CITIZEN CO-SPONSOR](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61938416/401710088/-288822252?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MzJkODY5My03M2RkLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lqUDjBHfetyoBKlXSceODAOSWB2BnW1bJ1qt7TS7BNg=&emci=d5f28e76-67dd-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=732d8693-73dd-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=43402272) With kids and teens under immense pressure to do well academically, excel in extracurriculars, get into colleges, be accepted by their peers, be present on social media, and look, act, and perform in certain ways, it’s no wonder that 42% of high school students report persistent feelings of sadness or hopelessness (according to the CDC). Over the past three months, I’ve heard time and time again that teens want to know how they can show up for their friends, classmates, and siblings who are struggling with mental health. **It’s time for us to empower, educate, and equip young people with the knowledge they need to help their peers navigate through tough times. This is just one tool to give people experiencing mental health challenges the support they need, but it is a first step in addressing this crisis.** [**If you support my work to address teen mental health, add your name here to become a Citizen Co-Sponsor of my very first bill – The Peer Education and Emergency Response for Mental Health Act.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61938417/401710089/-288822252?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MzJkODY5My03M2RkLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lqUDjBHfetyoBKlXSceODAOSWB2BnW1bJ1qt7TS7BNg=&emci=d5f28e76-67dd-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=732d8693-73dd-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=43402272) [BECOME A CITIZEN CO-SPONSOR](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61938418/401710090/-288822252?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MzJkODY5My03M2RkLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lqUDjBHfetyoBKlXSceODAOSWB2BnW1bJ1qt7TS7BNg=&emci=d5f28e76-67dd-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=732d8693-73dd-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=43402272) Thank you, Becca Balint

| **LA County Supervisor Hilda Solis Endorses Laura Friedman for Congress in CA-30.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61938971/401711951/62647395?refcode=em-4.17.23-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDU5MTRiZTQtNzVkZC1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=cEXBUOiOXzBMs2ectUGR5MUqDDUR3lHYd6JwW7XUImY=)

_“Laura Friedman is the fighter we need in Congress. She has been an outstanding champion on affordable housing, the environment, expanding public transportation, and protecting a woman's right to reproductive choice. As a former member of Congress myself, I know Laura has the experience to be an effective voice for our communities.”_

\- Supervisor Hilda Solis

**[Send in a donation to support Laura Friedman’s campaign for Congress.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61938973/401711954/62647395?refcode=em-4.17.23-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDU5MTRiZTQtNzVkZC1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=cEXBUOiOXzBMs2ectUGR5MUqDDUR3lHYd6JwW7XUImY=)**
---

There are a number of reasons I’m so proud of this endorsement. For starters, Supervisor Solis has been a force of good in LA County – by helping expand healthcare access, combating homelessness, advocating for environmental justices, and much more.

Hilda is also a trailblazer. She represented Los Angeles in both chambers of the California State Legislature and in the US Congress. Not only was she the first Latina ever elected to the State Senate, but was the first Latina to serve as Secretary of Labor under President Obama.

**Here in CA-30, we’re hoping to break another glass ceiling. If elected, I’d be the first woman to represent this community in Congress.** With so many urgent issues on the line -- including reproductive rights -- we need women at the table in Congress with experience and proven records of success.

**[Help us keep this trend going by chipping in $3 to my campaign for Congress. Together, we’ll fight to protect our values in Washington.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61938974/401711956/62647395?refcode=em-4.17.23-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDU5MTRiZTQtNzVkZC1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=cEXBUOiOXzBMs2ectUGR5MUqDDUR3lHYd6JwW7XUImY=)**

subject: To be perfectly candid, Peter:

body:
We need your help to continue building a better America. | | |
---
Peter, the actions we take today will shape the future of our country. That’s why Joe and I have worked alongside Democrats in Congress to create over 12 million jobs, lower costs for families, and make historic investments in our nation’s infrastructure. None of this progress would have been possible without the full support of members of this grassroots team -- thank you. **But to be perfectly candid, Peter: We still have work to do.** A strong DNC is critical to building the nationwide party infrastructure needed to elect more Democrats and keep making meaningful progress for the American people. **That’s why I’m asking you to step up and help Democrats stay on track of their fundraising goal by donating $25 to the DNC today. Can I count on your support?**

clean_body: We need your help to continue building a better America. | | | Peter, the actions we take today will shape the future of our country. That’s why Joe and I have worked alongside Democrats in Congress to create over 12 million jobs, lower costs for families, and make historic investments in our nation’s infrastructure. None of this progress would have been possible without the full support of members of this grassroots team -- thank you. But to be perfectly candid, Peter: We still have work to do. A strong DNC is critical to building the nationwide party infrastructure needed to elect more Democrats and keep making meaningful progress for the American people. That’s why I’m asking you to step up and help Democrats stay on track of their fundraising goal by donating $25 to the DNC today. Can I count on your support? | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | When I was a little girl, my mother would always tell my sister and me, "Don’t just sit around and complain about things. Do something. " That is why I am so grateful for this team -- and for your capacity to roll up your sleeves and get to work. You see, progress is a movement -- it can’t be achieved by one person alone. It is going to take every single member of this grassroots team fighting for a better future to safeguard the progress we’ve made so far and keep making a difference in the years to come. I'm so grateful for all of your support. Thank you, Kamala Kamala Harris Vice President of the United States Kamala Harris: Derivative of Adam Schultz / Biden for President Photo. name: Brown, Sherrod
subject: Trump attacked me
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF SHERROD BROWN
body:
Donald Trump called me "one of the worst in the Senate!"
| | |
---
**Friend – Donald Trump attacked me on Truth Social, calling me "one of the worst in the Senate!"** It's never been more clear: The GOP is doing everything it can to replace me with a Trump yes-man and flip the Senate red.
To be clear, I'm not scared of their attacks. But I do know that where Trump goes GOP dark money follows – and if I'm being attacked this early in the race, we're in for a long, challenging, and expensive road ahead.
**That's why I'm urgently asking for your grassroots support so I can fight back, friend:[Will you rush $5 or more today to help me stand up to the GOP's attacks and protect Ohio's critical seat?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61939355/401713455/691330013?&amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk140-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZWY0OWM3Ni03OGRkLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=I-fq2n8qVj16Tm3NGPNRbry47VD-o0G3HzgUROOOFaM=)**
